## Welcome to “Sword World”!

## What is a Role-Playing Game (RPG)?

- A role-playing game (RPG), as the name suggests, progresses by having each participant in the game play out an assigned _role_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00018))_
- _Role-Playing_ means _to act out a role_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00018))_
- _Role-Playing_ means _to act out a role_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00018))_
- Participants in an RPG can be roughly divided into two groups: One is the **game master** ( **GM** ), while the other are the **players** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00019))_
- RPGs are played by several people, but there is only one game master while the rest are the players. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00019))_
- RPGs are played by several people, but there is only one game master while the rest are the players. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00019))_
- Before playing a game, the game master must prepare what’s called a **scenario** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00020))_
- A number of scenario collections have already been produced for _Sword World RPG_ , and will continue to be released in the future. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00020))_
- You may either create your own, or you may use an existing one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00020))_
- Before playing a game, the game master must prepare what’s called a **scenario** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00020))_
- The game proceeds according to a prepared scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00021))_
- The game master is the one who facilitates the scenario, while the players _play the role_ -- of the **characters** --in the scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00021))_
- However, there is something that’s very different from film or theater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00022))_
- The game master's scenario does _not_ provide any dialogue, etc., for the characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00022))_
- Which is: the players do _not_ know the scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00022))_
- **GM** is the game master, and **A** , **B** , and **C** are different players. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00023))_
- They start to have fun by making nasty remarks at the poster girl at the bar, much to her annoyance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00024))_
- You're now resting at a tavern now that the sun is setting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00024))_
- **GM** ： You guys were traveling and you arrived at a small village. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00024))_
- okay, I'll give them a little warning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00025))_
- That would soil the name of a hero of justice! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00027))_
- **GM** ： They have very dirty leather armor and shortswords. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00032))_
- **C** ： Even I have the backing of the Thieves Guild (laughs). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00034))_
- (laughs) One of the thugs, who looks particularly rough, snarls “What, you have the gall to complain about us - the Brando family?!”. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00037))_
- The conflict only arose because the players wanted it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00040))_
- It only says _thugs will misbehave in the tavern_ , then it's up to the players to decide what they'll do about it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00040))_
- In this case, the scenario prepared by the game master does _not_ say _there will be a fight with thugs (the Brando family)_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00040))_
- If the players were all like player **B** , there would've been no conflict. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00040))_
- The conflict only arose because the players wanted it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00040))_
- It only says _thugs will misbehave in the tavern_ , then it's up to the players to decide what they'll do about it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00040))_
- Here is where another major feature of role-playing games comes into play. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00041))_
- Not knowing what the results will be. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00042))_
- Neither the game master nor the players know whether the characters will be able to kick the thugs out of the tavern and become _heroes of justice_ , or get beaten by the thugs and instead become _heroes of comedy_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00044))_
- The only thing you should know is _Who is considered stronger?_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00045))_
- Even in real life, if you start a fight, you won't know who will win without actually fighting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00045))_
- The only thing you should know is _Who is considered stronger?_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00045))_
- In other words, based on a number that represents a character's strength, a result is determined by rolling the dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00047))_
- **Player** ： (rolls) Hey, I got a good roll, my attack is a hit! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00049))_
- **Player** ： (rolls) Agh, my roll was bad. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00051))_
- In this way, due to two types of randomness, _player's choice_ and _random numbers (dice)_ , the actual game can display a wide degree of fluctuation, sometimes the "story" will evolve beyond the expectations of the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00052))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00020))_

> Before playing a game, the game master must prepare what’s called a **scenario** . You may either create your own, or you may use an existing one. A number of scenario collections have already been produced for _Sword World RPG_ , and will continue to be released in the future.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00022))_

> The players must make their characters act based on their abilities and characteristics.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00051))_

> **Player** ： (rolls) Agh, my roll was bad. My attack failed!

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00054))_

> If you enjoy the story in this way, you can say that you've experienced the best part of a role-playing game.

## The Meaning of the Rulebook

- This book is a rulebook for the roleplaying game entitled _Sword World RPG_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00058))_
- As stated, a role-playing game progresses according to a scenario prepared by the game master, as well as the players' decisions and random numbers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00059))_
- This rulebook is here to help you with that. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00059))_
- There is magic, and creatures that can only be found in fiction will come to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00060))_
- As mentioned earlier, Forcelia, the world you’ll deal with in _Sword World RPG_ , is different from our real world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00060))_
- There is magic, and creatures that can only be found in fiction will come to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00060))_
- _Because you're a hero_ doesn't mean you can do everything. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00061))_
- _Because it's magic_ does not mean something is all-powerful, and _because they're monsters_ does not mean all monsters are equally strong or scary. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00061))_
- However, even fictional worlds have their own laws. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00061))_
- Each has their own characteristics and limitations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00061))_
- Each has their own characteristics and limitations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00061))_
- To the average person, a tiger would be a terrifying creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00063))_
- If you don't understand them, you won't be able to grasp the characteristics of Forcelia, but not _all_ of Forcelia's laws are written in this book. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00064))_
- In making decisions, be sure to add your own _common sense_ to the rules. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00064))_
- The rules set forth in this book are the fundaments that characterize Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00064))_
- heroes present in _Sword World RPG_ are capable of fighting as well as or even better than a tiger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00065))_
- In all cases, the word of the game master is absolute in the progress of the game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00068))_
- It should be noted that, as a general principle of role-playing games, the game master makes the final decisions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00068))_
- You may think of the rules as the _law_ and the game master as the _judge_ who applies it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00068))_
- If decisions are made according to the rulebook, success or failure of the characters' abilities and actions in the fictional world can all be determined with certainty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00070))_
- In this sense, the rulebook is written to reproduce all the laws and details in the fictional world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00070))_
- Unfortunately, however, this is merely an _ideal_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00073))_
- This is neither possible nor realistic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00075))_
- For things that the rules cannot fully define, please use your own **common sense** to make decisions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00075))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00062))_

> For example, some people may have spectacular muscle strength, while others may be less fortunate. A weapon wielded by someone with superior strength can do more damage than a weapon wielded by someone who is not blessed with such strength. However, with training and experience, even those with inferior talents should be able to fight admirably.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00074))_

> For example, it was stated that Forcelia follows different laws than the real world. Indeed, they are different in many ways. Therefore, in order to be a complete rulebook, _all_ of its laws would have to be written. That is to say, _an apple that falls from a tree lands on the ground_ .

## What You’ll Need to Play Sword World RPG

- So you’ll need pencils, erasers, notepads, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00099))_
- These are needed per the number of people. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00100))_
- A Character Sheet is used to keep track of a character who acts in a fictional world (Alecrast in the case of _Sword World RPG_ ) as the player's alter ego. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00100))_
- You will also need Character Sheets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00100))_
- Please copy and use the sheets included in this book. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00100))_
- other RPGs, incorporates chance and uses dice to resolve various actions, in order to make the game more fun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00101))_
- Since two dice are often used at a time, it is advisable to bring two dice per person. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00101))_
- The dice used are ordinary six-sided dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00101))_
- From here on in this book, rolling dice will be referred to as _rolling 1D_ or _rolling 2D_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00102))_
- When you _roll 2D_ , roll two dice at the same time and use the total of both numbers (2-12). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00102))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00099))_

> When playing _Sword World RPG_ , you will have to write and rewrite many things during the game.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00100))_

> You will also need Character Sheets. A Character Sheet is used to keep track of a character who acts in a fictional world (Alecrast in the case of _Sword World RPG_ ) as the player's alter ego. These are needed per the number of people. Please copy and use the sheets included in this book.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00102))_

> When you _roll 1D_ , roll one die and use the result that comes up.

### **The Structure of the Rulebook**

- This book consists of five major parts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00079))_

### **Welcome to Sword World!**

- This is the part you are reading right now. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00082))_

### **Part 1 Player Section**

- This is the part for the players, one of the two groups of people needed to enjoy an RPG. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00085))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00085))_

> It introduces the minimum rules you should remember when playing _Sword World RPG_ .

### **Part 2 Game Master Section**

- This is the part for the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00088))_
- Rules that aren’t necessary from a player's point of view are included here. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00088))_
- Therefore, if you're solely a player, you _don't_ have to force yourself to memorize the rules of this part. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00089))_
- Conversely, a game master _must_ understand the rules included here in addition to those included in Part 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00089))_
- Therefore, if you're solely a player, you _don't_ have to force yourself to memorize the rules of this part. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00089))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00089))_

> Therefore, if you're solely a player, you _don't_ have to force yourself to memorize the rules of this part. Conversely, a game master _must_ understand the rules included here in addition to those included in Part 1.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00088))_

> When you’re a game master, you will have to remember rules that you wouldn’t have to remember when you’re a player.

### **Part 3 Optional Rules**

- However, having additional rules to memorize often gets in the way of the speedy development that is the life of an RPG. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00092))_
- These are rules designed to make playing _Sword World RPG_ more interesting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00092))_
- It's _not_ recommended for inexperienced players to use the rules here from the beginning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00093))_
- The rules in this section are for those who already have an understanding of _Sword World RPG_ and are able to play with ease. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00093))_

### **Guide to Forcelia and Alecrast**

- This part is a brief overview of Forcelia as a whole, the history of Alecrast, and various regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00096))_
- _Sword World RPG_ is set on the continent of **Alecrast** , a part of the world called **Forcelia** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00096))_
- In order to play an RPG, it's best to have all participants understand the background setting, and proceed with the game implicitly based on this **common understanding** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00097))_
- This part should help you with that. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00097))_

### **Handling fractions**

- However, if it's _not_ mentioned, the fraction should _always_ be rounded up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00104))_
- If division results in a fraction, the fraction is either rounded up or rounded down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00104))_
- Due to the nature of the game, there are situations in _Sword World RPG_ where math calculations must be made. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00104))_
- Which one is clearly stated for each situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00104))_
- If division results in a fraction, the fraction is either rounded up or rounded down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00104))_
- Along with pens and pencils, you must not forget the dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00105))_

## Books Related to Sword World RPG

- Here, we'll introduce some books that will help you understand _Sword World RPG_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00109))_
- You do not need all of these, but knowing their contents can make playing _Sword World RPG_ more enjoyable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00109))_

### **1. Replay Collections**

- The progress of the game is reproduced via conversation between the game master and the players. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00112))_
- Once you read these, you will quickly understand how the game is meant to progress. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00113))_
- There are three points to be aware of, however. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00114))_
- Since some of the rules in this book you’re reading right now have been revised, there are rare cases where the descriptions are contradictory. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00115))_
- First, _Sword World RPG Replay Collections_ ① _~_ ⑨ are _not_ based on this rulebook, but rather on the previously released _old_ version of the rules (see below). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00115))_
- Second, although the _Duda RPG Replay Collection_ series uses the rules of _Sword World RPG_ , it is a variant that emphasizes the aspects of humor, fantasy and mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00116))_
- As a game, it’s nearly the same, but in this series, modified rules not found in _Sword World RPG_ , such as **inept detective checks** , have been introduced to demonstrate its uniqueness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00116))_
- So please note that even though it's 99% Sword World RPG, it's still not 100% (for more information on this, please read the Introduction and Commentary sections of _Duda RPG Replay Collection_ ① _: The Lost Detective Appears!_ ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00116))_
- As a game, it’s nearly the same, but in this series, modified rules not found in _Sword World RPG_ , such as **inept detective checks** , have been introduced to demonstrate its uniqueness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00116))_
- A replay should _not_ be considered a complete manual, but merely a reference. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00117))_
- In actual play, things do not go as smoothly as this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00117))_
- Some rule errors that occurred during the game have been corrected and dealt with, especially in areas where they do not have a major impact. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00117))_
- Finally, these replays are based on actual play and reproduction of the situations, but have been cut or edited for redundancy and other aspects in order to prioritize readability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00117))_

## Part 1: Players’ Section

## Chapter 1: Character

## 1.1 Ability Scores

- There are six types of ability scores: **dexterity** , **agility** , **intelligence** , **strength** , **life force** , and **mental power** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00159))_
- Ability scores apply not only to humans, but also to the various non-human races that become adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00159))_
- In Sword World RPG, these basic characteristics of an adventurer are represented by numbers called **ability scores** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00159))_
- Ability scores apply not only to humans, but also to the various non-human races that become adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00159))_
- large weapons, heavy armor, etc., high strength is required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00160))_

### 【 **Life Force** 】

- Life force represents how well an adventurer can withstand physical injury. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00162))_
- The higher this number, the more robust the adventurer is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00162))_

### 【 **Mental Power** 】

- Mental power is also related to magic resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00164))_
- Mental power represents the adventurer's willpower and perseverance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00164))_
- Using magic is hard work, and one cannot hope to cast much magic without a high mental capacity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00164))_

### 【 **Dexterity** 】

### **Loss of Ability Scores and Its Impact**

- Dexterity represents the dexterity of an adventurer's hands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00167))_
- It relates to a variety of tasks that involve the use of one's hands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00167))_
- This is especially important when wielding weapons in combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00167))_
- In _Sword World RPG_ , this is represented by a loss of life force and mental power (point reduction). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00168))_
- The four other ability scores of dexterity, agility, intelligence, and strength are rarely reduced, but if this does happen and these ability scores _do_ fall to 0 or less, the adventurer will still become disabled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00168))_
- If either life force or mental power fall to 0 or less, the adventurer will fall unconscious and be unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00168))_

### 【 **Agility** 】

- It's related to working with the whole body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00170))_
- In combat, it is important when evading enemy attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00170))_
- Agility represents an adventurer's physical balance and agility. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00170))_

### 【 **Intelligence** 】

- It also represents the ability to perceive things, such as finding hidden objects and sensing abnormalities spur of the moment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00172))_
- Intelligence represents the speed of an adventurer's mind and the amount of knowledge they hold, or in other words, their so-called smarts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00172))_
- Above all, it is important when using magic, a major attraction in fantasy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00172))_
- It also represents the ability to perceive things, such as finding hidden objects and sensing abnormalities spur of the moment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00172))_
- If life force and mental power are reduced by wounds or exhaustion, they will recover once the wounds are treated or the exhaustion is wiped away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00173))_
- There are various conditions for these reductions and recoveries, which you will discover as you read through this book. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00173))_

### 【 **Strength** 】

### 【 **Ability Bonuses** 】

- Strength represents an adventurer's muscular strength. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00176))_
- An ability score value is related to the success or failure of an action that an adventurer tries to perform, but in _Sword World RPG_ , success or failure is determined by a **bonus** derived from the ability score, rather than the ability score itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00177))_
- However, temporary reductions do _not_ affect modifiers for only two scores: life force and mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00177))_
- The result of each ability score divided by 6 (rounded down) will be the bonus for that ability score (Table 1-1: Ability Bonuses). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00177))_
- Each of these numbers is referred to as a _dexterity bonus_ , _intelligence bonus_ , etc., using the name of the ability score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00177))_
- However, temporary reductions do _not_ affect modifiers for only two scores: life force and mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00177))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00176))_

## 1.2 Races

- Humans are not the only adventurers in Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00184))_
- Next, we'll explain the races that are relatively common as adventurers in Forcelia, though they’re not as common as humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00184))_
- Humans are not the only adventurers in Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00184))_
- Players are free to choose from humans or any of these races to be their alter ego, an adventurer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00185))_

### 【 **Dwarf** 】

- Their lives are no different from those of humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00187))_
- Dwarves were once members of the fae tribe who lived in the fairy world, but now they have fully immersed into the world inhabited by humans (which we call the material world) and no longer have the ability to travel to and from the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00187))_
- Their skin color is dark, almost brown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00188))_
- Men often have long beards on their chins, while women do not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00188))_
- Their hair ranges from brown to dark brown and their eyes are a similar color. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00188))_
- They are about 120 cm tall, round and plump, and have bulbous noses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00188))_
- Dwarves usually live in human cities and villages using their own skills, but there are several cities and villages where only dwarves live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00189))_
- They can see things in the dark as well as they can in daylight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00189))_
- They are also very dexterous with their hands, and excel in such techniques as craftsmanship and blacksmithing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00189))_
- Many of their works are stunning and cannot be imitated by humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00189))_
- Dwarves usually live in human cities and villages using their own skills, but there are several cities and villages where only dwarves live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00189))_
- They mainly worship the gods of the earth, with **Braki** as their main deity, who is also the god of smithing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00190))_
- They have a very strong sense of tribalism, respecting the rules of their tribe and seldom violating them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00190))_
- The life span of a dwarf is longer than that of a human, thought to be around 200 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00191))_

### 【 **Grassrunner** 】

- Grassrunners were originally members of the fae tribe who lived in the meadows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00196))_
- They have already lost the ability to return to the fairy world, but as fae of the meadows, they have a truly diverse range of abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00196))_
- However, they are very curious and many have abandoned the fairy world to become residents of human society. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00196))_
- They are about 1 meter tall and have the appearance of a human child. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00197))_
- Their eyes have a similar color. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00197))_
- Their skin color is predominantly black or reddish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00197))_
- Other than their slightly pointed ears, they are not much different from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00197))_
- They only stay in one place for a while only to raise a few children, and once the children are grown, they travel again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- Of course, they have no concept of tribes, nor do they like to live in cities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- Therefore, they have no custom of believing in gods at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- Their personalities are very cheerful and simple. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- What they desire are the various experiences and incidents one encounters while traveling, so for this reason they may join groups of adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- They only stay in one place for a while only to raise a few children, and once the children are grown, they travel again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- Therefore, they have no custom of believing in gods at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00198))_
- Grassrunners have a life span of about 200 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00199))_

### 【 **Elf** 】

- Elves are members of the fae tribe who live in the forests, and are the envy of humans because of their beautiful appearance and immortality (no life span). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00205))_
- Elves are members of the fae tribe who live in the forests, and are the envy of humans because of their beautiful appearance and immortality (no life span). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00205))_
- Their body hair is thin, and even men do not grow beards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00206))_
- These children are called **halfelves** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00206))_
- Their most distinctive feature is their long, slender, pointy ears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00206))_
- They are also close as a species to humans and both can produce offspring. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00206))_
- Their skin color is near white and their eyes are pale blue or green. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00206))_
- They do not believe in any gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00207))_
- They rarely leave the forests where they live, but occasionally the odd elf will show up in town. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00207))_
- As such, they may act aggressively toward intruders into the forest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00207))_
- They do not like outsiders, nor do they want to be ruled by others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00207))_
- They live a very closed-off life in the forest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00207))_
- One of the reasons humans envy elves is their _immortality_ , which is a characteristic of an elite (ancient) race called **high elves** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00208))_
- Elves who appear in the cities of humans are for the most part ordinary (newer species) elves, bound to a life span of about 1000 years rather than immortality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00208))_

## 1.3 Skills

- Skills have a greater impact on a character's actions than ability scores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00221))_
- In addition to ability scores, _Sword World RPG_ also uses numeric values called **skills** to describe the characteristics of characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00221))_

### 【 **Half-Elf** 】

- A half-elf is one who is born of a human and an elf. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00217))_
- Humans and elves are close as species and are able to have children, as explained in the elf section. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00217))_
- Their ears are slightly pointed, but they also have a spot where a beard grows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00218))_
- They are almost the same height as humans, but are more delicate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00218))_

### **1.3.1**

### **Skill Basics**

- 0 levels indicates that someone is completely unrelated to that skill, while 10 levels represents the highest proficiency that a normal human can attain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00224))_
- There are several types of skills, which are divided into several groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00224))_
- For each skill, a character's proficiency is represented by a **level** from 0~10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00224))_
- As you can see, they have a strong connotation of professional job functions rather than skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00225))_
- Skills are referred to by names such as _fighter_ , _thief_ , _merchant_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00225))_
- It is also possible for one character to acquire (have levels in) more than one skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00225))_
- Skills are referred to by names such as _fighter_ , _thief_ , _merchant_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00225))_
- Those who have these skills are often referred to by their skill names. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00226))_
- So instead of _someone who has the fighter skill_ , they are simply called _fighters_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00226))_
- Half-elves have a longer life span than humans due to their elven characteristics, with a life span of around 200 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00227))_
- Half-elves vary in their traits depending on whether they were raised by humans or by elves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00228))_
- When raised by humans, they're not all that different from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00228))_

### **1.3.2**

### **Skill Types**

- Skills are grouped into several types. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00231))_
- There are also two adventurer skills that _cannot_ be acquired by a player character: **dark priest** and **dragon priest** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00232))_
- There are eight of these: **fighter** , **thief** , **priest** , **sorcerer** , **shaman** , **sage** , **ranger** , and **bard** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00232))_
- Adventurer skills, as the name implies, are acquired by player characters, the adventurers, or by equivalent characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00232))_
- First, skills are divided into two types: **adventurer skills** and **general skills** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00232))_
- Some of these are useful during an adventure, and it is well worth it for an adventurer to acquire general skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00233))_
- General skills are skills of an ordinary person as opposed to an adventurer, such as **merchant** , **farmer** , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00233))_
- General skills are skills of an ordinary person as opposed to an adventurer, such as **merchant** , **farmer** , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00233))_
- Each skill consists of a number of abilities appropriate to the skill name, and having a **skill level** (1 skill level or higher) means that you can demonstrate those abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00234))_
- Each skill consists of a number of abilities appropriate to the skill name, and having a **skill level** (1 skill level or higher) means that you can demonstrate those abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00234))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00234))_

> Each skill consists of a number of abilities appropriate to the skill name, and having a **skill level** (1 skill level or higher) means that you can demonstrate those abilities.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00235))_

> The table below shows the names and types of each skill (Table 1-2: Skill Types).

### 《 **Changeling** 》

- Half-elves are not a single generation of mixed blood, but are free to have offspring. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00237))_
- There is no such thing as inheriting only 1/4 of the characteristics of one or the other. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00237))_
- The child will be a full elf, a half-elf, or a human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00237))_
- There is no such thing as inheriting only 1/4 of the characteristics of one or the other. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00237))_
- Even among humans, elves and halfelves can be born from humans who have had elven blood in their past due to intermittent inheritance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00238))_
- These children are called **changelings** and are looked down upon in human society. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00238))_

### **1.3.3**

### **Adventurer Level**

- The highest level among the adventurer skills that a character has is called that character's **adventurer level** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00241))_
- In Sword World RPG, a character's capability as an adventurer is determined by their adventurer skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00241))_
- For example, a character with priest skill level 1, fighter skill level 4 (these are adventurer skills), sailor skill level 5, and fisher skill level 2 (these are general skills) would be at adventurer level **4** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00241))_
- The highest level among the adventurer skills that a character has is called that character's **adventurer level** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00241))_
- For example, a character with priest skill level 1, fighter skill level 4 (these are adventurer skills), sailor skill level 5, and fisher skill level 2 (these are general skills) would be at adventurer level **4** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00241))_

### **1.3.4 Explanation of Adventurer Skills**

- Adventurer skills are the most important thing for an adventurer in _Sword World RPG._ This is because which adventurer skills a character has acquired will determine what that character can do, and will reveal that character's characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00244))_
- Adventurer skills are the most important thing for an adventurer in _Sword World RPG._ This is because which adventurer skills a character has acquired will determine what that character can do, and will reveal that character's characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00244))_
- Below is a brief description of each adventurer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00245))_

### 【 **Fighter** 】

- They are experts in combat, able to use all kinds of weapons and armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00247))_
- Those with this skill are adept warriors, who fight with weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00247))_
- _A wandering swordsman who makes a name for himself solely on the strength of his sword, and eventually establishes a kingdom._ Such a story is also possible in Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00248))_

### 【 **Thief** 】

- As indicated, they bring along abilities that are useful for theft, such as pickpocketing, lock-picking, and so on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00250))_
- One who has this skill will be called a _thief_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00250))_
- As indicated, they bring along abilities that are useful for theft, such as pickpocketing, lock-picking, and so on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00250))_
- For example, there's the ability to detect and disable traps that have been set, and the ability to stay ahead of footsteps, listening and observing what’s going on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00251))_
- The abilities of the thief are also useful in adventures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00251))_
- However, not everyone with the thief skill makes a living off such thefts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00251))_
- For example, there's the ability to detect and disable traps that have been set, and the ability to stay ahead of footsteps, listening and observing what’s going on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00251))_
- Thieves also have some fighting ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00252))_
- For this reason, many of them have made a name for themselves as _adventurers_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00253))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00251))_

> However, not everyone with the thief skill makes a living off such thefts. The abilities of the thief are also useful in adventures. For example, there's the ability to detect and disable traps that have been set, and the ability to stay ahead of footsteps, listening and observing what’s going on.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00252))_

> Their fighting style is based on lightness, and although they cannot use heavy weapons or armor, they _can_ use light weapons and armor that does not impede their movement, allowing them to fight as well as a fighter.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00252))_

> Thieves also have some fighting ability. Their fighting style is based on lightness, and although they cannot use heavy weapons or armor, they _can_ use light weapons and armor that does not impede their movement, allowing them to fight as well as a fighter.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00254))_

### 【 **Sage** 】

### 【 **Bard** 】

- Those with the sage skill are commonly referred to as sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00258))_
- They're knowledgeable and well-versed in all fields of study (academics in Forcelia are not differentiated, and one is rarely versed in only one specific field). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00258))_
- They're knowledgeable and well-versed in all fields of study (academics in Forcelia are not differentiated, and one is rarely versed in only one specific field). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00258))_
- Many legends and folklore are often woven into songs passed down from ancient times, and Although they are often thought to be confined to their study rooms, many of them do go out on _adventures_ , because they believe that _the best way to learn is to see and hear firsthand_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00259))_
- Those who play musical instruments and sing songs for a living are called bards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00259))_
- Thus, those with the bard skill have the ability to play an instrument and sing songs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00259))_
- Thus, those with the bard skill have the ability to play an instrument and sing songs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00259))_
- Many legends and folklore are often woven into songs passed down from ancient times, and Although they are often thought to be confined to their study rooms, many of them do go out on _adventures_ , because they believe that _the best way to learn is to see and hear firsthand_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00259))_

### 【 **Ranger** 】

- These abilities are, of course, essential for _adventure_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00262))_
- Those with this skill are adept at outdoor living, and dealing with a variety of natural hazards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00262))_
- Rangers are also excellent with projectile weapons and have the same offensive capabilities as fighters, especially when it comes to projectiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00263))_
- 15 natural bards are familiar with these legends and folklore. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00264))_
- These songs have magical effects on all who hear them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00265))_
- Bards also have the ability to sing magical songs called **spellsongs** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00265))_

### 【 **Rune Master** 】

- The five adventurer skills of sorcerer, shaman, priest, dark priest, and dragon priest are sometimes collectively referred to as **rune master skills** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00267))_
- Rune masters are viewed with fear by the general public because of their magical abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00267))_
- This is because these five classes use **runes** and have the ability to handle magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00267))_
- Rune masters are viewed with fear by the general public because of their magical abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00267))_
- This is because these five classes use **runes** and have the ability to handle magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00267))_
- Bards also use magical abilities through their _spellsongs_ but are not considered rune masters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00268))_
- There is a great difference in the _spells_ that rune masters handle, both in quality and quantity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00268))_

### 【 **Sorcerer** 】

- It is this magical power that is known as **high ancient** and is the magic that the sorcerers of today have inherited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00270))_
- As its nickname suggests, Kastuul is said to have accomplished various miracles through the power of **==> picture [147 x 283] intentionally omitted <==** magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00270))_
- The ancient kingdom of Kastuul, which fell more than 500 years ago, is sometimes referred to as the _magical kingdom_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00270))_
- The skill that can handle it is the sorcerer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00271))_
- With the fall of Kastuul, much of high ancient was lost, but some has survived to the present day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00271))_
- The rules do not require one character to acquire both of these skills, but if they are acquired at the same time, it gives them a significant advantage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00272))_
- Many sorcerers are also sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00272))_

### 【 **Shaman** 】

- The _material world_ is the world in which physical beings like us humans live, and the _fairy world_ is the world that connects the two. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00274))_
- The _spirit world_ is the world of **spirits** who command various powers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00274))_
- It is said that when creating Forcelia, the gods divided the world into three: the _spirit world_ , the _fairy world_ , and the _material world_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00274))_
- **Silent spirit** are runes used to communicate with spirits and draw out the powers they control. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00275))_
- The skill that can use silent spirit is called the shaman skill, and those who have this skill are referred to as shamans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00275))_
- The skill that can use silent spirit is called the shaman skill, and those who have this skill are referred to as shamans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00275))_
- The powers controlled by spirits are diverse, ranging from the four major powers of _earth_ , _water_ , _fire_ , and _wind_ to the _spirit of humans_ , and there are many different types of **spirit magic** used by shamans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00276))_

### 【 **Priest** 】

- In the ancient days of myth, the gods who created the world were later divided into light and darkness and waged a great war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00278))_
- A great war that engulfed all the ancient races– including the legendary dragons of old --ended with all the gods losing their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00278))_
- Those who exercise their power as agents of the gods are priests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00278))_
- Gods who have lost their physical bodies cannot engage with the _material world_ , which is the world for those with bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00279))_
- Priests, as agents of the gods, can use **holy prayer** and cast **holy magic** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00280))_

### 【 **Dark Priest** 】

- This is the same classification as the two factions that waged war in ancient times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00282))_
- The gods are divided into two main groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00282))_
- Each of the gods teaches and guides people, but the teachings and guidance of the _gods of darkness_ are extremely individualistic and deny human reason, because they are far removed from human _morality_ , so to speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00283))_
- Another hindrance to belief in the wicked gods, is the fact that the majority of people in Forcelia today believe in the teachings of the _gods of light_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00283))_
- Gods who belonged to the _gods of darkness_ are now considered _wicked gods_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00283))_
- Each of the gods teaches and guides people, but the teachings and guidance of the _gods of darkness_ are extremely individualistic and deny human reason, because they are far removed from human _morality_ , so to speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00283))_
- However, even the wicked gods have their believers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00284))_
- As agents of the wicked gods, there are dark priests who use **daemon scream** and cast **dark magic** , which is essentially equivalent to Divine Magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00284))_
- Players may _not_ choose the dark priest skill as one of their character's skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00284))_
- This is because it would be significantly more difficult to have a character practice the teachings of the _gods of darkness_ , when examining a roleplaying game from the _role-playing_ perspective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00284))_
- This is because it would be significantly more difficult to have a character practice the teachings of the _gods of darkness_ , when examining a roleplaying game from the _role-playing_ perspective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00284))_

### 【 **Dragon Priest** 】

- The runes used by dragon priests are called **dragon roar** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00286))_
- Dragon roar is a system of magic that imbues one's own body with the characteristics of a dragon, and the ultimate goal is to transform oneself into a dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00287))_
- This is because it would be extremely difficult to have a character live the life of a dragon priest, when examining a role-playing game from the _role-playing_ perspective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00288))_
- Players may _not_ choose the dragon priest skill as one of their character's skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00288))_
- This is because it would be extremely difficult to have a character live the life of a dragon priest, when examining a role-playing game from the _role-playing_ perspective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00288))_

## 1.4 Character Creation

- Now it's time to show you how to create a _player character_ who will explore Forcelia as the player's alter ego. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00293))_
- You may photocopy the one at the end of this book (photocopying is permitted for personal use only). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00294))_
- You may photocopy the one at the end of this book (photocopying is permitted for personal use only). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00294))_
- It is designed to assist in character creation as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00295))_
- A Character Sheet is used to write down various information about a character during the course of the game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00295))_

### **1.4.1**

### **Choose a Race**

- First, the player character's race must be chosen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00298))_
- Each also has strengths and weaknesses in the ability scores that form the basis of the character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00298))_
- Each race has their own characteristics and limitations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00298))_
- There are five types to choose from: human, dwarf, grassrunner, elf, and half-elf. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00298))_
- Each race has their own characteristics and limitations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00298))_

### 【 **Human** 】

- Humans have the most average ability scores and can do almost anything without a hitch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00300))_
- They have no restrictions on skill selection. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00300))_
- This is probably the most suitable race for a beginner to choose. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00300))_

### 【 **Dwarf** 】

- On the other hand, they tend to be less agile and less intelligent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00302))_
- In terms of skills, sorcerer and shaman cannot be chosen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00302))_

### 【 **Grassrunner** 】

- Rune master skills cannot be acquired. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00304))_
- Their intelligence and life force are average. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00304))_
- At the same time, their low strength does not let them benefit much from acquiring the fighter skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00304))_
- It's a good idea to advance the thief skill acquired from the beginning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00304))_
- Grassrunners have excellent dexterity, agility, and mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00304))_
- Their strength, on the other hand, is decidedly inferior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00304))_
- On the other hand, if they were raised by humans, there is no limit on acquiring skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00305))_
- On the other hand, if they were raised by humans, there is no limit on acquiring skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00305))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00305))_

> If they were raised by elves, there is a restriction that they cannot acquire the priest skill.

### 【 **Elf** 】

### **Example:**

- They are also a suitable race for thief. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00308))_
- On the other hand, their strength and life force tend to be low. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00308))_
- There is a restriction that they cannot acquire the priest skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00308))_
- It would be better to advance the shaman skill acquired from the beginning, or to acquire the sorcerer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00308))_
- First, a race must be chosen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00310))_

### **1.4.2**

### **Determine Ability Scores**

- First, you must roll the dice to determine **subability scores A~H** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00313))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00315))_

> Half-elves are halfway between human and elf in terms of ability. Therefore, their dexterity, agility, intelligence, and mental power are slightly higher, while their strength and life force are slightly lower. However, they do not deviate very far from the average and are fully capable of handling all skills.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00313))_

> Once you've chosen a race, you can determine your ability scores.

### 【 **Half-Elf** 】

- However, they do not deviate very far from the average and are fully capable of handling all skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00315))_
- Half-elves are halfway between human and elf in terms of ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00315))_
- Therefore, their dexterity, agility, intelligence, and mental power are slightly higher, while their strength and life force are slightly lower. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00315))_
- Therefore, their dexterity, agility, intelligence, and mental power are slightly higher, while their strength and life force are slightly lower. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00315))_
- A character's six ability scores are each the totals of two of these eight subability scores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00317))_
- Depending on whether a half-elf was raised by humans or elves, the skills they have from the start and the limitations on the skills they can acquire differ. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00319))_
- Depending on whether a half-elf was raised by humans or elves, the skills they have from the start and the limitations on the skills they can acquire differ. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00319))_
- In addition, a notation such as 1D+6 means _to roll one dice and add 6 to the result_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00322))_
- 1D stands for _one die_ , 2D stands for _two dice_ and 1/2D stands for _half the result of one dice (rounded up)_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00322))_
- In addition, a notation such as 1D+6 means _to roll one dice and add 6 to the result_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00322))_
- Once ability scores are determined, sub-ability scores are _never_ used during the game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00328))_
- Once the ability scores have been determined, also find the ability bonuses and write them down on the Character Sheet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00329))_
- An ability bonus equals the ability score divided by 6 (rounded down), as shown under 1.1: Ability Scores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00331))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00313))_

> Once you've chosen a race, you can determine your ability scores. First, you must roll the dice to determine **subability scores A~H** .

| **dexterity**<br> **agility**<br> **intelligence**<br> **strength**<br> **life force** | =**A**+**B**<br>=**B**+**C**<br>=**C**+**D**<br>=**E**+**F**<br>=**F**+**G** |
| --- | --- |
| **mental power** | =**G**+**H** |

> On the table, "D" stands for _dice_ . 1D stands for _one die_ , 2D stands for _two dice_ and 1/2D stands for _half the result of one dice (rounded up)_ . In addition, a notation such as 1D+6 means _to roll one dice and add 6 to the result_ .

> **Table 1-3: Determining Sub-Ability Scores**

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00322))_

> On the table, "D" stands for _dice_ . 1D stands for _one die_ , 2D stands for _two dice_ and 1/2D stands for _half the result of one dice (rounded up)_ . In addition, a notation such as 1D+6 means _to roll one dice and add 6 to the result_ .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00321))_

| Sub-AbilityScore | Human | Dwarf | Grassrunner | Elf | Half-Elf |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| A | 2D | 2D+6 | 1D+6 | 1D+6 | 1D+4 |
| B | 2D | 1/2D | 2D+4 | 1D+6 | 1D+6 |
| C | 2D | 1D+4 | 1D+6 | 1D+6 | 1D+4 |
| D | 2D | 1D | 1D | 1D+6 | 1D+6 |
| E | 2D | 1D+4 | 1/2D | 1D | 1D+2 |
| F | 2D | 1D+6 | 1/2D | 1/2D | 1D+2 |
| G | 2D | 2D+4 | 2D+6 | 1D+4 | 1D+4 |
| H | 2D | 2D+4 | 2D+4 | 1D+6 | 2D |

<details>

> On the table, "D" stands for _dice_ . 1D stands for _one die_ , 2D stands for _two dice_ and 1/2D stands for _half the result of one dice (rounded up)_ . In addition, a notation such as 1D+6 means _to roll one dice and add 6 to the result_ .

### **For Races Other Than Humans**

- For races other than human (except for half-elves raised by humans), the starting skills and experience points are determined by race (Table 1-6: Starting Experience by Race). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00350))_
- For races other than human (except for half-elves raised by humans), the starting skills and experience points are determined by race (Table 1-6: Starting Experience by Race). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00350))_
- In _Sword World RPG_ , these are not related to the numeric aspects of the game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00351))_
- This should make it easier to decide on the age, gender, and name of the character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00351))_
- Of course, no matter what name you choose, it will not affect their abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00351))_
- Conversely, once the ability scores are created and the character's initial experience is determined, you can usually get an impression of the character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00351))_
- In other words, it is assumed that there are no differences or changes in ability based on gender or age. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00351))_
- Since the character we're creating is a human, we'll use the _backgrounds_ table. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00352))_
- The character ended up coming from the _mercenary_ background. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00352))_
- Therefore, we'll have 1 level in the fighter skill as our starting skill, and 2500 starting experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00352))_
- Therefore, we'll have 1 level in the fighter skill as our starting skill, and 2500 starting experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00352))_
- The result of our next 2D roll is _6_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00353))_
- In addition, money is listed as 2Dx200. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00353))_
- This means we roll 2D and have money (in **gamels** ) equal to the result times 200. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00353))_
- The character has 1200 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00353))_
- This means we roll 2D and have money (in **gamels** ) equal to the result times 200. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00353))_

### 《 **Age** 》

- In addition, in _Sword World RPG_ , newly created characters are _green youths_ , so to speak, who don’t have much experience. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00355))_
- It is basically impossible to play as a child who has not fully grown both physically and mentally, or an old man who is clearly on the physical decline. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00355))_

### **1.4.4**

### **Age, Gender, Name**

- You can decide at the beginning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00358))_
- These things may be decided at any stage of character creation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00358))_
- A character must be given a name, and their age and gender must be decided. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00358))_
- When deciding on the age of a character, it should be between 15 years old and around 30 years old at most for a human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00359))_
- In Alecrast, the average life span of a human is about 50 years due to underdeveloped medical care. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00359))_
- Of course, it's natural that they'll die earlier than this if they're ill or wounded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00359))_
- The life span of a human is about 100 years old. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00359))_

### 《 **Ages of Each Race** 》

- There was a time when the socially accepted age of adulthood was about 15 years old, and even younger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00362))_
- Whether or not a person is recognized as an adult is not only a matter of physical growth, but also a matter of social judgment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00362))_
- However, it is one thing to be physically mature and another to be socially recognized as an adult. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00362))_
- In Japan, where we live, we are considered adults at the age of 20, but there are some actions that are recognized as adult at the age of 18. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00362))_
- Whether or not a person is recognized as an adult is not only a matter of physical growth, but also a matter of social judgment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00362))_
- However, in the societies of other races, you basically have to be older to be considered an adult, and the longer the life span of the race, the later they tend to do so. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00363))_
- In the human societies of _Alecrast_ , 15 years old is considered to be the age of adulthood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00363))_
- As a result, the time for characters of other races to be recognized as adults and have the opportunity to go on adventures will be significantly later than it is for humans; around 30 years of age for dwarves, 40 years for grassrunners, and 100 for elves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00364))_
- Half-elves, if raised in human society, are treated as adults at around age 15, just like humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00365))_
- This is because it’s considered common sense in human society. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00365))_
- This is because it’s considered common sense in human society. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00365))_
- 19 to have a shorter lifespan than elves and because they are essentially detested, they are not made to wait until they are 100 years old and are forced out of society at around age 30. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00366))_
- 19 to have a shorter lifespan than elves and because they are essentially detested, they are not made to wait until they are 100 years old and are forced out of society at around age 30. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00366))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00361))_

> For races other than humans, consider age as follows. Even for different races with long life spans, the rate of growth to adulthood is not much different from that of humans. Therefore, once they reach around 20 years of age, they are physically fit enough to embark on an adventure.

- As mentioned before, _Sword World RPG_ treats men and women as having no difference in ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00369))_
- Therefore, the choice of gender is completely free. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-00369))_
