### **[ Fire Weapon ]**

### Base Mental Power Cost=10

- This is a spell used on weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01634))_
- For monsters that are weak against fire, you can add an extra +10 bonus to strike power (+20 total). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01634))_
- This spell will _not_ change the attack power or critical target of the weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01634))_
- Conversely, this spell's bonus to strike power will not apply to monsters that resist fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01634))_
- The targeted weapon will now emit a magical flame from its striking end, adding a +10 bonus to the weapon's own strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01634))_
- This spell can be used to damage monsters that only magic weapons are effective against. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01635))_
- Monsters that can only be wounded by magic and are _also_ immune to fire _cannot_ be dealt damage by attacking them with a weapon that had this spell cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01635))_
- However, in such a case, the strike power will be _10_ regardless of the strike power of the weapon itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01635))_
- This spell can be used to damage monsters that only magic weapons are effective against. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01635))_
- Monsters that can only be wounded by magic and are _also_ immune to fire _cannot_ be dealt damage by attacking them with a weapon that had this spell cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01635))_
- If you do apply it to a bow, arrows, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01636))_
- The creature itself is not affected by this fire, but if it is attacked by fire from others, it will still suffer damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01636))_
- This spell can also be cast directly on a living creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01636))_

- When increasing the weight of an object, it’s increased by 10% each, the rate of _double_ expansion would be _1.1 x 1.1 = 1.21 times_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01655))_
- For _triple_ , it’d be _1.1 x 1.1 x 1.1 = 1.331 times._ To _double_ the weight, you must expand it _8 times_ , and to increase it _tenfold_ , you must expand it _25 times_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01655))_
- Even if you increase the required strength, the strike power or defense power of weapons and armor will not change. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01656))_

### **[ Stone Servant ]**

- This simplified version of a stone golem is specifically called a _Stone Servant_ and can be used to engage in combat or simple tasks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01667))_
- After the spell's duration expires, the stone servant will turn back into a stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01667))_
- This spell creates a human-shaped stone golem (1 and a half meters tall) from a stone the size of a clenched fist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01667))_
- However, more complex work is beyond a stone servant's hands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01667))_
- After the spell's duration expires, the stone servant will turn back into a stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01667))_

### **[ Hard Lock ]**

- Once cast, this spell's effect is permanent until it's removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01674))_

### **[ Familiar ]**

- Cats and owls are also famous familiars, and these animals will appear in response to the caster's summons and serve the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- If a sorcerer who already has a familiar tries to summon a second one, it’ll show no effect whatsoever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- This spell has the effect of allowing a sorcerer to summon and control an animal to become their familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- A sorcerer can have only one familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- A sorcerer can have only one familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01683))_
- This spell must always be performed as a ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01684))_
- Please refer to Table 5-2: Familiars to see what kind of animal will appear as a familiar in response to a summon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01684))_
- The caster requires 3 full days of preparation, followed by 12 hours of spell chanting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01684))_
- Also, when you give a command to your familiar, the familiar will try to execute it, but there are natural limits to what it can actually do depending on the familiar's physical abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01685))_
- Abilities of each familiar are listed on the table, but you can find out more details by referring to an animal encyclopedia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01685))_
- Also, when you give a command to your familiar, the familiar will try to execute it, but there are natural limits to what it can actually do depending on the familiar's physical abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01685))_
- The caster can also borrow mental points from their familiar to cast spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01686))_
- In this case, the mental power that would've been consumed by the caster will instead be reduced from the familiar's mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01686))_
- However, the number of points lost cannot go beyond the familiar's maximum life points or mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01689))_
- If the familiar loses life points or mental points due to an attack from another, etc., the caster will suffer the same pain that the familiar felt, so they will lose the same amount of points in life force and mental power (this damage cannot be reduced by adventurer level). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01689))_
- Also, in the case of agility, action order will also increase (decrease) by 6. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01690))_
- which is not represented by ability scores, all you have to do is increase or decrease its attack points (dexterity), evasion points (agility), or strike points (strength) by 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01690))_
- If you use it on a youma, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01690))_
- Targets who successfully resist will not receive any effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01691))_
- _Physical Enchant_ cannot expand its effect (that is, increase or decrease ability scores by 12 points, 18 points, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01691))_
- If it's used for a decreasing effect, they'll probably want to resist it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01691))_
- The target is free to attempt to resist this spell or not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01691))_
- If a caster and their familiar are separated by more than 1 kilometer, contact between them will be temporarily interrupted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01692))_
- When a familiar is involved in magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01692))_
- When a familiar takes damage, the caster can also use their adventurer level to reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01692))_
- Until they're both within 1 kilometer of each other again, they cannot share senses, nor can the caster borrow mental points from their familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01692))_
- Until they're both within 1 kilometer of each other again, they cannot share senses, nor can the caster borrow mental points from their familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01692))_
- They are called Sharpness, Dullness, Quickness, Slowness, Strength, and Weakness, respectively. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01693))_
- _Physical Enchant_ is subdivided into six spells by their effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01693))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01674))_

> _Hard Lock_ is a spell that's more powerful than _Lock_ . You can place a magical lock on an object that opens and closes, such as doors, gates, treasure chest lids, etc. to prevent them from opening. Once cast, this spell's effect is permanent until it's removed. Also, no matter what material it's made of, this gives it the same strength as iron. In other words, opening a door or lid with _Hard Lock_ requires the same effort as destroying an iron wall or an iron box.

> This spell has the effect of allowing a sorcerer to summon and control an animal to become their familiar. The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. For example, frogs or crows. Cats and owls are also famous familiars, and these animals will appear in response to the caster's summons and serve the caster. A sorcerer can have only one familiar. If a sorcerer who already has a familiar tries to summon a second one, it’ll show no effect whatsoever.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01685))_

> The caster can use their familiar's sensory organs to see and hear, and vice versa.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01685))_

> The summoned familiar and the sorcerer are always in mental contact, so they can communicate in a way similar to telepathy and can also share sensory organs. The caster can use their familiar's sensory organs to see and hear, and vice versa. Also, when you give a command to your familiar, the familiar will try to execute it, but there are natural limits to what it can actually do depending on the familiar's physical abilities. > By casting this spell, the caster can levitate up to 10 meters above the ground. During this time, you're completely free to adjust the height. However, you cannot take actions that seem impossible depending on the situation (for example, it would be impossible for a caster 10 meters above the ground to engage in melee combat with a monster on the ground). If someone casts _Dispel Magic_ , etc. on you and the spell is removed, you will fall. If you do fall, apply the rules for falling damage (see p. 122).

### **4th Level Ancient Magic List**

### **[ Counter Sense ]**

- Effect=You can negate the power of detection spells and items, and know the type (effect) of spell or item, the one who cast it, their whereabouts, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01746))_
- After that the effect of the _Counter Sense_ spell vanishes (although you can recast it, of course). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01749))_
- At the same time, it will also reveal the type (effect) of spell or item used on you, as well as the clear identity of the person who used it (not just knowing their name, but what they look like). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01749))_
- After that the effect of the _Counter Sense_ spell vanishes (although you can recast it, of course). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01749))_
- This spell targets spells of the _detection_ type, and items such as _crystal orb of clairvoyance_ that have the same effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01750))_
- This spell targets spells of the _detection_ type, and items such as _crystal orb of clairvoyance_ that have the same effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01750))_
- Also, the effects of detection items and spells, no matter how long their duration, will vanish after _1 round_ due to _Counter Sense_ activating. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01751))_
- In other words, for 1 round, the opponent's detection spell or item will work normally, and information of what happened during that time will be told to the opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01751))_
- They'll also discover that you have used the spell _Counter Sense_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01751))_
- Also, the effects of detection items and spells, no matter how long their duration, will vanish after _1 round_ due to _Counter Sense_ activating. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01751))_

> By casting this spell, the caster will be able to converse in a language previously unknown to them. This spell only allows you to speak _one_ language each time you cast it, so in order to be able to speak _two_ or _three_ unknown languages at the same time, you must _expand_ the effect of the spell. Also, this spell only allows you to use languages used by intelligent creatures listed on Table 12-1: Languages (see p. 159), so that means you will not be able to speak to animals, etc.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01776))_

> Effect=Become able to speak unknown languages Type=-

- Someone who's had this spell cast on them may only attempt to resist the first time the spell is cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01783))_

### **[ Fireball ]**

- This is a spell of destruction that is forbidden by wise sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01789))_
- Its strike power is 20 (10 with no criticals on a successful resist). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01789))_
- It creates an explosion centered on a point in space within a 3 meter radius, dealing fire and shock damage to everything within. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01789))_
- It creates an explosion centered on a point in space within a 3 meter radius, dealing fire and shock damage to everything within. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01789))_

### **[ Location ]**

- This is a spell that specifies a specific object and the direction in which it currently exists. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01798))_
- Also, the closer you get, the more you can feel its presence, so you can get a rough estimate of the distance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01799))_
- No matter how far away the object is from the caster, the spell will still take effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01799))_
- The caster must know the actual object being targeted by the spell well enough to specify it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01799))_

> Duration=Permanent, until focus ends Effect=Can create illusions using images and sounds

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01813))_

> This spell creates illusions that affect the senses of hearing and vision. The illusion can be anything within its area of effect, but it cannot cause any realistic effects. For example, you can create a wall of fire via illusion, but you won't feel any heat even if you approach it, and you won't burn to death even if you jump into it. However, the illusions created by this spell are so realistic that they cannot be discovered just by looking at them normally. The spell's effect continues even if you touch it. If an illusion of a stone wall is in a passage, you can't see beyond it, but you're completely free to pass through it (if you try). However, this result will not destroy the illusion of the stone wall. As long as the caster maintains focus, they can freely change the illusion, but if they lose focus, only static or simple repeating illusions can remain. The caster can freely cancel the spell's effect, but a _Dispel Magic_ spell is required if someone else attempts to remove it.

### **[ Suppress Elemental ]**

- However, only one kind of spirit power can be erased at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01820))_
- However, this has no effect on greater spirits (behemoth, kraken, efreet, djinn). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01820))_
- This spell cannot be expanded to block two or more kinds of spirit power from working at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01820))_

### **[ Skeleton Warrior ]**

- A skeleton warrior, also known as a dragontooth warrior, is a kind of golem created from a dragon's tooth, and resembles a human skeleton with a sword and shield. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01827))_
- This spell is what creates that formidable warrior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01827))_
- The caster can give commands to the skeleton warrior in high ancient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01828))_
- For example, commands such as _kill anyone who enters this room_ or _kill that man_ are very simple and can be carried out, but a command such as _go to the next village and kidnap the chief's daughter_ cannot be carried out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01828))_
- Only the caster can give commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01828))_
- They cannot understand overly complex commands, but they handle simple commands accurately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01828))_
- Only the caster can give commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01828))_
- For example, commands such as _kill anyone who enters this room_ or _kill that man_ are very simple and can be carried out, but a command such as _go to the next village and kidnap the chief's daughter_ cannot be carried out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01828))_
- The dragon's tooth, which is the source of the skeleton warrior, is a very valuable item as one of the treasures of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01829))_
- You'd have to pay a whopping 5000 silver coins to purchase it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01829))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01822))_

### **[ Analyze Enchantment ]**

- If they fail, the same caster cannot use this spell on the same object until their magic power increases (any attempts will always fail). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01869))_
- When you use this spell on an object that had _Seal Enchantment_ cast on it, its effect cannot be inferred if your final score does not exceed the target score determined by _Seal Enchantment_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01869))_
- However, some items are safe from the effect of this spell due to the _lost spell_ , _Seal Enchantment_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01869))_

### **[ Create Undead ]**

- To use this spell, of course, you'll need a corpse (usually a human corpse is used). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- _Create Undead_ is a spell that creates undead monsters such as skeletons and zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- If you use this spell on a mummified or severely decomposed corpse, the corpse will be completely skeletonized and a skeleton will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- Depending on the state of decomposition of the corpse, it will determine whether it'll become a skeleton or a zombie. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- If it's still a corpse before that happens, then a zombie will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- If it's still a corpse before that happens, then a zombie will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- _Create Undead_ is a spell that creates undead monsters such as skeletons and zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01880))_
- The commands must be extremely simple, at best they can be made to protect a specific location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01881))_
- Even walking alongside you as guards is too difficult for them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01881))_
- into undead, but to cast this on something larger than human size, you must consume additional mental power (points) to expand the effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01882))_
- The required mental power (points) increases in proportion with the size of the target ( _double_ for an ogre, _seven times_ for a chimera, and over _1000 times_ for a 20-meter long dragon!). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01882))_
- On the other hand, turning small animals into undead does not mean that they consume less mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01882))_
- A rough guideline is to set life scores to 1/2 for skeletons, and 3/2 for zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01883))_
- Other scores may not need to be changed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01883))_
- Details for non-human skeletons and zombies should be decided by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01883))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01876))_

> This spell's effect only works on those who have some degree of intelligence. At least, if you're not intelligent enough to use language, this spell cannot be cast on you.

### **[ Create Device ]**

- This is a spell that creates a mage's staff, which is a magical catalyst necessary for sorcerers to use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01887))_
- You can also use this spell to create a _magical catalyst_ other than a mage's staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01887))_
- All you need is a wooden staff of an appropriate length, and by casting this spell on that staff, you'll create a mage's staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01887))_

### Distance=Caster

### **[ Seal Enchantment ]**

- This spell is used on objects imbued with magical power to hide the presence of that magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01906))_
- For this reason, _Sense Magic_ or _Sense Aura_ will no longer be able to distinguish them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01906))_
- When discerning magic power with _Analyze Enchantment_ , you'll need a final score greater than or equal to the _Seal Enchantment_ that was cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01906))_
- Many of them are protected by _Seal Enchantment_ with a final score as high as 30 or greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01907))_
- Sometimes there are items from the ancient kingdom period that have this cast on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01907))_
- This spell has no effect when using the sage skill to appraise an item (however, if you don't think it has magical power, you might not try to appraise it). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01908))_
- This spell cannot be cast on living things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01908))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01899))_

> This is a clairvoyance spell, so to speak. By casting this spell, the caster can see things on the other side of obstacles such as walls, etc. as well as the interior of boxes, etc. As long as it's within the area of effect, the caster can adjust the desired range and distance they want to see at will. The clairvoyant information appears directly in your mind as an image, so you can still see even if the target location is closed in darkness.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01901))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=30

### **[ Steal Mind ]**

- Effect=Steals strike power 20 mental power from the target and gives it to the caster Type=Lost, damage (Mind-type, see description) Expansion=Final score, distance, targets, damage certainty Resist=Negated effect _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01914))_
- This spell allows you to steal mental power (points) from the target and make it your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01915))_
- First make a strike power 20 check to deal damage to the target, then the target's mental power (points) will be reduced while at the same time the caster's mental power (points) will be recovered by the same amount. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01915))_
- This also has no effect on opponents that do not have mental power (points), such as golems and skeletons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01915))_
- However, you cannot make your mental power (points) higher than your original score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01915))_
- Also, it has no effect at all if your opponent successfully resists. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01915))_
- This also has no effect on opponents that do not have mental power (points), such as golems and skeletons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01915))_

### **[ Haste ]**

- This is a spell that doubles the target's agility from its original score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01926))_
- Regarding the evasion speed (points) bonus, the effect differs depending on the target's original agility. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01926))_
- Please refer to Table 5-4: Haste: Agility and Evasion Bonuses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01926))_
- The target's action order and movement speed will be doubled, and their evasion speed (points) will also receive a bonus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01926))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01924))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=24 Distance=10 meters Area=One Duration=18 rounds Effect=Doubles the target's agility Type=Target score, physical ability Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01925))_

> Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01927))_

### **[ Rune Rope ]**

- However, since they can still move their mouth, they can speak and use holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01935))_
- If the target fails to resist, they will be bound by this rope and become completely unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01935))_
- Not even an ogre can break this magical rope. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01935))_
- The poor victim will be unable to take any actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01935))_
- Note that if the target succeeds on a resistance roll against this spell, it’ll have no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01936))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01937))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01937))_

> This spell creates an invisible magical rope, with the effect of binding the target. If the target fails to resist, they will be bound by this rope and become completely unable to move. The poor victim will be unable to take any actions. However, since they can still move their mouth, they can speak and use holy magic. Not even an ogre can break this magical rope.

### **7th Level Ancient Magic List**

### **[ Dispel Order ]**

- This spell nullifies the effects of the types of spells that give commands, such as _Quest_ , _Geas_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01946))_
- This spell nullifies the effects of the types of spells that give commands, such as _Quest_ , _Geas_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01946))_
- This spell can also cancel commands given to a golem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01947))_
- Once a golem has had its commands canceled, it becomes neutral and can be given new commands using the 9th level spell _Command Golem_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01947))_
- However, the final score of commands given during the ancient kingdom period is very high, so you'll need a final score of at least 30 or greater to cancel a golem's commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01947))_
- Once this spell fails, you cannot attempt it again until your magic power increases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01948))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01937))_

> This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01940))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=21

> Distance=Touch Area=One

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01942))_

> Duration=Instant Effect=Remove spells that enforce commands

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01943))_

> Type=Counters (Negates): All puppet and golem-type magic, _Geas_ , _Command Golem_ , _Quest_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01944))_

> Expansion=Final score

### **[ Telekinesis ]**

### **[ Blade Net ]**

- If a target fails to resist against this spell and attempts to act, they will suffer a _-4_ penalty on all success rolls because the net coiled around their body will hinder them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01981))_

### **[ Bend Bar ]**

- Most weapons have a bar-like part that can be bent to make them useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01991))_
- Since it only targets bar-shaped objects, shields and armor cannot be bent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01991))_
- This is a spell that bends bars. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01991))_
- A bar-shaped object is one that’s up to 10 cm thick and has a length to thickness ratio of 3 to 1 or greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01991))_
- The target bar will bend in the direction desired by the caster, regardless of the elasticity of the material. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01991))_
- Since it only targets bar-shaped objects, shields and armor cannot be bent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01991))_
- This magic’s effect cannot work on things that have already had magic cast on them or have life (or have undead life force). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-01992))_

### **[ Polymorph ]**

- Creatures that have already been transformed are also included in this limitation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02000))_
- Since they're not living things, undead and magical creatures are also impossible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02000))_
- The target will be completely transformed physically and will be able to use all of the creature's physical abilities after transformation (flying, breathing underwater, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02000))_

### **[ Illusionary Beast ]**

- This illusionary beast can only be seen by the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02018))_
- In the round in which the spell is cast, an illusionary beast will appear in front of the target, and begin attacking on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02018))_
- This attack can only target the person targeted by the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02018))_
- Effect=Attacks with an illusionary beast that can only be seen by the target Type=Illusion, target score Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets Resist=Negated effect As the name suggests, this is a spell that creates an illusionary beast to attack the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02018))_
- The attack will continue until the illusionary beast itself is defeated, this spell is removed, the duration expires, or the target dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02018))_
- Effect=Attacks with an illusionary beast that can only be seen by the target Type=Illusion, target score Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets Resist=Negated effect As the name suggests, this is a spell that creates an illusionary beast to attack the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02018))_

### **[ Force Field ]**

- Even if you fall from a very high place or a huge piece of rubble falls on you, you will still be wounded if the damage you receive exceeds 30 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02036))_
- However, it cannot prevent damage from pure magic, such as _Energy Bolt_ or _Fireball_ , nor damage from fire, acid, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02036))_
- The caster can also add their own damage reduction to this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02036))_
- As a result, most physical attacks should be nullified, but you will be wounded if your defense roll is _double ones_ , or if you receive _more_ than 30 points of damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02036))_
- This spell is invisible around the caster's body, moreover it creates a magical barrier that changes shape with the caster's movement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02036))_

### **[ Lightning Bind ]**

- Its strike power is 20. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02043))_
- _Lightning Bind_ is a spell that entangles the target in a net of electricity, completely sealing their movement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02043))_
- 80 reduced (following the rules for damage magic) and the target can move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02044))_
- However, in this case, they will take a -4 penalty to the final score of all success rolls, because they must fight against the pain and binding they receive from the electric net. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02044))_
- However, in this case, they will take a -4 penalty to the final score of all success rolls, because they must fight against the pain and binding they receive from the electric net. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02044))_
- You can determine the damage by rolling the dice each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02045))_

### **[ Wraith Form ]**

- The same applies if your body is destroyed (your life force or life points become 0 or less) while you are a wraith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_
- Wraiths are a kind of undead, but they can resume their life activities once they return to their own bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_
- If the wraith itself is destroyed, the caster dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_
- A caster who casts this spell will be able to separate their spiritual body from their physical body, allowing only their ethereal body to move around freely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_
- This ethereal body is called a wraith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_
- In this case, the body becomes nothing more than an empty husk without a soul, so it cannot be brought back to life by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_
- In this case, the body becomes nothing more than an empty husk without a soul, so it cannot be brought back to life by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02053))_

### **9th Level Ancient Magic List**

### **[ Command Golem ]**

- Golems in a state without commands are extremely rarely found, but may be found in the ruins of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_
- Moreover, the target golem must be in a state where _no_ commands have been given. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_
- It's only a spell that gives _commands_ to a golem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_
- This spell is ineffective on a golem that's _already_ following a command. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_
- This spell is _not_ a spell that creates golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_
- It's only a spell that gives _commands_ to a golem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_

### **[ Control Weather ]**

- Weather changes begin on the round you cast the spell, and the spell is completed in 10 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02069))_
- This spell is _non-removable_ , but if two _Control Weather_ spells are cast within the same area of effect, the one with the higher final score will take effect, and the one with the lower final score will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02069))_
- This is a spell that can change the weather within its area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02069))_
- This is a spell that can change the weather within its area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02069))_
- This spell is _non-removable_ , but if two _Control Weather_ spells are cast within the same area of effect, the one with the higher final score will take effect, and the one with the lower final score will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02069))_
- As the spell ends, the weather will return to its natural state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- It has nothing to do with the weather, season, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- However, effects caused by this spell will remain and cannot be removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- Weather you can change to includes sunny, cloudy, rainy, foggy, or snowy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- before the spell was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- However, effects caused by this spell will remain and cannot be removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- before the spell was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02070))_
- Below is a brief description of the extent of the weather. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02071))_
- Depending on the angle of the sun, the sun will shine during the day and the ground will be warm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02072))_
- _Sunny_ ： The sky within the area of effect will be completely clear of clouds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02072))_
- At night, you’ll be able to see the moon and stars. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02072))_
- _Sunny_ ： The sky within the area of effect will be completely clear of clouds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02072))_
- _Cloudy_ ： The sky within the area of effect is covered by clouds, hiding the sun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02073))_
- At night, the moon and stars will be hidden, making it a dark night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02073))_
- Since direct sunlight is blocked, the area becomes darker and the temperature on the ground decreases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02073))_
- _Cloudy_ ： The sky within the area of effect is covered by clouds, hiding the sun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02073))_
- In addition, rain will begin to fall at about 10 mm per hour, wetting the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02074))_
- _Rainy_ ： Rain clouds cover the sky, the conditions will be the same as cloudy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02074))_
- _Foggy_ ： Visibility within the area of effect is 5 meters or less for fog. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02075))_
- _Foggy_ ： Visibility within the area of effect is 5 meters or less for fog. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02075))_
- The surrounding temperature will drop to 0°celsius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02076))_
- In addition, snow will begin to fall at about 10 mm per hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02076))_
- _Snowy_ ： Snow clouds cover the sky, the conditions will be the same as cloudy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02076))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02062))_

This spell is ineffective on a golem that's _already_ following a command. Golems in a state without commands are extremely rarely found, but may be found in the ruins of the ancient kingdom.

### **[ Disintegrate ]**

- Targets who have this spell cast on them and fail to resist will, after a moment of brightness, be broken down into the smallest unit of matter they were composed of, literally disappearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02084))_
- It's impossible to regenerate a target that has become like this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02084))_
- Targets who have this spell cast on them and fail to resist will, after a moment of brightness, be broken down into the smallest unit of matter they were composed of, literally disappearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02084))_
- Usually it's limited to 1 cubic meter, but by expanding the volume, it's possible to cast it on a larger target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02086))_
- Usually it's limited to 1 cubic meter, but by expanding the volume, it's possible to cast it on a larger target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02086))_

### **[ Petrification ]**

- If it's removed with _Dispel Magic_ , etc., they will be revived in the same state they were before being petrified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_
- A petrified target will cease all life activity until they're released, so they will not age. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_
- However, if a petrified statue is destroyed in the meantime, it will be revived while broken apart at the time the spell is removed, so it will naturally die instantly (or suffer wounds or irreversible injury). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_
- Those who fail to resist this spell, no matter what they're made of, will instantly be turned to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_
- Only creatures with natural life (humans, plants, animals, mythical beasts, magical beasts, fae, youma, and daemons) can be targets of this spell, with the exception of magical creatures such as spirits, undead, and golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_
- Only creatures with natural life (humans, plants, animals, mythical beasts, magical beasts, fae, youma, and daemons) can be targets of this spell, with the exception of magical creatures such as spirits, undead, and golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_
- If it's removed with _Dispel Magic_ , etc., they will be revived in the same state they were before being petrified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02093))_

### **[ Rune Shield ]**

- This barrier has the effect of completely blocking magic from others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02101))_
- However, it cannot stop attacks other than magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02101))_
- You can attempt to remove it with _Dispel Magic_ , but all other possible spells will be blocked by this barrier, and cannot have any effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02101))_
- This is a spell that creates a magical barrier that glows white around the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02101))_
- Any spell effects that were applied to the caster will also be lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02101))_

### **10th Level Ancient Magic List**

### **[ Dimension Gate ]**

- A disc of the same shape will also appear above the destination. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02109))_
- The gate is a silver disc 5 meters in diameter, which appears on the floor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02109))_
- The disc can be penetrated like water, and those who jump into it will jump out of the other disc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02109))_
- There is no restriction on the travel distance, but the destination must be a place the caster knows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02110))_
- A normal _Dimension Gate_ lasts for only 3 minutes, but the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom knew the technique for fixing gates semi-permanently, and so used them as a way of moving between distant places or within labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02111))_
- A normal _Dimension Gate_ lasts for only 3 minutes, but the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom knew the technique for fixing gates semi-permanently, and so used them as a way of moving between distant places or within labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02111))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02101))_

### **[ Meteor Strike ]**

- Targets within the area of effect will be hit by shockwaves and fragments of the meteorite, suffering strike power 50 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_
- These rocks floating in the sky are called meteorites. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_
- The spell _Meteor Strike_ is a spell that allows the caster to control a meteorite (a very small one) at will, and make it fall to the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_
- The fact that there are countless unseen masses of rock floating in the sky is considered a matter of course among sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_
- These rocks fall to the ground at a rate of about once every hundred years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_
- The meteorite will fall the moment you finish the spell, causing a large explosion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_
- Targets within the area of effect will be hit by shockwaves and fragments of the meteorite, suffering strike power 50 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02135))_

## 5.1.13 Spirit Magic and the Shaman Skill

- Of course, its destructive power would be enough to destroy buildings and ramparts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02138))_
- The shaman skill allows you to use all basic abilities and spirit magic up to the caster's skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02142))_
- The skill for using spirit magic is called the _shaman skill_ , and those who have this skill are called _shamans_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02142))_
- **Silent spirit** are runes used to communicate with spirits and draw out the power controlled by those spirits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02142))_
- The skill for using spirit magic is called the _shaman skill_ , and those who have this skill are called _shamans_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02142))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02139))_

> Please note that this spell cannot be used unless you can see the sky (it has no effect if used inside a cave or dungeon).

### **Restrictions on Using 5.1.13.1 Spirit Magic**

- The basic rules for casting magic are the same, but the following conditions are required in order to use the shaman skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02144))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02149))_

> Therefore, you must not wear clothing or armor that severely restricts movement of your arms, and your fingers must be completely free.

### ⬤ **Wind Spirits**

- The spirit power of wind does not work inside buildings, deep caves, or even underground passages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02152))_
- It must be in a place where the wind blows in its natural state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02152))_
- The spirit power of wind does not work inside buildings, deep caves, or even underground passages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02152))_

### ⬤ **Earth Spirits**

- Particularly strong spirit power is at work in the mountains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02154))_
- Likewise, this spirit power does not work on the floors of buildings (whether they're stone or wood). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02154))_
- Since the power of water spirits is strong on the ocean floor and the bottoms of lakes, the spirit power of earth does not work there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02154))_
- This is a power that’s at work in places where the ground is exposed or underground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02154))_

### ⬤ **Water Spirits**

- The spirit power of water is at work wherever there is water, such as the ocean or a lake. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02156))_
- Even if you carry water in a water bottle, etc., if you open the lid, the spirit power will work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02156))_
- The spirit power of water is at work wherever there is water, such as the ocean or a lake. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02156))_

### ⬤ **Fire Spirits**

- You can also use fire from a torch you're carrying with you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02158))_
- This spirit power is at work wherever there’s fire burning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02158))_

### ⬤ **Ice Spirits**

- This spirit power is at work wherever there is snow or ice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02160))_

### ⬤ **Mind Spirits**

- Some of these types of spirits include those that control the nature of the mind, and those that control fluctuation of emotions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02162))_
- Of course if the caster him or herself is like that, there's no problem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02162))_
- This spirit power is at work wherever there are living things with functioning minds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02162))_
- It's said that if one emotion has too much of an outburst, it can cause phenomena such as alienation or complete loss of functions of other spirits, which can lead to mental disorders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02162))_
- It's said that if one emotion has too much of an outburst, it can cause phenomena such as alienation or complete loss of functions of other spirits, which can lead to mental disorders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02162))_

### ⬤ **Plant Spirits**

- Very strong power is at work in forests, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02164))_

### ⬤ **Other Spirits**

- Explanations of where these are at work can be found under each individual spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02166))_
- These are the spirits that control light, darkness, and life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02166))_

### **Basic Abilities of the 5.1.13.2 Shaman Skill**

- Shamans have the following basic abilities, which they can use without any restrictions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02168))_

### 《 **Infravision** 》

- However, you cannot see colors at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02170))_

### 《 **Sense Aura** 》

- This ability is used to know what kind of spirit power is at work in your surroundings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02172))_
- When a player declares that they will use this ability, the game master must tell the player what spirit power is at work in that location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02172))_
- Since there are spirits of life and spirits of undeath (which control negative life force), the sense aura ability can be used to distinguish between living things and undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02173))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02172))_

> You cannot use spells that belong to a specific spirit in places where that spirit power is not at work.

### 《 **Silent Spirit** 》

- These are runes used to communicate with spirits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02178))_
- Also, some fae are well versed in silent spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02178))_

> _Sense aura_ is a subtle sensation, more like what we can _smell_ than _see_ . Even if you know that spirit power is at work, you won't be able to tell where that spirit power is coming from unless you get very close. Also, if there's extremely strong spirit power in your surroundings, you may not be able to sense _weak_ spirit power at work.

### **[ Wind Voice ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)**

- Since it can be used to narrow the area of effect, it's also possible to communicate with just a single target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02188))_
- This spell has the effect of commanding a sylph to deliver air vibrations (sounds) to the caster without weakening them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02188))_
- Conversely, you can also transmit your voice to the location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02188))_
- As a result, you can specify a point in space within 500 meters and hear every conversation and sound exchanged within a radius of 5 meters from that point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02188))_
- As a result, you can specify a point in space within 500 meters and hear every conversation and sound exchanged within a radius of 5 meters from that point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02188))_
- Therefore, those in the path can hear the sounds carried by _Wind Voice_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02189))_
- There must always be a passage of wind between the target and the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02189))_
- Therefore, those in the path can hear the sounds carried by _Wind Voice_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02189))_

> This spell has the effect of commanding a sylph to deliver air vibrations (sounds) to the caster without weakening them. As a result, you can specify a point in space within 500 meters and hear every conversation and sound exchanged within a radius of 5 meters from that point. Conversely, you can also transmit your voice to the location. Since it can be used to narrow the area of effect, it's also possible to communicate with just a single target.

### **2nd Level Spirit Magic List**

### **[ Will-O-Wisp ]**

### **(Will-O-Wisp/Light Spirit)**

- If the will-o-wisp hits an opponent, the target will receive damage from the energy generated when the will-o-wisp disintegrates. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- This spirit can be easily destroyed by applying a small amount of force, and when it does, it emits powerful energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- The light can illuminate a space within a 5 meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- However, in places affected by the ancient magic _Darkness_ , the light emitted by a will-owisp will have no effect, and if it overlaps with the darkness created by a shade, they will negate each other's effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- When used for this purpose, a will-o-wisp disintegrates immediately, even during its duration. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- However, if it moves more than 20 meters away from the caster, they will no longer be able to control it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- The light can illuminate a space within a 5 meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02235))_
- Furthermore, if someone destroys a will-o-wisp with a weapon they're holding, the one who took that action will also suffer the same damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02236))_
- If a will-o-wisp itself comes into contact with a shade's body or enters the area of effect of _Darkness_ , it'll vanish without emitting any energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02237))_

### **[ Confusion ]**

### **(Leprechaun/Mind Spirit)**

- At this time, even if an ally casts magic on you in order to help you, you will consider it a _hostile_ act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02249))_
- As a result, you won't be able to take any assertive action, and will be completely unable to attack or use magic on your opponents. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02249))_
- If you have this spell cast on you and you fail to resist, you'll be unable to understand your current situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02249))_
- You'll also lose your ability to make accurate judgments. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02249))_
- Of course, this is not the case if _Confusion_ is removed by that magic's effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02249))_
- You can make similar judgments about those who cast magic on you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02249))_
- You can also cast _Dispel Magic_ , _Sanity_ , or other magic that belongs to _mind_ on yourself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02250))_
- Also, it doesn't mean you've become stupid, so you won't trust an opponent just because they yell _I'm your friend!_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02250))_
- Also, it doesn't mean you've become stupid, so you won't trust an opponent just because they yell _I'm your friend!_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02250))_

### **[ Shade ] (Shade/Dark Spirit)**

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02250))_

Also, it doesn't mean you've become stupid, so you won't trust an opponent just because they yell _I'm your friend!_ .

### Resist=Reduced effect

- The damage is _only_ dealt to mental power (points), the rest of the check is the same as for magic that deals normal damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- All natural light within a 5 meter radius of this spirit is negated, closing it in complete darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- Shade is the spirit of darkness that opposes will-o-wisp, and is also the spirit that controls fear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- The darkness created by a shade has no effect in a space where the ancient magic _Light_ is at work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- If mental power (points) becomes 0 or negative, the target loses consciousness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- This has no physical effect, but it impairs mental activity and has the effect of reducing mental power (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- In addition, if the light emitted by a will-owisp and the darkness produced by a shade overlap, the powers of both will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- Furthermore, if an opponent destroys a shade with a weapon they're holding, the one who took that action will also suffer the same damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- The shade is also very fragile and will easily disintegrate with the slightest force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- All natural light within a 5 meter radius of this spirit is negated, closing it in complete darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_
- If a shade itself comes into contact with a will-o-wisp's body or enters the area of effect of the ancient magic _Light_ , it'll vanish without emitting any energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02261))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02260))_

> The shade will fly freely in the air according to the caster's commands, but can no longer be controlled if it moves more than 20 meters away from the caster.

### **[ Fanaticism ]**

### **(Valkyrie/Mind Spirit)**

- This can be cast on others, but the target can attempt to resist the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02265))_
- However, as a recoil, you will suffer a -2 penalty to your evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02265))_
- As a result, you can add a +2 bonus to attack power (points) in combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02265))_
- This spell cannot be cast _by_ women. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02266))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02265))_

> _Fanaticism_ heightens the courage of the target to the utmost limit, completely erasing fear. As a result, you can add a +2 bonus to attack power (points) in combat. However, as a recoil, you will suffer a -2 penalty to your evasion speed (points). This can be cast on others, but the target can attempt to resist the spell.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02264))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=6 Distance=10 meters Area=One Duration=18 rounds Effect=Raise the target's spirit Type=Mind Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets Resist=Negated effect

### **[ Forget ]**

### **(Leprechaun/Mind Spirit)**

- _Only_ featherfolk (fae) and gremlins (youma) can use it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02273))_
- Among sages, the reason for this is thought to be that the spell doesn't just require a hand, but a _wing_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02273))_
- This spell is used by borrowing the power of a leprechaun, but humans and elves cannot use it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02273))_
- Those who have this spell cast on them will lose their memory, and be unable to make normal decisions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02274))_
- A gremlin casting this spell on a pegasus carrying the hero Grax, and flinging Grax off of it, is a very well-known tragic episode in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02274))_
- You will no longer be able to remember your name, where you were born and raised, or your friends and colleagues, but you will still be able to use language, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02275))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02269))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=8

### **The Tragedy of the Hero Grax**

- _Around 200 years ago, a kingdom by the_ _name of Zanty flourished in western Alecrast._ _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02277))_
- _In that kingdom, there was a knight named Grax who was hailed as a hero by all for protecting the kingdom from the invasion of the "Land of Chaos"._ _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02278))_
- This is worthy of special mention even among the many tales of bravery passed down in Alecrast._ _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02279))_
- _Legend has it that Grax, astride a pegasus, single-handedly defeated hundreds of enemy soldiers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02279))_

### **3rd Level Spirit Magic List [ Invisibility ] (Sprite/Mind Spirit)**

- If you cast _Invisibility_ during combat and then attempt to cancel it voluntarily (in order to take another action), by the definition of _focus_ magic, at the beginning of that round, you _must_ declare it when no one has yet made their action announcements. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02294))_
- Therefore, you _cannot_ attack unopposed or use magic _However, Grax's end was a pitiful one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02294))_

- After emerging victorious from a battle, he was on his way back to report to the kingdom ahead of the others, when he encountered a lone gremlin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02294))_

### **[ Control Spirit ] (Various lesser spirits)**

- Area=One lesser spirit Duration=Permanent Effect=Summon and control one type of spirit Type=Target score Counter (Overpowers): _Full Control Spirit_ Countered (Overpowered) By: _Full Control Spirit_ Expansion=Final score, distance Resist=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02305))_
- This is a spell that summons a spirit and lets you control it as your servant (you're free to call it your friend). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02306))_
- Of course, it can only be summoned in a place where spirit power is at work, and summoning also requires a three-hour magical ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02306))_
- The only spirits you can summon are those that belong to the lesser spirits (monster level 4 or lower). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02306))_
- Of course, it can only be summoned in a place where spirit power is at work, and summoning also requires a three-hour magical ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02306))_
- The only spirits you can summon are those that belong to the lesser spirits (monster level 4 or lower). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02306))_
- It cannot attack others directly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- A shaman can only control one kind of spirit at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- It is up to the game master's discretion to decide what kind of item the spirit will be sealed in (for example, an undine in a water bag, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- A controlled spirit can communicate with its caster using silent spirit, and will carry out simple commands, but cannot do much. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- Spirits that have been successfully summoned and controlled can be sealed in items, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- A shaman can only control one kind of spirit at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- It is up to the game master's discretion to decide what kind of item the spirit will be sealed in (for example, an undine in a water bag, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02307))_
- The biggest advantage of controlling spirits is that you can cast spirit magic that belongs to them, even in places where spirit power would not normally be at work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02308))_
- It’s always possible to release a controlled spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02308))_
- A controlled spirit can only be used by its controller. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02308))_
- A controlled spirit can only be used by its controller. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02308))_
- The main spirits that can be controlled are gnome (earth spirits), undine (water spirits), salamander (fire spirits), sylph (wind spirits), brownie (building spirits), leprechaun (mind spirits), sprite (mind spirits), etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02309))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02304))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=15 Distance=10 meters

### **[ Silence ]**

### **(Sylph/Wind Spirit)**

- This spell has the effect of stopping the movement of air and muffling all sounds within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02314))_
- If you fail to resist, you won't make a sound even if you cast a spell, so you won't be able to use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02314))_
- This spell has the effect of stopping the movement of air and muffling all sounds within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02314))_
- Once you move out of the area of effect, you’ll be able to make sound again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02315))_
- If they fail, they will no longer be able to generate sounds or voices within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02316))_
- If someone who was _outside_ the spell's area of effect when it was cast later _enters_ the area of effect, they must make a resistance check at that point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02316))_
- If they fail, they will no longer be able to generate sounds or voices within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02316))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02312))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=15 Distance=30 meters Area=A space with a 5 meter radius Duration=18 rounds Effect=Muffle all sound within the area of effect

### **(Gnome/Earth Spirit)**

- Those who fail to resist will be unable to take any actions for 18 rounds and will suffer a -4 modifier to their evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02329))_
- The target score equals the magic intensity or final score from when the magic was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02329))_
- Targets that successfully resist are not affected in any way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02329))_
- Targets within the area of effect will become entangled in those plants and be unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02329))_
- Targets within the area of effect will become entangled in those plants and be unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02329))_

### **[ Mute ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)**

- This spell differs from _Silence_ in that it can be used on an individual to silence only the voices and sounds _they_ make. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02344))_
- However, they will no longer be able to use spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02344))_
- The target can hear sounds from outside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02344))_
- Those under the influence of this spell can act without making any sound at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02344))_
- This spell differs from _Silence_ in that it can be used on an individual to silence only the voices and sounds _they_ make. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02344))_

### **[ Tunnel ] (Gnome/Earth Spirit)**

- The effect of this spell can be expanded regarding the size of the hole being made (target volume). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02371))_
- This spell allows you to create holes up to 10 meters in length. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02371))_
- Expansion=Final score, duration, target score Resist=Special (see description) This is a spell that creates a hole with a 1 meter radius in walls and ground made of stone or earth, as well as the sides and ceilings of caves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02371))_
- In other words, you can't open holes in two walls with one spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02371))_
- However, if the wall is less than 10 meters thick, the spell's effect ends there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02371))_
- Also, this spell has absolutely no effect on walls made of wood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02372))_
- If this spell is used at the feet of a human, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02373))_
- If the resist is successful, the hole will open, but those on top will be able to immediately jump out of the way and prevent themselves from falling into the hole (assuming they have a place to escape, of course). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02373))_
- those present can attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02373))_
- If the resist fails, the hole will open slowly and they will not suffer damage from the fall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02373))_
- At this time, those at the bottom of the hole will _not_ be buried alive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02374))_
- This is because the bottom of the hole will rise back up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02374))_
- Once the duration has expired, the hole will slowly return to its original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02374))_
- This is because the bottom of the hole will rise back up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02374))_
