### **6th Level Spirit Magic List**

### **[ Control Sound ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)**

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02443))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=24

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02444))_

> Distance=Caster

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02445))_

> Area=A space within a 30 meter radius from the caster

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02446))_

> Duration=Until focus ends

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02447))_

> Effect=Manipulate the echoes of sounds within the area of effect Type=Focus Countered (Overpowered) By: _Silence_ Expansion=Final score, area Resist=Negated effect

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02448))_

> When you cast this spell, you can control the echoes of any sound that occurs within a 30 meter radius around the caster, no matter what it may be. You can make it so that only certain people can hear specific sounds, or conversely, you can make them inaudible. Any number of people can be targeted and made to hear or not hear sounds, as long as they're within the area of effect. Moreover, the targets can be chosen completely at the caster's discretion. For example, you can let your allies hear a spellsong that raises their morale without giving the enemy an advantage, or you can have secret conversations in a crowded place full of people while staying separate. However, the caster who is focusing the spell can only control _one_ type of sound source at a time. If the caster desires, they can also switch the sound source they control each round.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02448))_

> You can make it so that only certain people can hear specific sounds, or conversely, you can make them inaudible.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02448))_

You can make it so that only certain people can hear specific sounds, or conversely, you can make them inaudible. Any number of people can be targeted and made to hear or not hear sounds, as long as they're within the area of effect. Moreover, the targets can be chosen completely at the caster's discretion. **Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02449))_

### **[ Spirit Wall ]**

- Some walls may block your gaze, preventing attacks from spells and projectiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02453))_
- This spell has the effect of creating a wall in a specified area using certain spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02453))_
- The wall is normally 0.5 meters thick, but you can consume extra mental power to expand the target size and make it thicker (as long as you do not change the length or height of the wall, the thickness will increase as the expansion rate increases). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02454))_
- Walls can be negated by _Dispel Magic_ or _Suppress Elemental_ , or countered by the opposing _Spirit Wall_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02454))_
- Furthermore, once a wall is put up, it _cannot_ be moved or removed by the caster's will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02455))_
- The types of spells are divided by the lesser spirits that control them, and the walls created by each spell each have different characteristics depending on their spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02455))_
- You cannot build a wall where other materials such as rocks, trees, or living things already exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02455))_
- You cannot build a wall where other materials such as rocks, trees, or living things already exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02455))_

### **Spirit Wall: Wisp**

### (Will-O-Wisp/Light Spirit)

- The wall of light is not a solid entity, but a collection of will-o-wisps themselves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02460))_
- At this time, make a resistance roll, and if you fail, you will suffer strike power 10 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02460))_
- The glow from the wall is so intense that you can't look directly at it (so your gaze won't pass through it). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02460))_
- However, if you touch the wall or try to pass through it, you will destroy the will-o-wisps forming the wall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02460))_
- The wall of light has no way to prevent objects from passing through it, so you can pass through it without any resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02460))_
- Therefore, the space on either side of the wall of light is illuminated with a brightness like midday. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02460))_

- A wall of light cannot be put up within the area of effect of the ancient magic _Darkness_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02464))_
- It is possible to pass through, but upon touching the wall or trying to pass through it, you will be rammed by the salamander and suffer strike power 10 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02465))_
- A wall of fire cannot be seen through. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02465))_

### **Spirit Wall: Undine**

### (Undine/Water Spirit)

- Counters (Negates): _Spirit Wall: Salamander_ Countered (Negated) By: _Spirit Wall: Salamander_ _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02469))_
- A wall of fire cannot be destroyed by physical means or magic that deals damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02470))_
- A wall of fire cannot be destroyed by physical means or magic that deals damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02470))_
- You cannot escape on your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- Undine is waiting inside the water wall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- Water walls do not obstruct your gaze, but projectiles cannot pass through them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- A wall made of water can't be destroyed by physical means or even magic that deals damage, as it quickly compensates for any damaged areas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- Anything that attempts to touch or pass through the wall must attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- Moreover, any rescuers must also be able to get inside the wall in order to save those that have been swallowed up by it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- Those inside the wall will automatically drown after a number of rounds equal to their life force (points) have elapsed, unless rescued from the outside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_
- A wall made of water can't be destroyed by physical means or even magic that deals damage, as it quickly compensates for any damaged areas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02472))_

### **Spirit Wall: Shade**

### (Shade/Dark Spirit)

- The wall itself is pitch black, and the space up to 5 meters on either side of the wall will also be closed in darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02479))_

### **Spirit Wall: Sylph**

### (Sylph/Wind Spirit)

- If you succeed, you will be able to pass through the wall without incident, but if you fail, you will be blown away in the opposite direction from the wall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02490))_
- When you chant the spell, a wild gust of wind comes out of nowhere and begins swirling in the same place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02490))_
- Those that touch the wall or try to pass through it must attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02490))_
- The storm wall cannot be destroyed by physical methods or magic that deals damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02490))_
- The storm wall is transparent, so it won't block your gaze, but all projectile attacks, including those from _Shoot Arrow_ , will be deflected in front of you by the sylphs lurking in the wind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02490))_

### **[ Decrease Water Pressure ] (Undine/Water Spirit)**

- All water pressure exerted on the body by the spell will be alleviated regardless of its strength, and reduced to a point where normal actions are no longer a problem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02515))_
- Targets under this spell are saved from the effects of water pressure when diving deep underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02515))_
- In addition, to actually dive, it is essential to use _Water Breathing_ in order to be able to breathe underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02516))_

### **[ Preserve Sound ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)**

- It secures a sylph in place and allows it to transmit recorded sounds to others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- However, in order to specify a specific person, the caster must be familiar with the person's features and appearance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- It's also _not_ possible to use this to record spells and activate them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- You can optionally determine the person to whom the sound is transmitted to some extent, such as the first person to step into that space. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- This spell has the effect of recording a sound and transmitting it to a specific location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- Also, at the same time you cast the spell, you must also generate the sound you want to transmit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- You can optionally determine the person to whom the sound is transmitted to some extent, such as the first person to step into that space. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02523))_
- Once the sound is transmitted, the effect of this spell vanishes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02524))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02516))_

> In addition, to actually dive, it is essential to use _Water Breathing_ in order to be able to breathe underwater.

### **7th Level Spirit Magic List [ Windstorm ]**

### **(Djinn/Greater Wind Spirit)**

- Anyone except the caster within the spell's area of effect, or who attempts to enter the tornado during the spell's duration must attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02532))_
- Those who successfully resist will move at half their normal movement speed (there is no change in their action order) and can take actions with a -2 penalty on success rolls such as attack, evasion, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02532))_
- However, those who fail to resist are slammed to the ground and can only move 3 meters per round while crawling on the ground for the duration of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02532))_
- in this state, all will suffer a -4 penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02532))_
- However, those who fail to resist are slammed to the ground and can only move 3 meters per round while crawling on the ground for the duration of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02532))_
- Anyone except the caster within the spell's area of effect, or who attempts to enter the tornado during the spell's duration must attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02532))_

- The cutting damage continues to have an effect until the target leaves the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02533))_
- Objects weighing less than 10 kilograms or equipment held in the hand or not securely attached to the body will be blown out of the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02533))_
- Damage is determined by making a strike roll each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02533))_

### **[ Crack ] (Behemoth/Greater Earth Spirit)**

- Effect=Trap the target between a crack in the ground, dealing strike power 30 damage Type=Damage (Earthquake-type) Expansion=Final score, distance, targets, target volume, damage certainty Resist=Negated effect _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02536))_
- If you successfully resist the spell, you will avoid being swallowed by the crack and will not be affected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- When trapped in the ground, there is a - 4 penalty to attack power (points) and evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- This is a spell that creates deep cracks, causing the ground underfoot to cave in, and swallowing the target in a deep chasm created this way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- Then, by being crushed between the bedrock, they will suffer strike power 30 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- If a target falls into the cracks, they will first be buried in the ground up to their chest, and then be caught between the closing bedrock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- The effect of the spell is momentary, but once something is swallowed up by the crack, it cannot climb out of it on its own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- It remains trapped in the crack until someone else pulls it out, which takes one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- If a target falls into the cracks, they will first be buried in the ground up to their chest, and then be caught between the closing bedrock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- Then, by being crushed between the bedrock, they will suffer strike power 30 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02537))_
- Note that this spell can also be used on targets larger than human size by expanding its effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02538))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02533))_

> Additionally, the tornado creates a vacuum that cuts the skin and flesh of those within its area of effect, dealing strike power 10 damage. The cutting damage continues to have an effect until the target leaves the area of effect. Damage is determined by making a strike roll each round. Only the first attempt to resist this spell counts. Objects weighing less than 10 kilograms or equipment held in the hand or not securely attached to the body will be blown out of the area of effect.

### **[ Valkyrie Blessing ] (Valkyrie/Mind Spirit)**

- Any damage is first absorbed by this protective light, so until it vanishes, virtually no damage can be dealt directly to the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02546))_
- When the protection runs out, any damage beyond that (such as suffering 20 damage when the protection has only 10 remaining) will not reach the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02546))_
- The protective light absorbs all damage up to 50 points in total, whether it's caused by weapons or by magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02546))_

### **[ Plant Shell ] (Ent/Greater Plant Spirit)**

- The dome serves as a tent that protects from the elements and as a temporary shelter when a suitable campsite cannot be found. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02553))_

- The inside of the dome is covered with a carpet of soft fresh grass, making it moderately warm and moderately cool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02553))_

### **[ Full Control Spirit ] (Various lesser spirits)**

- Counters (Overpowers): _Control Spirit_ Countered (Overpowered) By: _Control Spirit_ Expansion=Final score, distance Resist=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02559))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02555))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=35 Distance=10 meters

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02556))_

> Area=One lesser spirit Duration=Permanent

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02558))_

> Effect=Summon different types of spirits and take complete control of them Type=Target score

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02560))_

> This is a spell used to summon and control lesser spirits, and is an advanced _Control Spirit_ spell. By casting this spell, a caster can control the spirits according to their own will. Same as _Control Spirit_ , spirits that have been successfully summoned and controlled can be sealed in items, etc. It is the same as _Control Spirit_ in that it requires a three-hour ritual, only one type of spirit can be controlled at a time, and it is possible to communicate in silent spirit. However, the biggest difference from _Control Spirit_ is that it can ignore the spirit's will and force the caster's commands. Depending on the nature (intelligence and habits) of the controlled spirit, it can be made to carry out fairly complex and advanced commands. For example, you can command a sylph to create a cloud of dust to blind your enemies, or a salamander to set fire to the roofs of a row of houses one by one. It is up to the caster to decide what kind of command to give. You can also command others to attack, which is not possible with a lower level spell. However, if you command a spirit to do something that is too contrary to its true nature, the spirit may disappear after carrying out the command. For detailed characteristics and details of the controlled spirits, please refer to 13.2.4: Spirits (see p. 181) Please note that it is not possible to use both the _Control Spirit_ and _Full Control Spirit_ spells to control different spirits. In this case, the effect of the previously cast spell will vanish.

### **8th Level Spirit Magic List [ Ice Coffin ]**

### **(Fenrir/Greater Ice Spirit)**

- Although it cannot be cast on opponents who are too large to fit into the ice pillar, you can increase the size of the ice pillar by expanding the effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02567))_
- This spell instantly condenses moisture in the air, creating a pillar of ice 1 meter wide and 2 meters high, which can trap your opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02567))_
- If the opponent successfully resists, the ice pillar will vanish before it’s completed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02567))_
- If the opponent successfully resists, the ice pillar will vanish before it’s completed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02567))_

- Although they're in a state of suspended animation and their life force (points) is 0, they're _not_ dead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02569))_
- If the temperature is below freezing, it will not melt permanently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02569))_
- Even if your friends are trapped in an ice pillar, it is extremely dangerous to attempt to destroy it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02570))_
- This is because there is a risk that your friends who are packed in the ice will also be destroyed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02570))_
- This is because there is a risk that your friends who are packed in the ice will also be destroyed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02570))_

### **[ Nightmare ] (Incubus, Succubus/Dream Spirit)**

- If the ritual is interrupted, even for one night, the spell's effect is completely lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- At this time, the contents of the nightmare the opponent sees can be chosen as desired by the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- This spell has no distance restrictions, but the target must be someone the caster knows personally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- Also, the ritual must be continued overnight with undivided attention from sunset until dawn. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- Thus, the dream spirit controlled in this way enters the opponent's dreams and causes them to have nightmares. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- This ritual must be performed every night until the target becomes weak and dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- The spell begins when the target goes to sleep, while the caster remains awake and focuses on controlling the dream spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- This is a spell that uses a dream spirit to send nightmares into the target's sleep, cursing your opponent to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- Thus, the dream spirit controlled in this way enters the opponent's dreams and causes them to have nightmares. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02597))_
- If they fail, their mental power (points) will decrease by 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02598))_
- Also, regardless of whether the resist succeeded or failed, they will no longer be able to recover their mental power (points) by _any_ means (it will _only_ recover once the spell's effect is removed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02598))_
- The target of the spell must attempt to resist daily. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02598))_
- Also, regardless of whether the resist succeeded or failed, they will no longer be able to recover their mental power (points) by _any_ means (it will _only_ recover once the spell's effect is removed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02598))_
- If their mental power (points) reaches 0 due to the spell's reduction, the person will fall into a coma, and die if the ritual continues for one more week. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02599))_
- The spell's effect will never disappear until the ritual is interrupted for some reason or it is negated with _Remove Curse_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02599))_

> To chant this spell, you'll need a large forest dense enough to confuse the target. Anyone within the area of effect when the spell is cast, or who enters within the area of effect during the duration of the spell, must make a resistance roll. If you fail, you will be fooled by the illusion caused by the deep forest and the scenery that looks the same everywhere, and you will unknowingly continue to circle around the forest within the area of effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02613))_

> If several are acting at the same time and only _some_ successfully resist, those who resisted can _see_ those who could _not_ resist, but those who could _not_ resist will quickly _lose_ sight of their allies.

## 5.1.15 Holy Magic and the Priest Skill

- **Holy prayers** are runes used to contact the great beings, the _gods_ , and use that power as a source to perform various miracles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02654))_
- There are many gods in _Sword World_ , each drawing worship from humans and other intelligent races. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02654))_
- This is because their words enter the mind as highly complex symbols. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- In order to use **holy magic** , you need to have enough faith to be able to hear the voices of the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- Runes called holy prayers were created during the ancient kingdom period as a means to give words to this and cause miracles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- The gods' thought form is completely different from humans, therefore humans cannot fully understand it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- The gods' thought form is completely different from humans, therefore humans cannot fully understand it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- This is because their words enter the mind as highly complex symbols. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- Runes called holy prayers were created during the ancient kingdom period as a means to give words to this and cause miracles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02655))_
- In addition, each holy magic has _special_ spells that can only be used by believers of a specific god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02656))_
- The caster uses these holy prayers to pray to the gods and activate the power of the spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02656))_
- Those spells _cannot_ be used by members of other sects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02656))_
- In addition, each holy magic has _special_ spells that can only be used by believers of a specific god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02656))_
- The skill for using holy magic is called the _priest skill_ , and those who have the priest skill are called _priests_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02657))_
- The skill for using holy magic is called the _priest skill_ , and those who have the priest skill are called _priests_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02657))_
- Among the many gods that exist in Forcelia, there are also those called **wicked gods** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02658))_
- The teachings of these wicked gods are extremely inconvenient for protecting human society, and many of them threaten the lives and property of others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02658))_
- Because of their anti-social nature, the followers of these wicked gods tend to be abhorred, and the magic used by the followers of these wicked gods is called **dark magic** and is distinguished from holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02658))_
- Because of their anti-social nature, the followers of these wicked gods tend to be abhorred, and the magic used by the followers of these wicked gods is called **dark magic** and is distinguished from holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02658))_
- 96 priests of the wicked gods are not called priests, but **dark priests** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02659))_
- If you role-play according to the wicked gods' teachings, there is a high possibility that it will soon lead to the destruction of not only that PC, but also the party. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02660))_
- Game masters should _not_ allow characters to become priests of wicked gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02660))_
- If you role-play according to the wicked gods' teachings, there is a high possibility that it will soon lead to the destruction of not only that PC, but also the party. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02660))_

### **[ Freeze ]**

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02627))_

> Area=One

### Duration=Instant

- This spell cannot exert its original effect on things that do not have living bodies with blood flowing through them, such as undead, golems, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02632))_
- and can only freeze the surface of their bodies and render them unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02632))_
- This spell has the effect of completely freezing the target instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02632))_
- If you successfully resist the spell, there will be no effect, but if you fail, all life activities will cease and you will die immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02632))_
- and can only freeze the surface of their bodies and render them unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02632))_
- This spell cannot exert its original effect on things that do not have living bodies with blood flowing through them, such as undead, golems, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02632))_
- Those killed by this spell will _not_ come back to life even when thawed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02633))_

### **[ Maelstrom ]**

### **(Kraken/Greater Water Spirit)**

- This is a spell that creates a large whirlpool on the surface of the water, dragging everything floating within its range and sinking it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02640))_
- The spell's effect can work on anything that can fit inside the whirlpool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02640))_
- To cast this spell, a sea or lake with a depth of at least 100 meters is essential. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02640))_
- The spell's effect can work on anything that can fit inside the whirlpool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02640))_
- This is a spell that creates a large whirlpool on the surface of the water, dragging everything floating within its range and sinking it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02640))_
- If successful, the ship will be able to safely survive the whirlpool, but if you fail, it will be swallowed up by the whirlpool and sink into the water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02641))_
- The target score is the final score from when the spell was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02641))_
- The baseline score is _sailor skill level/adventurer level + dexterity bonus_ for a small ship, and _sailor skill level + intelligence bonus_ for a large ship. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02641))_
- In that case, make a success roll using the _swim_ ability to determine whether you drown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02642))_
- If the ship is swallowed up by the whirlpool, everyone on board will be thrown into the whirlpool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02642))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02636))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=45 Distance=500 meters

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02637))_

> Area=50 meter radius water surface Duration=18 rounds

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02638))_

> Effect=Creates a maelstrom that sinks floating people and objects Type=Target score Counters (Overpowers): _Current_ Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, area

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02639))_

> Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02641))_

> If a ship is caught in the whirlpool, the person at the helm must make a success roll using the _ship steering_ ability.

### **[ Neutralize Elemental ] (Various greater spirits)**

- Effect=Appeal to the greater spirits to neutralize spirit power Type=Target score Counters (Overpowers): All magic that uses related spirit power Expansion=Final score, duration, area Resist=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02648))_
- However, only one type of spirit power can be neutralized _at_ a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_
- Even if you expand this spell and use it, you _cannot_ neutralize two or more types of spirit power at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_
- This spell appeals to a greater spirit and completely neutralizes _one_ type of spirit power within its area of effect for a limited time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_
- This is the same even if multiple casters attempt it (only _one_ type of spirit power can be neutralized in _one_ space). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_
- This spell appeals to a greater spirit and completely neutralizes _one_ type of spirit power within its area of effect for a limited time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_
- This is the same even if multiple casters attempt it (only _one_ type of spirit power can be neutralized in _one_ space). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_
- However, only one type of spirit power can be neutralized _at_ a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02649))_

- This spell's restrictions include the caster him or herself who appealed to the greater spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02650))_
- Within the area of effect, any spirit magic that depends on the neutralized spirit power will no longer be able to be used, and any magic that had an effect will be canceled immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02650))_
- This also applies to spirits sealed with spells such as _Control Spirit_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02650))_

### **Restrictions on Using 5.1.15.1 Holy Magic**

- Also, a priest who loses _faith_ immediately loses their priest skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02662))_
- However, this action must be in accordance with the _will_ of the god you believe in. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02662))_
- There are no restrictions on armor or weapons to use the priest skill, and priests can cast magic simply by chanting holy prayers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02662))_

> There are no restrictions on armor or weapons to use the priest skill, and priests can cast magic simply by chanting holy prayers. However, this action must be in accordance with the _will_ of the god you believe in. If you try to use magic for a purpose that is far _removed_ from the god's will, it may not work at all. Also, a priest who loses _faith_ immediately loses their priest skill.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02663))_

> Those with the priest skill must choose only _one_ god to worship.

### **5.1.15.2 The Six Major Gods**

- Among the gods of Alecrast, the six most powerful gods (and those with the greatest number of believers) are called the **six major gods** . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02665))_
- These six major gods almost always have temples in most towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02665))_
- These six major gods are **Pharis (the supreme god)** , the guardian of order and law, **Phalaris (the dark god)** , who rules over destruction and chaos, **Myrii (the god of war)** , the guardian of war and victory, **Rahda (the god of knowledge)** , who rules over wisdom and knowledge, **Cha Za (the god of trade)** , who is the god of luck and commerce, and **Marfa (the earth mother)** , the goddess of nature and agriculture, and the protector of marriage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02666))_

### 《 **Pharis** 》

- Also, he especially dislikes undead, monsters created by magic, or summoned from other planes as they’re impure (this is a characteristic common to most gods except wicked gods). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02669))_
- It’s up to the game master to decide what is fair, but assault, murder, and for that matter, theft for fun, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02669))_
- His ardent believers include members of the ruling class such as kings, aristocrats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02669))_
- Pharis's teachings are for people to act in an orderly manner and to achieve unchanging _justice_ in the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02669))_
- Also, he especially dislikes undead, monsters created by magic, or summoned from other planes as they’re impure (this is a characteristic common to most gods except wicked gods). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02669))_
- His ardent believers include members of the ruling class such as kings, aristocrats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02669))_

### 《 **Myrii** 》

- He only supports righteous conflict, so he will not lend his strength to fights that are just for the sake of stealing or simply killing one another. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02671))_
- His believers are knights and mercenaries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02671))_
- He only supports righteous conflict, so he will not lend his strength to fights that are just for the sake of stealing or simply killing one another. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02671))_

### 《 **Rahda** 》

- He teaches an intelligent way of life, and his doctrine is that if all things are wise, the world will be well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02673))_
- He doesn't have many restrictions, but he tends to dislike barbaric behavior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02673))_
- It seems that he has many believers among sages and sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02673))_

### 《 **Cha Za** 》

- He teaches that happiness can be achieved through conversation and interaction between people, such as through trade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02675))_
- Although he prohibits stealing, it's okay to claim something that doesn't have an obvious owner (such as lost property or treasure in ruins) as your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02675))_
- He also denies closed-minded thinking. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02675))_
- His believers are the citizens living in towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02675))_
- He teaches that happiness can be achieved through conversation and interaction between people, such as through trade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02675))_
- Although he prohibits stealing, it's okay to claim something that doesn't have an obvious owner (such as lost property or treasure in ruins) as your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02675))_

### 《 **Marfa** 》

- She particularly encourages farming and hunting, which are basic activities indispensable for human survival. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02677))_
- This is different from the concept of nature-worship, and her ideal is for humans to be in their natural state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02677))_
- Her doctrine is expressed in the words _be natural_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02677))_
- It seems that she has many believers among the poor, farmers, and hunters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02677))_

### 《 **Phalaris (Wicked God)** 》

- Game masters should _not_ allow player characters to worship this god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02679))_
- Phalaris is a _wicked god_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02679))_
- Followers of Phalaris recognize all desires inherent in the individual and affirm any means necessary to enhance one's own existence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- It is clear that those who follow these doctrines must eventually become wicked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- Although there is no shortage of believers, it seems they often remain hidden in order to protect their own position. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- He teaches that it is okay to do something, even if it means destruction or murder, as long as it is for your own benefit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- What his followers aim for is complete freedom, and they dislike succumbing to the constraints of law, order, and morality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- Followers of Phalaris recognize all desires inherent in the individual and affirm any means necessary to enhance one's own existence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- What his followers aim for is complete freedom, and they dislike succumbing to the constraints of law, order, and morality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- He teaches that it is okay to do something, even if it means destruction or murder, as long as it is for your own benefit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02680))_
- Temples of Phalaris often exist in large towns, but because he is considered a wicked god, they are confined to basements and secluded forests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02681))_
- However, the _kingdom of chaos_ **Phandria** , located in the central plains region, has Phalaris as its state religion, and the largest Phalaris temple in Alecrast is built there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02681))_
- However, the _kingdom of chaos_ **Phandria** , located in the central plains region, has Phalaris as its state religion, and the largest Phalaris temple in Alecrast is built there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02681))_
- Temples of Phalaris often exist in large towns, but because he is considered a wicked god, they are confined to basements and secluded forests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02681))_
- However, this does _not_ mean that everything is forgivable, so game masters should only 97 confiscate the priest skill when the character repeatedly commits unjust acts or shows no remorse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_
- Therefore, players and game masters should use common sense when making judgments, rather than forcefully twisting the doctrine or interpreting it too rigidly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_
- These teachings are not formal, but express inner thinking. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_
- The gods see everything, but they also see from a vast perspective at the same time, so unless it's a very extreme act, they will not abandon a priest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_
- Therefore, players and game masters should use common sense when making judgments, rather than forcefully twisting the doctrine or interpreting it too rigidly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_
- However, this does _not_ mean that everything is forgivable, so game masters should only 97 confiscate the priest skill when the character repeatedly commits unjust acts or shows no remorse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_
- The gods see everything, but they also see from a vast perspective at the same time, so unless it's a very extreme act, they will not abandon a priest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02682))_

### **5.1.15.3 Other Gods**

- Player characters cannot worship wicked gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02684))_
- In addition to the six major gods, the following gods are also worshiped in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02684))_
- Among these are wicked gods whose teachings are to bring disaster to the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02684))_

### 《 **Fenes** 》

- During the war of the gods, it is said that he did not join the forces of darkness _nor_ the forces of light led by his older brother Pharis, choosing instead to take the position of king of the _neutral_ gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02686))_
- Belief in him is not popular in Alecrast, and he has almost no temples. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02686))_
- It is sometimes said that he is the true form of the _Nameless God of Madness_ (a wicked god, explained later), and he is also said to be the god of beastmen such as werewolves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02686))_
- Fenes is the younger brother of the supreme god Pharis, and is said to govern _things that repeat_ (cycles). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02686))_
- It is sometimes said that he is the true form of the _Nameless God of Madness_ (a wicked god, explained later), and he is also said to be the god of beastmen such as werewolves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02686))_

### 《 **Wehner** 》

- Although he does not have great power, he is widely believed in by the masses, and his temples can be seen from time to time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02688))_
- He is also believed to write history, and so is also characterized as a god of destiny. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02688))_
- Belief in him is especially popular among artists. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02688))_
- He is the god of the arts and also the god of bards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02688))_

### 《 **Ganerd** 》

- He is also considered the god of gifts, as he brings unexpected wealth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02690))_
- Although he is said to be the god of thieves, he was originally the god of craftsmanship, and so has believers among craftsmen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02690))_
- Temples dedicated to Ganerd can sometimes be seen in large towns, but his power is by no means great. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02690))_
- Temples dedicated to Ganerd can sometimes be seen in large towns, but his power is by no means great. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02690))_

### 《 **Braki** 》

- He is known as the god of smiths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02692))_
- He has many believers among those who work in the mines, and he even has the personality of a chief god, especially among the dwarves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02692))_
- As a result, most dwarven settlements have built shrines to Braki. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02692))_
- However, he was originally the god of volcanoes, and because he told people that when you heat a stone, it melts like water, he was worshiped as the god of smiths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02692))_
- However, he was originally the god of volcanoes, and because he told people that when you heat a stone, it melts like water, he was worshiped as the god of smiths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02692))_
- However, his temples are rarely seen in human cities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02693))_

### **The Nameless God of**

### **Madness (Wicked God)**

- It is said that he exists in the star world and causes people to go mad, and it is believed that those who come into contact with the light emitted by this mad god on a full moon's night will be afflicted with madness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02696))_
- He is the god of madness, and because of his madness, he is a deity whose name cannot be identified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02696))_
- The priests of his cult teach that madness frees its believers from bondage and gives them freedom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02696))_
- His followers are few and he has no temples either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02696))_
- It is said that he gives sudden inspiration that is not based in logic, and for this reason he is also considered the god of art and invention, so there are sometimes believers in this god among artists and sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02696))_
- He is the god of madness, and because of his madness, he is a deity whose name cannot be identified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02696))_

### 《 **Kardis (Wicked God)** 》

- Believers consider destruction and slaughter to be their mission anyway, as they believe that without destruction there can be no new beginning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02698))_
- She is feared as the goddess of destruction and the goddess of the undead, and is considered to be the goddess who controls the _end_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02698))_
- Due to the nature of her faith, she has no temples, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02698))_
- but her doctrines have been continually passed down throughout the past and present, so she has believers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02698))_
- but her doctrines have been continually passed down throughout the past and present, so she has believers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02698))_

### 《 **Mirleaf (Wicked God)** 》

- Mirleaf believers believe that new challenges and efforts to survive (as exemplified by voyages) create and prolong suffering, and that a prompt death is the only mercy for those who do such things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02700))_
- He is the god of the dead of the sea, and teaches that life is pain and sin, and that death is the only way to be saved from it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02700))_
- Mirleaf believers believe that new challenges and efforts to survive (as exemplified by voyages) create and prolong suffering, and that a prompt death is the only mercy for those who do such things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02700))_
- He is the god of the dead of the sea, and teaches that life is pain and sin, and that death is the only way to be saved from it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02700))_
- He has almost no temples. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02701))_
- Even if he did, they would never appear publicly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02701))_
- Game masters can also create original gods and spells in addition to these. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02702))_
- This is a good thing, but it would probably be safer not to delve into actual religious issues. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02702))_

### **Basic Abilities of the 5.1.15.4 Priest Skill**

- Priests can use the following abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02704))_

### 《 **Divination** 》

- This is the ability to pray and communicate with a god, asking whether or not one's actions are right. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02706))_
- However, a god's _words_ can only be understood abstractly by humans, and you _cannot_ ask detailed questions to the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02706))_
- Occasionally a god will give you a **revelation** (given at the game master's discretion). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02706))_
- However, a god's _words_ can only be understood abstractly by humans, and you _cannot_ ask detailed questions to the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02706))_
- Revelations should not be used too conveniently for the characters (players). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02707))_
- It must be done _only_ when they absolutely need a word from their god to protect their faith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02707))_

### 《 **Vow** 》

- When a priest's actions contradict or move away from their vows, their god will give them some _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02710))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02708))_

> There is no need for a god (the game master) to respond to nonsense such as, _If I die in a trap here, I won't be able to believe properly, so let's ask if there is a trap at this door._

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02710))_

> When a priest wants to do something, they can make a _vow_ to their god.

## 5.1.16 Basic Holy Magic List

- The spells listed here are available to characters with the priest (dark priest) skill without exception. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02716))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02713))_

> form of attention or assistance. If a priest of Marfa and his wife make a vow to _never divorce_ at the time of their marriage, but then the relationship between the two turns sour, the two of them may end up having a child together. No vow can be made that violates your faith in your god. For example, a priest of Myrii _can_ make a vow to _defeat the traitor XX with my own hands_ , but a priest of Marfa _cannot_ .

### **1st Level Basic Holy Magic List**

### **[ Cure Wounds ]**

- Only _one_ check needs to be made. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02724))_
- This spell has the effect of instantly healing any wound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02724))_
- When using the _Rating Table_ , the _critical_ process is _not_ performed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02724))_

- However, even in this case, _no_ critical will occur, and if the undead successfully resist, it'll have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02725))_
- Whether it's healing or dealing damage to undead, by expanding the effect, you can use the _Rating Table_ multiple times and use the maximum value. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02726))_
- This has no effect on magical creatures that do not have normal life, such as skeleton warriors, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02727))_

### **[ Turn Undead ]**

- This spell's effect can be expanded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02738))_

### **[ Transfer Mental Power ]**

- This spell is a spell that transfers the caster's mental power (points) to another person as it is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02748))_
- Even those who have lost their consciousness with 0 mental power can be recovered with this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02748))_
- For example, if the caster spends 10 points of mental power with this spell, 9 points will be added to the target's mental power, excluding the base mental power cost of 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02748))_

### **[ Holy Weapon ]**

- This is a spell that applies a negative force against undead to a weapon, rather than to space like _Turn Undead_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02773))_
- This additional strike power does not apply to anything other than undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02774))_
- It also has no effect on (non-undead) enemies that can only be wounded by magical weapons, such as werewolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02774))_
- For _undead_ that can only be wounded by magic weapons, strike power will be _10_ regardless of the strike power of the weapon itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02774))_
- For _undead_ that can only be wounded by magic weapons, strike power will be _10_ regardless of the strike power of the weapon itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02774))_
- It also has no effect on (non-undead) enemies that can only be wounded by magical weapons, such as werewolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02774))_

### Duration=Instant

- As a result, you can deal damage to undead within 10 meters of the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02789))_
- This spell emits a light from your hands that is harmful to undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02789))_
- Its strike power is 20. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02789))_
- As a result, you can deal damage to undead within 10 meters of the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02789))_
- Also, anyone (undead or not) who sees the spell's light and fails to resist loses their vision for one round due to the glare. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02790))_
- This means that undead will suffer damage _and_ lose vision for one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02790))_
- Those who lose their vision suffer a penalty of -4 to attack power (points) and evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02790))_
- This means that undead will suffer damage _and_ lose vision for one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02790))_
- This spell cannot take effect within the area of effect of _Darkness_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02791))_
- This spell cannot take effect within the area of effect of _Darkness_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02791))_

### **[ Protective Circle ]**

- There are two types of this spell: _Heat Protective Circle_ and _Cold Protective Circle_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02802))_

### **Heat Protective Circle**

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02804))_

> Type=Counters (Overpowers): _Cold Protective Circle, Spirit Wall: Salamander_ Countered (Overpowered) By: _Cold Protective Circle, Spirit Wall: Salamander_ Expansion=Duration, area Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02805))_

> This spell protects those within its area of effect from fire and heat. The specific effect is that you can subtract 2 points from damage from those attacks. The same goes for attacks from weapons that had _Fire Weapon_ cast on them. Salamanders, which are fire spirits, will not attempt to enter within this range. If a fire spirit enters the area of effect, that spirit will immediately try to leave. If this is not possible (for example, if it's being controlled by another person using a spell such as _Control Spirit_ , if it's sealed in an item, etc.), the spirit will return to its own spirit world.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02805))_

> The specific effect is that you can subtract 2 points from damage from those attacks.

- The effect of this spell is almost the same as _Heat Protective Circle_ , but it protects against damage from ice and cold. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02808))_

### **5th Level Basic Holy Magic List**

### **[ Quest ]**

- This spell has the effect of allowing the caster to set one mission for the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02814))_
- If the target of the spell takes any action that violates this mission, they will experience severe pain throughout _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02814))_
- For example, you might be asked to fetch a certain item or defeat a certain monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02814))_
- If the target of the spell takes any action that violates this mission, they will experience severe pain throughout _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02814))_
- For example, you might be asked to fetch a certain item or defeat a certain monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02814))_
- The pain is _so_ severe that if you continue to be exposed to it for more than 10 minutes, you will become mentally abnormal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02815))_
- This is not a matter of action, but of the mind, and the spell does not cause pain unless the one on whom it was cast forgets their mission. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02815))_
- However, even if you _do_ remember, you will still experience pain if you do not actively try to fulfill it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02815))_
- This is not a matter of action, but of the mind, and the spell does not cause pain unless the one on whom it was cast forgets their mission. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02815))_
- For example, asking someone to bring you the most beautiful woman in the world is an abstract command, and ruling the world is a mission that goes beyond the compulsion of this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02816))_
- This spell is canceled when the caster dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02816))_
- The mission that can be forced on an opponent through a _Quest_ must be specific and able to be identified, and a mission that is too great will nullify the spell's coercive power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02816))_
- For example, asking someone to bring you the most beautiful woman in the world is an abstract command, and ruling the world is a mission that goes beyond the compulsion of this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02816))_
- However, the caster can tell whether the spell has taken effect or not, so it may be repeated two or three times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02817))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02808))_

Those within the area of effect can subtract 2 points from this kind of damage. Also, frau, an ice spirit, will not try to enter this range. If they are inside when the spell is cast, they will immediately try to escape, and if for some reason that is not possible, they will return to their own spirit world.

### **6th Level Basic Holy Magic List**

### **[ Exorcism ]**

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02824))_

> This spell negates all magic except for _non-removable_ . It's especially often used for spells with curse effects, such as _Curse_ and _Geas_ . However, you can only attempt to remove one spell's effect _once_ . If the attempt fails, the caster cannot try again until their magic power increases.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02827))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=30

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02828))_

> Distance=10 meters

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02829))_

> Area=1 haunt

### Duration=Instant

- However, if this magic fails, the haunt will attack and try to kill the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02833))_
- It may attempt to _possess_ the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02833))_
- This spell is cast on a human possessed by the undead monster called the _haunt_ , or on a location where a haunt is bound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02833))_
- Once the ritual has begun, the targeted haunt _cannot_ be active during the ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02834))_
- This magic's final score can be increased through a ritual, but the haunt must be in a disabled state in order to begin the ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02834))_
- If a haunt is extinguished by this spell, its soul will be completely annihilated, so even if you use the spells _Resurrection_ and _Save Soul_ , you will no longer be able to bring it back to how it was before it became a haunt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02835))_
- If a haunt is extinguished by this spell, its soul will be completely annihilated, so even if you use the spells _Resurrection_ and _Save Soul_ , you will no longer be able to bring it back to how it was before it became a haunt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02835))_

> If you can attain a final score that's greater than or equal to the haunt's mental point resistance, you can make that haunt vanish from the material world.

### **[ Preservation ]**

- It can be used to preserve food, and it is also effective in protecting corpses that are planned to be brought back to life in the future with _Resurrection_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- Objects that have this spell cast on them will no longer decay naturally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- This is a spell that protects objects that would normally rot from decay. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- It is also a counter spell to the dark magic _Rot_ , and if cast within the duration of _Rot_ , it can restore things that have decayed back to their original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- However, even if you cast it on something that has completely decayed after the duration of _Rot_ has expired, or something that has naturally decayed, it will _not_ return to its original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- However, even if you cast it on something that has completely decayed after the duration of _Rot_ has expired, or something that has naturally decayed, it will _not_ return to its original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- It is also a counter spell to the dark magic _Rot_ , and if cast within the duration of _Rot_ , it can restore things that have decayed back to their original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02839))_
- the decay will begin to progress at normal rate from that moment on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02840))_
- If the effect of this spell is removed, such as with _Perfect Cancellation_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02840))_

- One week is required for regeneration and functional recovery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02852))_
- This spell is also effective in restoring vision and hearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02852))_
- This is a spell that regenerates missing or non-functioning body tissues and restores their function. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02852))_
- Pharis Dog, hawk, horse (they’re faithfully tamed by humans) Myrii Eagle, hawk, tiger, wolf (they hunt) Rahda Rat, fox, crow (they have a certain cleverness) Cha Za Small bird, wolf (they chirp, howl, etc.), rabbit (their feet are a symbol of good luck), crows aren’t allowed (a symbol of bad luck) Marfa Cow, horse, rabbit, chicken (they’re livestock) Wehner Sheep, birds (they have distinct wool or feathers) Ganerd Mouse, squirrel, monkey, bear (they use their forefeet skillfully) Fenes Dog, wolf (why.....?.) Braki Mole, woodpecker, squirrel, small bird (they have the characteristic of nest-building) This spell does _not_ help restore life force (points) from wounds, nor can it be cast on a corpse to bring it back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02855))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02851))_

> Distance=Touch Area=One Duration=1 week Effect=Recover target's physical losses Type=Non-removable Expansion=Resist=None

### **8th Level Basic Holy Magic List**

### **[ Summon Servant ]**

### Base Mental Power Cost=32

### Distance=Caster

- By chanting this spell, the caster can summon animals (mammals, birds, reptiles, or amphibians) within a 1 kilometer radius and give them simple commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02863))_
- It can be any number of animals, and you can also summon just the one closest to you, or all within range. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02863))_
- It can be any number of animals, and you can also summon just the one closest to you, or all within range. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02863))_
- By chanting this spell, the caster can summon animals (mammals, birds, reptiles, or amphibians) within a 1 kilometer radius and give them simple commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02863))_
- The animals that are summoned vary depending on the god the priest worships. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02865))_
- Here are some representative gods and the animals associated with them (Table 5-7: Summon Servant). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02865))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02864))_

> The commands you give the animal should be very simple. For example, launching an attack on a specific target, delivering a certain package somewhere, heading to a certain location as a group, etc. You can also give commands to encourage suicide, such as jumping into a fire to become food, but if you give such commands unnecessarily, you may risk _losing_ your priest skill depending on the god you worship. For example, a priest of Myrii should _only_ use animals to buy time while he escapes from an enemy, unless the enemy is extremely unmanageable.

### **[ Power Link ]**

- Those who agree to the spell will have their mental power (points) _reduced_ by the amount they sent to the accumulation field (at this time, if their mental power/points are reduced to 0, they will lose consciousness), but they can freely _draw out_ the mental points stored in the accumulation field and use them to cast magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02873))_
- This spell has the effect of accumulating the mental power (points) of those within the area of effect (can be chosen by the caster at will) and creating a sort of accumulation field. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02873))_
- The caster him or herself can also pour their mental power (points) into the pool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02873))_
- It's only effective if you try to use your mental power (points) voluntarily. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02873))_

- It's only effective if you try to use your mental power (points) voluntarily. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02873))_

- the mental power (points) accumulated at that moment will be released and disappear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02874))_
- Those who agreed to the spell _cannot_ take back the mental power (points) poured into the collection field. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02874))_
- Also, those who do not agree _cannot_ be forced into this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02875))_

### **[ Resurrection ]**

- Also, if the soul is not in normal condition, the spell has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02898))_
- _Resurrection_ is a spell that brings back lost life and resurrects the dead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02898))_
- In order to bring someone back to life, you need something that is strongly connected to the dead person who is the target of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02898))_
- If you have a corpse, that's fine, but if you don't, you'll need items that were loved by the deceased. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02898))_
- The _more_ time has passed since you died, the _less_ likely you are to come back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02899))_
- Once this spell fails, the caster _cannot_ attempt _Resurrection_ on the same dead person (it will always fail) until their magic power increases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02899))_
- Also, since it’s not possible to reverse your age, those who die due to old age _cannot_ be saved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02899))_
- The effect of this spell is _not_ guaranteed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02899))_
- However, it must _not_ be in a state where it would die immediately even if it came back to life, such as a decapitated corpse, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02900))_
- or if their life force was dealt damage by weapons or magic, you must cast _Cure Poison_ or _Cure Wounds_ beforehand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02900))_
- If they died due to poison, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02900))_
- These corpses will only be treated as _something connected to the dead person_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02900))_
- However, it must _not_ be in a state where it would die immediately even if it came back to life, such as a decapitated corpse, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02900))_
- These corpses will only be treated as _something connected to the dead person_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02900))_
- Immediately after being resurrected, they have almost no ability to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02901))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-02918))_

| Final Score | Time to regain memories |
| --- | --- |
| 20 or less | Memories cannot be regained naturally |
| 21 | 30 years |
| 22 | 20 years |
| 23 | 10 years |
| 24 or greater | 5 years |
