### **[ Pooka ]**

- This transformation cannot be detected even by using _Sense Magic_ or _Sense Aura_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04685))_
- However, they don't always wander around naked; they have the ability to transform into forest animals, and most of the time they live as animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04685))_
- However, they cannot transform into very large animals such as bears, wolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04685))_
- However, they cannot transform into very large animals such as bears, wolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04685))_
- However, they like mischief, and in order to surprise you, they will sometimes call out to you while disguised as an animal, hiding their appearance, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_
- They are friendly to characters they meet in the forest, and will contact them in an attempt to befriend them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_
- In addition, they will show lifelong loyalty to a character who saves them from danger, and will act together with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_
- However, once you get in touch with them, they will help you in many ways. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_
- Their shaman skill level is 3. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_
- They will guide you through the forest and tell you where dangerous places are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_
- They can use spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04686))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04683))_

> Fairies are sometimes seen where these two worlds meet. Just as humans wander into the fairy world, there are also fairies who wander from the fairy world into the material world. Fairies take the form of beautiful elf women, often mostly naked or clad in thin silk garments. They are about the same height as elves, but the most prominent difference between them and elves is the beautiful wings that grow from their backs. ### **[ Featherfolk ]**

### Monster Level=4 Rarity=9 Agility=16

- However, they’re not interested in gold or jewelry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04690))_
- Movement Speed=10/30 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon: 11 (4) Strike Points=8 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=12/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=18/13 (6) Special Abilities=4th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) Habitat=Mountains Languages=Harpy, silent spirit, regional Perception=Five senses (infravision) Featherfolk resemble humans, but have bird wings growing from their shoulders, allowing them to fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04690))_
- They live in rugged mountainous areas, have gentle personalities and do not like fighting, but they despise harpies (furiaspecies). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04690))_
- Featherfolk use swords, bows and arrows, and spears as weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04691))_
- They use spirit magic and their shaman skill level is 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04691))_
- Since then, mermen have lived at the bottom of the deep sea, avoiding humans, and their social system and customs are shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04692))_
- Female mermen are called mermaids. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04692))_
- This is because over a hundred years ago, a rumor spread that _eating merman flesh will give long life_ , so humans fought and overhunted mermen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04692))_
- They have an extreme fear and hatred of humans and will never try to negotiate with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04692))_
- This is because over a hundred years ago, a rumor spread that _eating merman flesh will give long life_ , so humans fought and overhunted mermen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04692))_
- Since then, mermen have lived at the bottom of the deep sea, avoiding humans, and their social system and customs are shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04692))_
- The group has a leader and a shaman who govern the tribe. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04693))_
- Mermen are a species that breathes underwater and cannot breathe on land. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04693))_
- They can only act on land for up to _their life points_ rounds (14 rounds), after which they will suffocate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04693))_
- They can only act on land for up to _their life points_ rounds (14 rounds), after which they will suffocate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04693))_

> and the lower body of fish. Female mermen are called mermaids. They have an extreme fear and hatred of humans and will never try to negotiate with them. This is because over a hundred years ago, a rumor spread that _eating merman flesh will give long life_ , so humans fought and overhunted mermen. Since then, mermen have lived at the bottom of the deep sea, avoiding humans, and their social system and customs are shrouded in mystery.

## 13.2.3 Youma

### **[ Imp ]**

- Agility=14 Movement Speed=7/7 (air) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Tail: 8 (1) Strike Points=4+poison Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=3 Life Points/Resistance=8/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=14/9 (2) Special Abilities=1st level dark magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=10/3) Poison (Toxicity Score 10, Paralysis, Duration=1 Hour) Habitat=Unknown _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04719))_
- Its tip is sharp like the tip of a spear, and the imp uses this tail to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04720))_
- If you fail, you’ve been poisoned and will be paralyzed and unable to move at the end of the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04720))_
- The tail contains a paralyzing poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04720))_
- Languages=Impish Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Imps are small youma with brown to dark brown skin, no body hair, and a tail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04720))_
- Anyone who suffers damage from an imp's attack must attempt a life force resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04720))_
- They are sometimes seen in large cities, and sometimes live in abandoned houses in the suburbs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04721))_
- They may use 1st level dark magic, and may also be the familiars of evil sorcerers (many of whom also have the dark priest skill). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04721))_
- For this reason, some sages argue that imps are not youma at all, but were originally underworld creatures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04722))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04717))_

> Monster Level=1

### Reaction=Adversarial

- They have no body hair at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04728))_
- However, kobolds are also known to be sneaky and will attack opponents who are outnumbered, wounded, or unable to fight, such as women and children. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04728))_
- They live in forests, hills, and mountains near human villages, but they are timid and rarely cause harm to human homes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04728))_
- Habitat=Mountains near human villages, forests, caves Languages=Goblin Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Kobolds are small youma with doglike faces and tails. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04728))_
- However, kobolds are also known to be sneaky and will attack opponents who are outnumbered, wounded, or unable to fight, such as women and children. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04728))_
- Legend has it that kobolds can corrode silver, so they are fiercely regarded as enemies by miners and dwarves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04729))_

### **[ Gremlin ]**

### Monster Level=2 Rarity=9

- They have the power to use spirit magic up to 2nd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04732))_
- Agility=17 Movement Speed=6/8 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Fangs: 9 (2) Strike Points=3 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=8/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=14/10 (3) Special Abilities=2nd level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=11/4) Habitat=Mountains, highlands Languages=Impish, silent spirit Perception=Five senses (infravision) A small winged youma also known as the "sky imp". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04732))_
- These wings allow them to fly, but their speed is not that great. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04732))_
- Its body is dark brown and it has black wings on its back resembling those of a bat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04732))_
- Gremlins are not aggressive, but they are treacherous and enjoy playing malicious pranks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04733))_
- The tragedy of the hero Grax riding Pegasus and dying in a crash due to a gremlin's prank is widely known in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04733))_

### **[ Hobgoblin ]**

- They are a feared monster with a physique comparable to that of a human, strong and powerful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04736))_
- When fighting, they use either a crude club or the fangs that protrude from their jaws. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04736))_
- They have reddish-brown skin and very little hair on their heads, but they do have thick hair all over their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04736))_
- Although they have a belligerent personality, they are also surprisingly cowardly, and will run away as soon as they see that the situation is not going well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04736))_

- Although they may live in a goblin village, they usually live alone or in groups of several, frequently changing locations and living relatively far from human villages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04737))_

### **Goblin Shaman**

- Their height is slightly smaller than that of a human, and their skin is reddish-brown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04744))_
- They usually live in groups of several to several dozen in forests and hills, but they sometimes appear at people's homes and attack livestock or steal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04744))_
- They may also live with a hobgoblin who acts as their bodyguard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04744))_
- They often use weapons (mostly small ones such as shortswords, daggers etc.) stolen from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04744))_

- They often use weapons (mostly small ones such as shortswords, daggers etc.) stolen from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04744))_

- Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=12/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=15/11 (4) Special Abilities=3rd level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5) 1st level dark magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=10/3) Habitat=Mountains, forests, caves Languages=Goblin, silent spirit, regional Perception=Five senses (darkvision, infravision) Among the goblin tribe, this refers to those who are skilled in the power of spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04745))_
- A goblin shaman has either a 3rd level shaman skill (magical intensity 12/magic power 5), a 1st level dark priest skill (magical intensity 10/magic power 3), or both. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04746))_
- Goblins served the dark gods in mythical times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04746))_

### **Goblin Lord**

- They are a greater species of goblin, so to speak, who retain a limited amount of power from the time when goblins lived in the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04748))_
- Monster Level=4 Rarity=10 Agility=12 Movement Speed=10 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon or fangs: 11 (4) Strike Points=11 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=18/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=15/12 (5) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Mountains, forests, caves Languages=Goblin, regional Perception=Five senses (darkvision) The goblin lord, as the name suggests, is the king of the goblins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04748))_
- It is said that there are quite a few of this goblin lord species in the _Youma Forest_ to the east of Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04748))_
- However, not all tribes have this type of lord-species, if anything they’re rare. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04748))_
- Although they lack magical abilities, they have bodies that are about the same size or even larger than humans and hobgoblins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04748))_
- They are a greater species of goblin, so to speak, who retain a limited amount of power from the time when goblins lived in the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04748))_

### **[ Marshman ]**

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=15 Agility=13 Movement Speed=6/18 (water) Number=One to several Frequency=Very rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Claw: 12 (5) /Claw: 12 (5) Strike Points=11/11 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=18 (13/6) Mental Points/Resistance=15 (12/5) 179 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04750))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04751))_

> Special Abilities=4th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) Weak to fire Weak to dehydration

### Habitat=Swamps

- Their bodies are covered with green skin, and their backs are hard and shellshaped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04753))_
- They seem to have a deep connection with water spirits, and use undine-type spirit magic up to 4th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04753))_
- They have high intelligence comparable to humans, and also have a rudimentary social life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04753))_
- Languages=Impish, regional Perception=Five senses (infravision) Marshmen, also known as water imps, are youma that live in swamps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04753))_
- They are exclusionary toward other races and react aggressively to anything that enters their habitat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04753))_
- In addition, they are susceptible to dehydration and are nearly unable to leave the swamps where they live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04754))_
- If they're forced to leave and their body becomes dehydrated, they'll lose life points at the rate of 1 point every hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04754))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04753))_

> Languages=Impish, regional Perception=Five senses (infravision) Marshmen, also known as water imps, are youma that live in swamps. Their bodies are covered with green skin, and their backs are hard and shellshaped. They have high intelligence comparable to humans, and also have a rudimentary social life. They are exclusionary toward other races and react aggressively to anything that enters their habitat. They seem to have a deep connection with water spirits, and use undine-type spirit magic up

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04754))_

> They're weak against fire and heat, so when attacking a marshman with firebased magic, add +10 to strike power when making the check.

### **[ Dark Elf ]**

- These elves with jet-black skin are called dark elves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04758))_

- This damage is separate from the damage of the weapon itself and can be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04759))_
- They are apostles of the dark gods, and love to be despicable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04759))_
- A character who is attacked by a poisoned weapon and suffers damage must immediately make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04759))_

### **Dark Elf Leader**

- The data listed here is based on the strength needed to lead a group of 5 to 6 people. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04762))_
- If a character is poisoned and also fails a life force resistance roll (target score 13), the character will be paralyzed at the end of the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04762))_
- Those who lead larger groups can be even stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04762))_
- The poison they use has a higher toxicity score than the usual kind, and its effect is paralysis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04762))_
- Leaders also often apply and use poison on their weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04762))_

## 13.2.4 Spirits

- Rarity=12 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=18 Movement Speed=20 (air) Number=Solo to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Almost none Reaction=Neutral to violent Attack Points=Disintegrate: Always hits Strike Points=Strike power 10, bonus damage 2 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04766))_
- Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Near forests and swamps, or anywhere Languages=None Perception=Magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04768))_
- Its main body is a blue-white ball of light about 50 cm in diameter, and its light illuminates a space with a 5-meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04769))_
- This type of will-o-wisp will not attack you directly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04769))_
- First, one will float gently in front of someone and lead them deep into an endless swamp or forest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04769))_
- They are among the most unstable of spirits and have little to no semblance of intellect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04769))_
- Please make your judgment based on _whether it has a score called mental power (points)_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- However, at the same time, the will-o-wisp emits a powerful shockwave. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- This shockwave’s damage results from a _strike power 10_ strike roll plus _bonus_ _damage 2_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- They also will not attack low grade undead that do not have a mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- However, sleeping humans are subject to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- When a Will-O-Wisp hits its target, it'll simply shatter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- They will not target plants, minerals, vessels, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_
- The other type is one that collides directly with anything that comes into view. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04770))_

### **[ Shade ]**

- Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Anywhere _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04776))_

- Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Teleport (Limited) Illusion _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04785))_
- Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Teleport (Limited) Illusion _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04785))_

- A small dish would be 5 points, a knife, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04791))_
- They also have a small amount of telekinesis, and will attack unwanted intruders by hitting them with things inside the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04791))_
- The strike points when this attack hits vary depending on what is used for the attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04791))_
- They also have a small amount of telekinesis, and will attack unwanted intruders by hitting them with things inside the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04791))_

- 181 However, these abilities can only be manifested within the mansion, and the brownie cannot leave the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04793))_

- Its body is just about 10 liters of liquid. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04801))_
- Undine has no direct means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04801))_
- It often takes the form of a small girl, but it can take any form as long as its weight and volume remain the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04801))_
- Undine is a Water Spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04801))_
- However, if anyone bathes or swims in a spring or river where this spirit resides, without realizing its presence, the mad undine will do everything it can to drown its opponent, including casting a _Sink_ spell to take away their buoyancy or fly directly into their lungs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04801))_
- Undine has no direct means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04801))_
- Undine's shaman skill level should be 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04802))_
- However, the undine's first attack will always be a surprise attack, so in the first round, please make a check to see whether you’ve swallowed the undine or not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- This check must be made every round until you escape from the spring or river containing the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- As long as you hold your breath, you don't have to worry about drinking the water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- If a target drinks even a little of an undine's body, this water spirit will enter directly into their lungs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- The target score in this case is 12. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- However, in this case, you can obviously hold your breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- A check for whether or not you’ve taken a drink is made via success roll using " _adventurer level + agility bonus_ " as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04803))_
- Also, you cannot spit out the undine while underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04804))_
- This check may be attempted once per round, but you cannot take any other actions while swallowing the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04804))_
- However, the victim can attempt to spit the undine out once swallowed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04804))_
- The target score is still 12. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04804))_
- If a character fails the check, that means they've swallowed the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04804))_
- If a character fails the check, that means they've swallowed the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04804))_
- The number of rounds in which you can hold your breath, or in which you can survive while swallowing an undine, is equal to your life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04805))_

### **[ Salamander ]**

### Monster Level=4

- Rarity=12 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=10 Movement Speed=6 Number=Solo to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Violent Attack Points=Strike Points=Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=10/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=20/13 (6) Special Abilities=Fire (Strike power 10, bonus damage 5, Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5) Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Fire immunity Not affected by poison and illness Weak to water _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04810))_
- This fire always hits, but an adventurer can attempt to resist just the same way they would against magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04812))_
- Salamanders shower you in a _breath_ of fire, which has the same effect as the 1st level spirit magic spell _Fire Bolt_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04812))_
- Even when the Salamander breathes out this fiery _breath_ , it does not consume a single mental point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04812))_
- However, its entire body is not covered in animal skin but in flames, making it extremely dangerous as it ignites flammable materials around it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04812))_
- Salamanders, which are spirits of fire, look like quadrupedal beasts with a body length of about 1 meter, as they are called by the name _fire lizard_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04812))_
- A Salamander's fire _breath_ ability should be treated as shaman skill level 4, magic intensity 12 (magic power 5). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04812))_
- Salamanders are spirits, so their temporary bodies are, so to speak, a modified form of their spirit power, so they cannot be attacked by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04813))_
- To damage a Salamander, you need a magic or magically-imbued weapon, or a silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04813))_
- Iron can obstruct the workings of a spirit, but it cannot be used as a means to extinguish it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04813))_
- Iron can obstruct the workings of a spirit, but it cannot be used as a means to extinguish it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04813))_
- A salamander cannot reduce this damage either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04814))_
- Conversely, fire attacks have no effect on salamanders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04814))_
- The damage is 1 point per liter of water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04814))_
- 182 spirit magic _Water Screen_ is attacked by a salamander, after the normal effect, 2 points of damage will be dealt to the salamander (the salamander cannot reduce this damage), then the magic’s effect will vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04814))_

### Monster Level=4

- Rarity=12 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=10 Movement Speed=18 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Violent Attack Points=Strike Points=Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=10/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=20/13 (6) Special Abilities=Wind cutter (Strike power 10, bonus damage 6, Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) 4th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6, sylph only) Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Anywhere Languages=Silent spirit Perception=Magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04823))_

- Sylph does not have normal methods of attack, but by entangling itself with its target, it can cause a powerful _wind cutter_ attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04824))_
- Sylph is a spirit of wind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04824))_
- Its magic intensity is 13 (magic power 6). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04824))_
- It appears as a naked elf woman. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04824))_

- Sylphs also use spirit magic that is sourced from the power of the wind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04824))_

### **[ Sprite ]**

- Because it's invisible, its appearance cannot be identified, but it is said to resemble a leprechaun, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04831))_

- A gnome can disappear into the ground, move underground, and reappear above ground all in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_
- A gnome's stones will always hit their target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_
- Then, they suddenly appear above ground and attack by throwing stones at you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_

- They do not consume mental points even when they throw stones or use spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_
- They also use spirit magic that is sourced from the power of the earth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_
- However, the gnome cannot take any other actions during the round in which this action was chosen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_
- Then, they suddenly appear above ground and attack by throwing stones at you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04839))_

> Mad sprites have the ability to make others invisible. When a mad sprite performs this attack, the target must make a mental power resistance roll (target score 13). If you fail, you will become invisible. Those who have become invisible cannot see themselves either. For this reason, a -2 modifier will be imposed on all physical action checks. This invisibility cannot be removed unless you use _Dispel Magic_ , etc. or defeat the mad sprite.

## 13.2.5 Titans

- If you fail, roll 2D. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04866))_
- If the roll is 8 or greater, you will age by _roll-7_ years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04866))_
- If the roll is 6 or less, you will become younger by _7-roll_ years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04866))_
- If the roll is exactly 7, no age change will occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04866))_
- Those affected by it suffer the effects of (physical) age shifting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04866))_
- 276) and use the game master's discretion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04866))_
- To harm a mad spirit of life, it must be a magical or silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04867))_

### **[ Yeti ]**

- They are not very ferocious and do not actively attack humans, but they do seem to attack when they're hungry-- in cold areas with deep snow, it's not uncommon for them to be hungry and unable to find prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04883))_
- Its ecology is not very clear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04883))_
- The yeti is a titan, about two and a half meters tall, that is rarely seen in cold, snowy regions, and its body is covered in thick white fur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04883))_
- When fighting in these locations, your attack and evasion will suffer a -2 penalty, and your movement speed will be halved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04884))_
- However, the yeti itself is adapted to snow and does not suffer this penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04884))_
- The yeti is strong against cold, and cold-based attacks must be made with a -10 reduction to strike power during the check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04885))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04878))_

### **[ Ogre ]**

- They mainly fight with huge clubs made from thick tree branches, but even without using such a thing, their thick arms alone are enough to pose a threat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04888))_

- They have sharp canine teeth that allow them to tear and eat raw meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04888))_

### **[ Spriggan ]**

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=12 Agility=18 Movement Speed=20 Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points (Giant)=Fangs: 12 (5)/Claw: 13 (6)/Claw: 13 (6) Strike Points=14/13/13 Attack Points (Child)=Fist: 12 (5) Strike Points=7 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04891))_
- Spriggans are evil titans who enjoy eating raw meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04895))_
- The transformation is so ingenious that there's nothing that hints at the spriggan's true identity, nor can it be detected by _Sense Magic_ or _Sense Aura_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04895))_
- Therefore, a spriggan cannot take the form of a specific child. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04895))_
- Once their true identity is discovered, they won’t be able to fool the same opponent again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04895))_
- Therefore, a spriggan cannot take the form of a specific child. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04895))_
- If given the chance (such as when they're alone with a human who believes they're a normal child), a spriggan will revert to their true form (an ugly, 3- meter-tall titan with fangs bared and claws out) to attack their target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04896))_
- If they are not hungry, they will not attack people unless they have a specific reason to do so (such as because they suspect their true identity, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04896))_
- If the target is unaware of the spriggan's true identity, this is a surprise attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04896))_

- However, if they attempt to attack others while still in their child form, their attack ability will be significantly reduced. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04897))_
- Please use the (child) section of the data. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04897))_

### **[ Troll ]**

- Rarity=11 Agility=12 Movement Speed=24 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Arm:14 (7) Strike Points=13 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=21/15 (8) Mental Points/Resistance=14/14 (7) Special Abilities=Camouflage (Sense target score=13) Habitat=Caves, hills Languages=Giant Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Trolls are titans with rock-like skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04901))_
- They live in caves and hills, and do not appear in forests or meadows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04901))_
- They have very low intellect and rarely use tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04901))_
- If you fail, the troll can make a surprise attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04902))_
- To notice their presence, you must succeed on a success roll against target score 13 using _ranger skill level + intelligence bonus_ as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04902))_
- A character caught by surprise cannot take any actions for one round, and suffers a -4 penalty to evasion for that round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04902))_
- They also have arms so long that their fingertips just barely touch the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04902))_
- It will not be affected by just any half-hearted attack, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04903))_
- That single blow has terrifying destructive power that can kill a person in an instant. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04903))_
- A troll's skin is not only similar in color, but also has a hardness comparable to that of rock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04903))_
- A troll's skin is not only similar in color, but also has a hardness comparable to that of rock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04903))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04898, source-range-870a16bc-04902))_

### **[ Hecatoncheir ]**

- Rarity=15 Agility=7 Movement Speed=15 Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon or arms (6 times): 15 (8) Strike Points=15 x 6 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=28/17 (10) Mental Points/Resistance=14/15 (8) Special Abilities=4th level holy magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) rarely Habitat=Underground ruins Languages=Giant Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Hecatoncheir are a subspecies of titans, reaching nearly 4 meters tall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04906))_
- Although they're called the _hundredhanded titan_ , they actually have only 12 arms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04906))_
- Six of these are used in combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04906))_
- They can aim at different targets in one round, or focus on hitting one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04906))_
- Some of them carry weapons, but even without such things, their thick arms are enough to pose a threat to humans (and fae). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04906))_
- Although they're called the _hundredhanded titan_ , they actually have only 12 arms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04906))_
- Hecatoncheir protect the treasure and secrets of the ancient kingdom in deep underground labyrinths, and rarely appear above ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04907))_
- There are also hecatoncheir who serve the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04907))_
- Their intellect is on par with humans, and they’re not necessarily evil. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04907))_

### **[ Giant ]**

- Giants are divided into several subspecies depending on where they live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04909))_
- There are differences in skin color and hair color, and each has a different personality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04909))_

- Among the giants, the race called _Giants_ in particular, unlike those that are merely large fae and youma (such as trolls, etc.), are one of the ancient races like dragons and gods, who are claimed to have originated from the primordial titan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04909))_

- Habitat=Mountains near human villages, hills Languages=Giant, silent spirit Perception=Five senses (infravision) A fire giant is a giant about 7 meters tall, with reddish-brown skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04921))_
- They have rich heads of hair, the color of which ranges from jet black to deep crimson, depending on the individual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04921))_
- Since they often live near human villages, they are greatly feared by humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04922))_
- Fire giants are ferocious creatures that will attack anything that enters their territory without mercy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04922))_
- Fire giants have a deep connection with the spirit power of fire, and can use spirit magic sourced from the power of fire spirits (salamander, etc.) up to 7th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04923))_
- Also, they will not suffer any damage at all from fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04923))_

### **[ Satyr ]**

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=14 Agility=15 Movement Speed=15 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Horns: 9 (2) Strike Points=9 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=12/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=18/12 (5) Special Abilities=Manipulate emotions with a flute (Resist target score=10) Habitat=Forests Languages=Regional Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04937))_
- Satyrs are a forest-dwelling race with the upper body of a hairy human, pointed ears, short horns sprouting from their heads, and the lower body of a goat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04938))_
- Female satyrs are called she-satyrs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04938))_
- They don't like fighting and will run away if danger approaches. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04938))_
- Their staple food is nuts and berries, they have gentle personalities, they're fond of alcohol, music, and women, and they love festivities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04938))_
- To resist this, you must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04939))_
- They always carry a flute and can manipulate human emotions with their melodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04939))_
- Humans who hear the satyr's flute may suddenly become frightened and run away, get excited and start dancing, or become lewd and start taking off their clothes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04939))_

### Monster Level=3

- Its lower body is made of a glue-like substance that expands and contracts, and it's usually about 1 meter long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04944))_
- A ceiling hanger is a magical beast with arms of different sizes on its left and right sides. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04944))_
- To do so, you must succeed on a success toll against target score 12 using _ranger skill level + intelligence bonus_ as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04945))_
- Failure will result in a surprise attack and the targeted character will suffer a -4 penalty to evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04945))_
- In addition to its protective color, it also stretches its body out from the ceiling in an instant to attack, so it has a high potential for surprise attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04945))_
- Rangers have a chance to notice this surprise attack with their _sense danger_ ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04945))_
- At the same time, the left arm makes a normal attack (strike) on the prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04946))_
- A hanging character cannot breathe, nor even cast spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04946))_
- A ceiling hanger's right hand has an extremely enlarged thumb, while conversely, the other four fingers are integrated into a scissor shape, allowing it to strangle its prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04946))_
- When a ceiling hanger catches its prey, it will pull them up to the ceiling on the next round and attempt to choke the opponent to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04946))_
- Strangling has strike power 0 and bonus damage 6 when making a damage check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04947))_
- Non-metal armor and ring mail have no effect against this damage, and points can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04947))_
- Regardless of damage or armor, once _character's life force_ rounds have elapsed, the character will suffocate and fall unconscious (life force 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04947))_
- Characters wearing metal armor (other than ring mail) will not suffer any damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04947))_
- Non-metal armor and ring mail have no effect against this damage, and points can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04947))_
- Ceiling hangers with prey suspended from the ceiling cannot be reached by melee weapons, so it’ll be extremely difficult to provide support to a suspended character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04948))_

### **[ Harpy ]**

- Harpies have two races, deela and furia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04950))_
- Harpies are carnivorous creatures with the head and chest of a human female, and the rest of its body is that of a bird. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04950))_

### **Deela**

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=13 Agility=16 Movement Speed=6/30 (air) Number=Several Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Talons: 11 (4) Strike Points=6 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=9/10 (3) Mental Points/Resistance=12/11 (4) Special Abilities=Charm by singing (Resist target score=10) Habitat=Coasts Languages=Harpy, regional Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04952))_
- They are neutral toward humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04953))_
- Deelas live on the coast, are beautiful, and can speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04953))_
- At this time, deelas use the ability to _charm_ by singing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04953))_
- If you fail, you will be charmed and must do what the deela tells you to do. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04953))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04953))_

> Anyone who hears a deela's song must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 10.

### **Deela King**

- However, very rarely a male is born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04960))_
- In such groups, they do not try to charm humans and avoid interaction as much as possible, because they do not need to use humans and do not want their king's existence to be known. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04960))_
- A flock blessed with a male can produce offspring without the use of a human male, so that male is made their king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04960))_
- Usually, only female individuals are born among harpies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04960))_

- Its front legs have fins instead of hooves, and it has no hind legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04971))_

### **[ Medusa ]**

- Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=14/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=18/12 (5) Special Abilities=Petrify (Resist target score=10) Poison (Toxicity score 10, strike power 10, bonus damage 3) Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04976))_
- In this case, the penalty to attack power and evasion speed is only -2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- You can avoid being petrified by fighting with your eyes closed or your face turned away, but in such a state you will suffer a -4 penalty to your attack power and evasion speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- Conversely, holding a mirror up to a medusa is completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- Habitat=Ruins, underground labyrinths Languages=Regional Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Medusa is a magical beast that takes the form of a human woman, with dozens of snakes growing out of her head instead of hair, and a face with the magical power to petrify humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- Mirrors do not reflect a medusa's magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- Anyone who encounters a medusa must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 10 or they will instantly be turned into a stone statue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- They dwell mainly in ruins and underground labyrinths, and find wicked pleasure in turning visitors into stone statues. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- Therefore, you can fight while looking at a medusa's reflection in a mirror. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- Therefore, you can fight while looking at a medusa's reflection in a mirror. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- In this case, the penalty to attack power and evasion speed is only -2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04977))_
- If you fail, you immediately suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus damage 3. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04978))_
- If the resistance roll is successful, no poison damage is sustained. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04978))_
- A medusa has countless snakes (hair), and anyone who engages with a medusa in melee is exposed to these snakes' attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04978))_
- The snakes are poisonous, and anyone dealt damage by the snakes' attacks must immediately make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04978))_
- This damage can be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04978))_
- A medusa uses the snakes on her head to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04978))_
- It is possible to put the severed head of a Medusa in a bag, then show it to an enemy in combat to turn them to stone, but it must be used carefully, as there is a risk of it turning your allies to stone as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04979))_
- The magical power in the head will disappear in about one week. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04979))_
- Even if a medusa is killed, the magical power remains in her head for a while. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04979))_

### **[ Androscorpio ]**

### Monster Level=4

- Agility=17 Movement Speed=17 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon:11 (4)/Tail:11 (4) Strike Points=10/12+poison Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=17/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=18/13 (6) Special Abilities=3rd level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5) Poison (Toxicity score 11, illusion, lasts 1 hour) Habitat=Deserts _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04983))_
- Languages=Regional, silent spirit Perception=Five senses (infravision) Androscorpio is a mythical beast that lives in the desert, with the upper body of a handsome young man and the lower body of a brightly colored scorpion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04984))_
- Like humans, there are good androscorpios, and there are evil androscorpios. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04984))_
- 189 can use spirit magic, and their shaman skill level is 3. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04985))_
- The stinger at the tip of his tail contains a hallucinogenic poison (toxicity score 11). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04986))_
- Those wounded by a tail attack and fail a life force resistance roll will experience hallucinations starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04986))_
- In combat, an androscorpio uses a sword in his hand, but he can also attack with his tail at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04986))_
- This symptom lasts for one hour, during which time the victim suffers a -4 penalty on all success rolls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04986))_
- The enemy's appearance can change, or it can appear as multiple . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04986))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04979))_

> Even if a medusa is killed, the magical power remains in her head for a while. It is possible to put the severed head of a Medusa in a bag, then show it to an enemy in combat to turn them to stone, but it must be used carefully, as there is a risk of it turning your allies to stone as well. The magical power in the head will disappear in about one week.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04982))_

> Rarity=14

### **[ Centaur ]**

- Rarity=9 Agility=14 Movement Speed=30 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Spear:10 (3)/Heel:10 (3) Strike Points=12/12 Attack Points=Bow:11 (4) Strike Points=12 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=19/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=13/12 (5) Special Abilities=4th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) rarely Habitat=Meadows Languages=Centaurian Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04989))_
- Centaurs are a meadow-dwelling race that are human from the waist up and horse from the waist down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04990))_
- They are not interested in money, but aside from that, if you bring them a suitable gift, you may be able to form a friendship. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04991))_
- They use bows and arrows or spears as weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04992))_
- In melee combat, a centaur can attack a single target with the weapon in its hand and its heel at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04992))_
- It is said that there are very rare centaurs who have very advanced knowledge and can use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04993))_

### **[ Cockatrice ]**

- Rarity=15 Agility=11 Movement Speed=10 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Beak:11 (4) Strike Points=9+petrify Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=16/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=8/11 (4) Special Abilities=Petrify (Resist target score=11) Not affected by poison and illness _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-04996))_
- A cockatrice is a flightless bird about the size of a human with the legs and tail of a lizard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05000))_
- Its beak has the ability to petrify living creatures, and anyone hit by a cockatrice (regardless of whether they're dealt damage or not) must make a life force resistance roll against target score 11. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05000))_
- If you fail, you will instantly turn to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05000))_
- This herb is also effective against medusa and basilisk, but its drawback is that it cannot be stored and its effect only lasts for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05001))_
- It’s the only plant that does not turn to stone when touched by a cockatrice's beak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05001))_
- Cockatrices mainly live in the wilderness and feed on an herb called henruda. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05001))_
- This herb is also effective against medusa and basilisk, but its drawback is that it cannot be stored and its effect only lasts for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05001))_

- Languages=Regional, silent spirit Perception=Five senses (infravision) Scylla is a beautiful woman from the waist up, but six serpent heads and 12 octopus tentacles grow from her lower body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05007))_
- Their personality is extremely wicked, often luring men with only their upper bodies above the water, then dragging them underwater to kill them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05007))_
- They are amphibious and can move freely on land, but mainly prefer to live in water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05007))_
- Their personality is extremely wicked, often luring men with only their upper bodies above the water, then dragging them underwater to kill them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05007))_
- Her shaman skill level is 4 and her magic intensity is 13 (magic power 6). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05008))_
- However, she can only attack a single target three times in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05008))_
- Scylla can also use spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05008))_
- However, she can only attack a single target three times in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05008))_

> Languages=Regional, silent spirit Perception=Five senses (infravision) Scylla is a beautiful woman from the waist up, but six serpent heads and 12 octopus tentacles grow from her lower body. They are amphibious and can move freely on land, but mainly prefer to live in water. Their personality is extremely wicked, often luring men with only their upper bodies above the water, then dragging them underwater to kill them.

- Agility=12 Movement Speed=12 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Fangs:12 (5)/Snake's fangs:12 (5) Strike Points=15/13+poison Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=24/15 (8) Mental Points/Resistance=18/14 (7) Special Abilities=5th level dark magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=14/7) Poison (Toxicity score 12, speech impediment, lasts 1 day) Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Habitat=Mountain recesses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05012))_
- Languages=None Perception=Five senses (darkvision) A chimera has a black lion for the front half of its body and a demonic black goat for the rear half. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05013))_
- Its tail is a snake and a goat's head grows out of its back. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05013))_
- Fortunately, they live deep in the mountains, their fertility is weak due to their unnatural composition, and their numbers are small, so they’re rarely encountered. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05013))_
- Known to be extremely ferocious, they are impossible to defeat except by 190 the very bravest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05013))_
- Known to be extremely ferocious, they are impossible to defeat except by 190 the very bravest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05013))_

- It cannot attack the same target twice in one turn. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05014))_
- The snake's fangs contain a neurotoxin that paralyzes the speech center, rendering those affected unable to speak or cast spells for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05014))_

### **[ Twintail Cat ]**

- However, it is a true mythical beast that has an intellect greater than humans and can also use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05018))_
- They believe that straightforward thinking is extremely dangerous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05018))_
- Although extremely rare, friendships may form between humans and twintail cats. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05018))_
- They will occasionally meddle with humans on a whim, but rarely engage beyond light teasing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05018))_

### **[ Telchines ]**

- Rarity=14 Agility=12 Movement Speed=10/10 (water) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=High Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon:11 (4)/Tail:12 (5) Strike Points=12/11 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=16/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Special Abilities=5th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=15/8) Water adaptation Habitat=Secluded coasts Languages=Merman, low ancient Perception=Five senses (illumination) Telchines has the upper body of a human male, but his lower body has two large snake tails instead of legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05023))_
- All of them have deep knowledge of ancient magic and poisons, and can also cast ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05023))_
- They live quietly on the coast, far from human villages, and their ecology is shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05023))_
- Just like humans, there are good telchines and there are evil telchines. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05023))_
- When fighting in its true form, it uses a trident in its hand along with its two tails. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05024))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05019))_

### **[ Head Displacer ]**

### Monster Level=5

### Rarity=15

- It is said among the sages that they may have been created primarily for attacking castles during war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05042))_
- Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Head displacers have the ability to devour large numbers of humans without being noticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05042))_
- If the opponent becomes disabled, it'll devour their head and place itself in the head's position. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05043))_
- Its movements are awkward, and naturally, after several days since its prey was slain, the body will begin to decompose and a putrid odor will linger in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05043))_
- When it remains alone, it moves by floating in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05043))_
- The tentacles are usually about 15 cm long, but can extend up to 4 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05043))_
- Its movements are awkward, and naturally, after several days since its prey was slain, the body will begin to decompose and a putrid odor will linger in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05043))_
- If a character is in danger of a surprise attack by a head displacer, a character with the ranger skill may be able to notice it due to their _sense danger_ ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05044))_
- Its magic intensity is 14 (magic power 7). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05046))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05038))_

> The head displacer looks like a severed human head with four vermillion tentacles growing out of its neck. When it remains alone, it moves by floating in the air. When it finds prey (humans), it'll first attack with its tentacles. The tentacles are usually about 15 cm long, but can extend up to 4 meters. If a tentacle attack hits, resolve it as strangling (see p. 236). If all 4 tentacles entangle its opponent, it'll also attack with its fangs. If the opponent becomes disabled, it'll devour their

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05044))_

> If the tentacles are not clear, those with the sage skill cannot use the _monster check_ ability.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05044))_

> If a character is in danger of a surprise attack by a head displacer, a character with the ranger skill may be able to notice it due to their _sense danger_ ability. Make a success roll against target score 15 using _ranger skill level + intelligence bonus_ as the baseline score, and if you succeed, you’ll be able to sense it, but if you fail, you’ll be hit by the surprise attack. If the tentacles are not clear, those with the sage skill cannot use the _monster check_ ability.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05046))_

### **[ Lamia ]**

- A lamia is a large snake with the upper body of a beautiful woman and a rainbow-colored lower body, 7 to 8 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05052))_
- Although she is well versed in ancient magic, she doesn't really like to use spells that attack her enemies directly, mainly using illusions and transformations to bewitch them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05052))_
- Those who have their blood sucked will lose life points, and the lamia will recover that same amount of life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- A lamia that does not suck blood at least once per day will lose 1 life point, and if she does not suck blood for 20 days, she will starve to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- There are some who have been living with lamia for years without even realizing it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- Usually only 1 point worth of blood is needed per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- With this amount of damage, a healthy young person will only feel mild fatigue and should recover quickly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- Lamia cannot survive without sucking fresh blood from young humans, so they often use a _Shape Change_ spell to disguise themselves as human girls, deceive young people into becoming their lovers, and then secretly suck their blood in the middle of the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- Usually only 1 point worth of blood is needed per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- Lamia cannot survive without sucking fresh blood from young humans, so they often use a _Shape Change_ spell to disguise themselves as human girls, deceive young people into becoming their lovers, and then secretly suck their blood in the middle of the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- With this amount of damage, a healthy young person will only feel mild fatigue and should recover quickly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05053))_
- Lamia are not necessarily wicked, and some of them seem to be kindhearted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05054))_
- Since they cannot survive without depending on humans, they usually live quietly in villages and towns, and you’re unlikely to encounter them outdoors or in labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05054))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05046))_

### **[ Lizardman ]**

- Lizardmen are broadly sorted into two types: noble and slave. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05056))_
- These communities do not have a very complex social life and are unproductive, simply catching and eating fish from nearby lakes and rivers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_
- The only reason they form groups is for protection from foreign enemies and for ease of reproduction. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_
- Most lizardman villages consist of only slaves, with populations ranging from about 20 to 50. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_
- The overwhelming majority are slaves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_
- Most lizardman villages consist of only slaves, with populations ranging from about 20 to 50. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_
- The only reason they form groups is for protection from foreign enemies and for ease of reproduction. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_
- The mixed community of noble lizardmen is rarely seen by humans, so the exact facts are unknown, but it is said to be several times the size of the slave-only community and have a great difference in function. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05058))_
- Nobles are far superior to slaves in both physique and intellect, and they can also use magic (dragon roar magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05058))_
- The mixed community of noble lizardmen is rarely seen by humans, so the exact facts are unknown, but it is said to be several times the size of the slave-only community and have a great difference in function. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05058))_
- The magic used by noble lizardmen is said to be dragon roar magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05059))_
- Although the _Witch_ of Orphan Laverna assumed that the lizardman family was closely _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05059))_
- 192 related to dragons and avoided premature classification, it was precisely because of this reason that later sages classified them as a type of mythical or magical beast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05060))_
- 192 related to dragons and avoided premature classification, it was precisely because of this reason that later sages classified them as a type of mythical or magical beast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05060))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05057))_

> Slaves have low intellect and cannot use magic.

### **[ Griffon ]**

- Monster Level=6 Rarity=12 Agility=14 Movement Speed=6/40 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Talon:14 (7)/Talon:14 (7)/ Beak:13 (6) Strike Points=15/15/15 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=26/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=14/14 (7) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Steep mountains Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05067))_
- The griffon is a magical beast with the body of a lion, the head of an eagle, and the wings of an eagle, and it can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05068))_
- They mainly feed on small animals and do not attack humans unnecessarily, but if an adventurer is ostentatiously wearing jewelry, they may attack in order to steal it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05068))_
- They have a strange habit of collecting shiny things, and a large amount of gold, silver, and jewels are stored in a griffon's cave on the cliff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05068))_

### **[ Manticore ]**

### **[ Minotaur ]**

- They are carnivorous, especially fond of human flesh, and when they are hungry, they will sometimes come out and attack nearby villages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05076))_
- If the minotaur is hungry, it’ll eat the sacrifice immediately, but if it has other food, it’ll keep her alive for a while and use her for other pleasures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05076))_
- To prevent such calamities, rural villages will often hold rituals in which young girls are sacrificed to the minotaur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05076))_
- Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=25/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=10/13 (6) Special Abilities=Strangling Habitat=Caves, underground labyrinths Languages=Minotaur Perception=Five senses (darkvision) The minotaur, with a strong human body and the head of a bull, is an extremely brutal creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05076))_
- Minotaurs primarily use a giant ax as a weapon, but when fighting barehanded, they will attempt to strangle their opponent to death with both arms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05077))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05072))_

> In combat, a manticore can attack separate targets at the same time with its lion fangs and scorpion tail (it can also attack the same target twice). Those who fail will become paralyzed and draw their last breath after one hour.
