### **[ Unicorn ]**

- Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=25/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=20/15 (8) Special Abilities=6th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=16/9) 10th level healing-type spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=20/13) Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Deep in the woods, rarely seen outside _Unicorn Woods_ _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05082))_
- However, if anyone other than the maiden tries to touch it, the unicorn will issue a warning, and if you still do not listen, it’ll get angry and attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05084))_
- Even in the unfortunate case of a fight, a unicorn will not do anything that would harm a human maiden. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05084))_
- Unicorns have high intellect and can communicate in silent spirit, but will only trust human (or elf or half-elf) virgin girls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05084))_
- Unicorns have high intellect and can communicate in silent spirit, but will only trust human (or elf or half-elf) virgin girls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05084))_
- They have an unlimited life span and are never affected by illness or poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05085))_
- Unicorns are said to be deeply connected to the unknown spirit of life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05085))_
- At this time, their shaman skill is 10th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05086))_
- A unicorn's horn has great healing abilities, allowing them to use magic related to the spirit of life, such as _Healing_ and _Restore Health_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05086))_
- If a unicorn runs out of mental points, its horn will wear out and crumble away, leaving not a trace behind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05086))_
- A unicorn's horn has great healing abilities, allowing them to use magic related to the spirit of life, such as _Healing_ and _Restore Health_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05086))_
- The user does not have to be a shaman or a woman, and may also wear metal armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05087))_
- A unicorn's horn can be cut off, allowing others to use magic related to the spirit of life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05087))_
- If magic power is required, calculate it as 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05087))_
- A horn has a reserve of mental points equal to _the unicorn's mental points when cut off x 10_ , and when you use magic, the base mental power cost of each is directly subtracted from this mental point reserve. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05087))_
- The reserve mental points cannot be recovered, and once they are used up, the horn will wear out and crumble away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05087))_
- For this reason, unicorn horns are sometimes traded as magical items. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05087))_
- Eventually they will reach the end of their life span and die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05088))_
- They will no longer be able to use magic at all, and will be affected by illness, poison, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05088))_
- Currently, unicorns are known to live in large numbers in the _Unicorn Woods_ of Ramliearth, but they are almost extinct outside of that area. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05089))_
- In addition, the group of druids who protect the forest also have great power, keeping it out of reach of potential poachers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05089))_
- Ramliearth has deployed a forest guard regiment and is working as an entire nation to protect these mythical beasts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05089))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05077))_

- Languages=None Perception=Five senses (illumination) A lynx is a large cat-like creature about 3 meters long that lives in mountains and forests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05093))_
- Although carnivorous, they mainly feed on small animals and will not attack human-sized creatures unless they are extremely hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05093))_
- Although carnivorous, they mainly feed on small animals and will not attack human-sized creatures unless they are extremely hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05093))_
- Rather, it is humans who hunt the lynx. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05094))_
- This is because the lynx has a small amber stone called _lignia stone_ in its body, and this stone is a cure-all for illnesses that affect the mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05094))_
- This is because the lynx has a small amber stone called _lignia stone_ in its body, and this stone is a cure-all for illnesses that affect the mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05094))_
- Therefore, it's very difficult to approach a lynx without being noticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05095))_
- However, the lynx has a sharp clairvoyance ability, and if something approaches within a 100 meter radius, it can quickly spot it, even if it’s lurking in the shadows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05095))_

- A basilisk is a large lizard, about 10 meters long, with a chicken's comb on its head and eight legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05110))_
- Those gazed at by the basilisk must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 15, or they will instantly turn to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05111))_
- Its gaze can only be used once every two rounds, cannot be used at the same time as its fangs, and can only aim at one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05111))_
- Its gaze can only be used once every two rounds, cannot be used at the same time as its fangs, and can only aim at one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05111))_
- If this happens, the basilisk will automatically be petrified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05112))_
- In that case, if a character attains a final score of 19 or greater on a resistance roll against petrification, they will be able to reflect it back at the basilisk. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05112))_
- You can attempt to use a large mirror (at least the size of a small shield) to catch the basilisk's gaze and reflect it back to turn the basilisk into stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05112))_
- Basilisks also have a powerful poison in their blood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05113))_
- Weapons that deal damage to a basilisk will be soaked with the blood and become highly poisonous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05113))_

- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05113))_

- Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=25/18 (11) Mental Points/Resistance=16/16 (9) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Steep mountains that humans can't pass through Languages=Lizardman Perception=Five senses (illumination) A wyrm has the appearance of a large snake, with a body over 15 meters long, and bat-like wings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05133))_
- Wyrms are highly territorial, and when other wyrms or giant creatures enter their territory, which is a radius of about 20 kilometers, they will immediately try to drive them out or they may approach them to eat them as food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05134))_

### **[ Buckbaird ]**

### Monster Level=9

- Agility=11 Movement Speed=15 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Ram:17 (10) Strike Points=18 Evasion Points=16 (9) Defense Points=12 Life Points/Resistance=27/19 (12) Mental Points/Resistance=17/17 (10) Special Abilities=Ray (Resist target score=16, one of paralysis/hypnosis/freeze/ brainwashing/metal destruction) Not affected by poison and illness _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05138))_
- There seem to be several subspecies, and some have been seen with antennae and short limbs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05141))_
- It’s a giant eyeball about one and a half meters in diameter, covered in long black hair, and it somehow floats in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05141))_
- Among the Magical Beasts created by the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom, buckbairds are especially bizarre. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05141))_
- They are only found in underground labyrinths, but what they eat and how they reproduce is a complete mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05141))_
- They are only found in underground labyrinths, but what they eat and how they reproduce is a complete mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05141))_
- This ray cannot affect the buckbaird itself, even if it's reflected using a mirror, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05142))_
- In combat, a buckbaird uses five different types of rays. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05142))_
- Those targeted by the ray will be unaffected if they succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 16, but will be seriously affected if they fail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05142))_
- The ray can only affect one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05142))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05137))_

> Rarity=15

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05140))_

> Habitat=Underground labyrinths, ruins Languages=Low ancient Perception=Pseudo

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05142))_

> The game master should roll 1D to determine which ray the buckbaird fires (or if it attempts to ram).

### **1. Paralysis Ray**

- You will be paralyzed for 6 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05144))_

### **2. Hypnosis Ray**

- You will fall asleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05146))_
- This is considered natural sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05146))_

### **3. Freeze Ray**

- You will freeze instantly and enter a state of suspended animation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05148))_

### **4. Brainwashing Ray**

- You will think the buckbaird is your ally and attack your allies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05150))_

### **5. Metal Destruction Ray**

- Destroys metal weapons and armor you are wearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05152))_
- Magical weapons and armor are not affected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05152))_
- This ray cannot be resisted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05152))_

### **6. No firing**

- It will attack without firing a ray. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05154))_

### **[ Hydra ]**

- Monster Level=10 Rarity=13 Agility=9 Movement Speed=12/20 (Underwater) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Fangs: 17 (10) x 9 Strike Points=20 x 9 Evasion Points=15 (8) Defense Points=14 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05156))_
- Life Points/Resistance=54/25 (18) Mental Points/Resistance=10/17 (10) Special Abilities=Head regenerate Water adaptation Habitat=Lakes, rivers Languages=None Perception=Five senses (illumination) The hydra is a terrifying serpent with nine heads and a total length of 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05157))_
- They mainly live in lakes and rivers, but can also act on land without penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05157))_
- At this time, it can attack a single target 9 times, or aim at different targets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05157))_
- If you attack a hydra with a bladed weapon and deal 6 or more points of damage (20 or more if defense points are taken into account) in one blow, you will have cut off one head, and the hydra's number of attacks will be reduced by 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05158))_
- A severed head will grow back after 5 rounds, restoring the number of attacks, and also recovering 6 life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05158))_
- Once its life points reach 0, its heads will no longer regenerate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05158))_
- However, if a head is dealt fire or electric damage immediately after it falls off, that head will not regenerate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05158))_
- A severed head will grow back after 5 rounds, restoring the number of attacks, and also recovering 6 life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05158))_
- However, if a head is dealt fire or electric damage immediately after it falls off, that head will not regenerate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05158))_

- Even if this ray is reflected off a mirror, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05168))_

- If you fail, you will instantly turn to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05168))_
- A humbaba will fire a terrifying petrification ray from its one eye, once every 3 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05168))_
- The fire is large enough to cover one person, and those hit by the fire will suffer damage resulting from a strike power 20 strike roll plus bonus damage 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05169))_
- The humbaba's fire deals damage and at the same time causes a terrible disease. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05169))_
- However, if you succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 17, the strike power becomes 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05169))_

- The most feared beast second only to the dragon, the roc is a gigantic bird resembling an eagle, with a wingspan of 20 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05180))_
- Once every few years, they may be swept close to the continent by the wind, and are the subject of gossip among sailors. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05180))_
- The most feared beast second only to the dragon, the roc is a gigantic bird resembling an eagle, with a wingspan of 20 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05180))_
- Those hit by a roc's talon attacks will be grabbed by the talons, lifted into the air, and carried to its nest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05181))_
- Besides roc infants, its nest is said to be full of treasure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05181))_
- Like the griffon, it may have a habit of collecting shiny objects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05181))_
- A roc's talons alone are over 1 meter long, and it can lift and carry humansized animals with one foot, or a cow or horse with both feet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05181))_
- Rock eggs can measure up to 2 meters in diameter, making even newborn infants larger than humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05182))_
- Here is the data of an infant for your reference. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05182))_

### **[ Dragon ]**

- There are three main types of dragons in Forcelia: ancient dragons (drakes), elder dragons, and lesser dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05187))_
- All of these dragons are similar in appearance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05188))_
- Their entire body is covered with hard scales, and the color of these scales varies depending on the individual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05188))_
- Their legs are thick and sturdy, for bipedal walking on the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05189))_
- They have a snake-like head and tail, with horns and spikes growing along their spine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05189))_
- These wings are comparatively small for their body size. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05189))_
- They have bat-like wings on their backs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05189))_
- It is said that there is no way for a human to ever take on a drake. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05190))_
- The 30 meter long drake, feared as a _god slayer_ monster, and also a master of a variety of magic, is nowhere to be seen in Forcelia today. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05190))_
- Even the elder and lesser species, which are weaker than drakes, are far too powerful enemies for humans to face, and those who defeat these dragons are hailed as _dragon slayer_ heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05190))_

- Habitat=Mountains, caves, other Languages=Lizardman, low ancient Perception=Five senses (darkvision) Elder dragons are about 20 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05207))_
- Some sages claim that this is based on the lost dragon roar, and should not be called _ancient_ magic, although the results are the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05207))_
- Unlike lesser dragons, they have high intellect and sometimes use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05207))_
- Unlike lesser dragons, they have high intellect and sometimes use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05207))_
- The target score to resist is 22. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05208))_
- Elder dragons also have the ability to breathe fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05208))_
- They also have the _roar_ ability which causes fear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05208))_
- Elder-species' fire spreads in a 30-meter forward radius, and those who fail a mental power resistance roll against target score 22 will suffer damage resulting from a strike power 30 strike roll plus bonus damage 15. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05208))_
- Like lesser-species, elder-species can only use one of fire, roar, or physical attack (or magic) in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05209))_

## 13.2.7 Animals

- Perception=Five senses (illumination) Wolves are carnivorous and usually act in packs of several to several dozen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05216))_
- They systematically attack unsuspecting animals that are separated from their herd. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05216))_
- They are also nocturnal, which means their activity is limited to the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05216))_
- They are also nocturnal, which means their activity is limited to the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05216))_
- Such wolves have greater morals than normal ones, and will fight to the death to protect their masters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05217))_
- Rarely, wolf cubs are captured and sometimes domesticated as hunting dogs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05217))_

- Languages=None Perception=Five senses (sonar) A vampire bat is a giant bloodsucking bat with a wingspan of about 2 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- At this time, the vampire bat's attack points become the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- Therefore, in order for the possessed opponent to attack the vampire bat in question, they will need a melee weapon that can be used at close range, such as a dagger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- Once a fang attack hits, it will attach itself to its opponent and begin bloodsucking starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- Furthermore, if you attack a vampire bat that’s attached to a living creature, there is also a risk of accidentally hitting an ally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- Therefore, in order for the possessed opponent to attack the vampire bat in question, they will need a melee weapon that can be used at close range, such as a dagger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05335))_
- Attacks made against a vampire bat while it’s in the air suffer a penalty of 2 due to the bat's keen perception plus the fact that it is flying. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05336))_
- The footing inside this sand pit is extremely poor, so it’s impossible to escape on your own using normal methods (climbing). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05436))_
- 3 meter depth opens up at the feet of the unfortunate prey, into which the prey will fall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05436))_
- The footing inside this sand pit is extremely poor, so it’s impossible to escape on your own using normal methods (climbing). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05436))_
- Escaping from a giant antlion's large jaws requires a success roll using _adventurer level + strength bonus_ as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05437))_
- The giant antlion will attempt to bite down on its fallen prey with its large jaws. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05437))_
- If it manages to bite, it’ll hold its grip firmly in place then stab its mouth which is a hollow needle into the prey’s body and suck out the body's fluids (this attack will hit automatically). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05437))_
- Damage due to bloodsucking is strike power 10 plus bonus damage 5, and cannot be reduced by armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05437))_
- If it manages to bite, it’ll hold its grip firmly in place then stab its mouth which is a hollow needle into the prey’s body and suck out the body's fluids (this attack will hit automatically). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05437))_

### **[ Giant Rat ]**

- (2) Strike Points=4/3/3 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=9/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=7/8 (1) Special Abilities=Disease (Intensity 5) Habitat=Underground tunnels, caves, ruins Languages=None Perception=Five senses (illumination) A giant rat is a huge rodent, about 1 meter long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05222))_
- However, they are intelligent and dexterous, and thus can stand on their hind legs and use simple tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05222))_
- They are timid by nature and will not attack unless you seriously provoke them or invade their burrow without them knowing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05222))_
- They are omnivorous, and usually live in groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05222))_

- If you roll a 4 or less, you will contract _rat disease_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05223))_

### **[ Hanger Leg ]**

### Monster Level=1

- However, eggs are often found in groups Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Needle: 8 (1) Strike Points=6 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=8/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=8/8 (1) Special Abilities=Parasitism (Resist target score=8) Habitat=Forests _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05226))_
- Rarity=13 Agility=18 Movement Speed=8 Number=One. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05226))_
- Its body is only 20 cm long, but its supple legs, which also serve as tentacles, are equipped with countless suckers, and can stretch to over 1 meter when extended. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05228))_
- This headless octopus-like creature is a vicious parasite that lives by taking over the bodies of large animals, and has no visible distinction between male and female. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05228))_
- It can easily jump up to 3 meters, and once it attaches itself to a creature's head, it won't come off even if a giant pulls at it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05228))_
- Also, its jumping power and strangling power are not something to be underestimated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05228))_
- Its body is only 20 cm long, but its supple legs, which also serve as tentacles, are equipped with countless suckers, and can stretch to over 1 meter when extended. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05228))_
- In addition to absorbing nourishing blood from the blood vessels, the needles also have the function of paralyzing the opponent’s brain and controlling their nervous system. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05229))_
- If your armor and adventurer level prevent you from suffering substantial damage, the needles will not pass through to your head and you will not need to make a resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05229))_
- However, once the attack hits, the hanger leg will now be lodged in the victim's head, so all subsequent attacks will automatically succeed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05229))_
- Then, needles extended from the tips of the legs are embedded into the opponent's brain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05229))_
- Then, needles extended from the tips of the legs are embedded into the opponent's brain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05229))_
- A hanger leg that is lodged in a head cannot be removed by force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05230))_
- Of course, using magic is out of the question. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05231))_
- Nevertheless, all motor functions and physiological abilities are at the will of the parasite. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05231))_
- A hanger leg can freely use the body of the victim it's taken over. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05231))_
- An unfortunate victim of a hanger leg's possession will lose all senses, unable to see or hear anything, and furthermore, will be unable to think. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05233))_
- Naturally, you cannot escape on your own, but once killed, the parasite leaves the host's body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05233))_
- Also, when death is near, the hanger leg will form several balls under the flesh hardened with secretion and lay small eggs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05234))_
- These eggs will hatch and grow inside the balls, and when they grow up, they will form a cocoon and sleep until a _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05234))_
- These eggs will hatch and grow inside the balls, and when they grow up, they will form a cocoon and sleep until a _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05234))_
- Then, when the long-awaited opportunity arrives, they are quick to pounce on such an unwary creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05235))_
- Then, when the long-awaited opportunity arrives, they are quick to pounce on such an unwary creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05235))_

### **[ Horse ]**

- This is a riding horse trained to follow the will of its rider, even in battle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05268))_
- This means you can't use shields or two-handed weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05269))_
- This means you can't use shields or two-handed weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05269))_
- If you attempt to control your horse without using the reins, you will suffer a -4 penalty to your final score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05270))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05262))_

> A giant wasp's stinger is poisonous (toxicity score 12). Those dealt damage by a wasp's attack must succeed on a life force resistance roll, or else the poison will paralyze their bodies, leaving them in a state of suspended animation. This state of suspended animation lasts semipermanently. A giant wasp will drag paralyzed prey to its burrow, lay eggs inside them, then hide the entrance to the burrow with dead leaves, etc. Wasp larvae grow by feeding on the flesh and organs of their prey.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05265))_

> Monster Level=2

### **[ Wardog ]**

### Monster Level=3

- A wardog is a breed of dog that has been bred through crossbreeding, specially trained for combat, and is a specialty of the kingdom of Azarnia (the Azarn Islands). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05275))_
- No matter how unfavorable the situation becomes, they will not run away unless commanded to do so. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05275))_
- They're characterized by entirely black bodies, pointed ears and snout, almost no tail, and a slender physique. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05275))_
- A wardog never barks unless commanded to do so in advance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05275))_
- A wardog never barks unless commanded to do so in advance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05275))_
- No matter how unfavorable the situation becomes, they will not run away unless commanded to do so. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05275))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05270))_

> To fight on horseback, you must make a success roll against target score 7 each round using _adventurer level + agility bonus_ as the baseline score. If you attempt to control your horse without using the reins, you will suffer a -4 penalty to your final score.

### **[ Crocodile ]**

### Monster Level=3

- They are ferocious by nature and will attack indiscriminately if they are hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05291))_
- Their standard body length is 1.5 meters, but larger ones can exceed 3 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05291))_
- Attacks with their large jaws are powerful, and once they bite an opponent, they will not let go and continue to deal damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05291))_
- Crocodiles are large carnivorous reptiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05291))_
- Such giant crocodiles are also called alligators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05291))_

### Languages=None

- The giant scorpion is a huge scorpion with a body length of over 3 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05299))_
- The barb on the tip of its tail is a stinger that secretes a deadly poison (toxicity score 10), and those stung must make a life force resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05300))_
- If you fail, your whole body will become paralyzed after an hour, then you will draw your last breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05300))_
- If you fail, your whole body will become paralyzed after an hour, then you will draw your last breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05300))_

### **[ Giant Mantis ]**

- Rarity=13 Agility=18 Movement Speed=18/20 (air) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Almost none Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Sickle:10 (3)/Sickle:10 (3) Strike Points=8/8 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=14/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=7/10 (3) Special Abilities=Strangling with sickles (1D: 1-3 right arm, 4-6 left arm) Mental attack immunity Habitat=Remote Deserts and Wastelands Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05303))_
- This is a praying mantis about the size of a human, with quick movements, it unleashes two sickles to kill and eat animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05305))_
- It is also able to fly over a distance of several tens of meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05305))_
- When attacking a human, a giant mantis will use its sickles to capture their arms and attempt to block their movement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05306))_
- This damage can be reduced by armor and adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05306))_
- Also, on subsequent rounds, you cannot escape from the giant mantis, so your evasion points will be -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05306))_
- Anyone hit by a giant mantis's attack will have one arm trapped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05306))_
- In order to escape from a sickle that’s trapped your arm, you must succeed on a resistance roll against target score 10 (or attack points from when the attack hits, if using optional rules) using _adventurer level + strength bonus_ as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05306))_
- Ancient magic cannot be used while one arm is trapped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05306))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05300))_

If you fail, your whole body will become paralyzed after an hour, then you will draw your last breath.

> When attacking a human, a giant mantis will use its sickles to capture their arms and attempt to block their movement. Anyone hit by a giant mantis's attack will have one arm trapped. You must roll the dice to determine which arm is trapped. Roll 1D, and if it's 1-3, it'll be the right arm, but if it's 4-6 it'll be the left arm. Ancient magic cannot be used while one arm is trapped. Also, on subsequent rounds, you cannot escape from the giant mantis, so your evasion points will be -4. In order t

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05307))_

### **[ Scarlet Vulture ]**

- Rarity=10 Agility=15 Movement Speed=10/30 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Beak:10 (3)/Talons:11 (4) Strike Points=6/6 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=15/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=9/10 (3) Special Abilities=Capture Opponent’s attack is -2 Habitat=Mountains, meadows Languages=None Perception=Five senses (darkvision) The scarlet vulture is a large carnivorous bird, with a wingspan of up to 4 meters while both wings are spread. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- The scarlet vulture has strong legs, and can move quite freely on the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- It can lift anything from small animals such as dogs, cats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- Although it is a member of the vulture family, so to speak, it regularly eats live meat, rather than dead meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- It is so called because its wings and the top of its head are bright red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- It is so called because its wings and the top of its head are bright red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- It can lift anything from small animals such as dogs, cats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05310))_
- Those hit by a scarlet vulture's claw attack, if they’re of a suitable size (a grassrunner is _of a suitable size_ ), will be lifted into the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05311))_
- If the Scarlet Vulture's claw attack hits an object of a suitable size (the Grass Runner is a "reasonable size"), it will be lifted into the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05312))_
- Those who are caught, even if not lifted into the air, will suffer a -2 penalty to evasion speed against the beak attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05312))_
- This bird can see things even at night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05313))_
- To attack scarlet vulture while in the air, you must suffer a -2 penalty to attack power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05314))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05307, source-range-870a16bc-05310))_

### **[ Bear ]**

### **Grizzly**

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=6 Agility=14 Movement Speed=21 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs:10 (3)/Claw:11 (4)/ Claw:11 (4) Strike Points=12/11/11 Attack Points=Fangs:10 (3)/Bind:11 (4) Strike Points=12/10 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05346))_
- Grizzlies are generally solitary, except when a mother bear is with her cubs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05348))_
- Moreover, they’re classified as one of the most terrifying animals due to their super strength and agility that you wouldn’t expect from their physique. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05348))_
- They’re about 3 meters tall, but some giant grizzlies can reach 4 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05348))_
- They are omnivores and are said to eat anything they can fit into their mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05348))_
- Grizzlies are generally solitary, except when a mother bear is with her cubs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05348))_
- This is because they also eat dead meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_
- Also, a mother bear with her cubs will do everything in her power to protect them, so travelers should avoid approaching groups of bears carelessly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_
- It is also said that once a grizzly bear has learned the taste of human flesh, it’ll attack humans more frequently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_
- Usually it tries to avoid humans on its own accord, but if it and a human bump into one another, or if it’s hungry, then things are different. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_
- Usually it tries to avoid humans on its own accord, but if it and a human bump into one another, or if it’s hungry, then things are different. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_
- This is because they also eat dead meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_
- When surrounded by multiple opponents, it’ll choose to swing its arms around and try to mow down anything it happens to hit, but if there are fewer opponents, it’ll approach for a bear hug. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05350))_
- If a bear hug attack hits, the adventurer will be held by the bear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05350))_
- This is a technique in which it holds its opponent in its thick arms, squeezing them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05350))_
- A bear's special attack is a _bear hug_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05350))_
- Bears use this attack depending on the situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05350))_
- During this attack, a bear gains a +4 bonus to attack points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05351))_
- A bear that captures an opponent in a bear hug will both strangle and bite the opponent at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05351))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05349))_

> Usually it tries to avoid humans on its own accord, but if it and a human bump into one another, or if it’s hungry, then things are different. Also, a mother bear with her cubs will do everything in her power to protect them, so travelers should avoid approaching groups of bears carelessly. At this time, it’s useless to play dead. This is because they also eat dead meat. It is also said that once a grizzly bear has learned the taste of human flesh, it’ll attack humans more frequently.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05347))_

> Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=22/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=7/10 (3) Special Abilities=Strangling Habitat=Forests Languages=None Perception=Five senses

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05350))_

> A bear's special attack is a _bear hug_ . This is a technique in which it holds its opponent in its thick arms, squeezing them. Treat this as strangling (see p. 236). Bears use this attack depending on the situation. When surrounded by multiple opponents, it’ll choose to swing its arms around and try to mow down anything it happens to hit, but if there are fewer opponents, it’ll approach for a bear hug. If a bear hug attack hits, the adventurer will be held by the bear.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05351))_

> In this state, the bear cannot attack other opponents.

- 203 prey and lead it to where the females are waiting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05354))_
- However, lions sometimes attack humans if they’re starving or if they’ve tasted human flesh. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05355))_

### **Poison Toad**

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=7 Agility=8 Movement Speed=8/10 (water) Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Strike Points=Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=3 Life Points/Resistance=7/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=2/7 (0) Special Abilities=Poison body surface (Toxicity score 9, blind) Habitat=Lakes Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05371))_
- Since they feed on fish and insects, they rarely attack humans, but if they’re attacked or startled, they’ll try to protect themselves by spewing venom from the secretory glands in their heads. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05372))_
- Even if you succeed on the resistance roll, your skin will be irritated and itchy for a while. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05373))_
- If you fail, the poison will get into your eyes and you will lose your vision. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05373))_
- It’ll recover naturally after 3 days, but it can also be cured with the holy magic _Cure Poison_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05373))_

- This is a huge toad with a body length of 3 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05377))_
- It extends its 5 meter long tongue and entangles its prey, and if it's a human-sized animal, it will swallow it whole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05377))_
- If the prey can’t escape within 3 rounds, the toad will pull it in on the next round and swallow it whole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05378))_
- If the prey can’t escape within 3 rounds, the toad will pull it in on the next round and swallow it whole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05378))_
- With his tongue severed, a toad will run away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05379))_
- A toad's tongue has 4 defense points, and can be severed if it's dealt a total of 7 or more points of damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05379))_
- At this time, there is a risk of hurting your ally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05379))_
- This damage cannot be prevented by armor and can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05380))_
- Those who are swallowed whole will continue to suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 4 each round spent inside the toad's belly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05380))_
- Resistance rolls are also not possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05380))_

- Those who are swallowed whole will continue to suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 4 each round spent inside the toad's belly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05380))_
- Alternatively, someone else could kill the toad, then cut its belly open and rescue the victim before they're digested. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05382))_

### **[ Ant ]**

- However, Alecrast is home to giant ants, which are larger and more dangerous than humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05384))_
- Ordinary ants are unlikely to pose a threat to adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05384))_

### **Giant Ant**

- Although their bodies are gigantic, their nature is no different from that of ordinary ants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_
- They are extremely voracious creatures, and will attack anything that moves, thinking it's food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_
- Its shiny black carapace is as strong as plate armor, and its attacks with its sharp fangs are not to be underestimated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_
- Giant ants are giant omnivorous ants that are just over 2 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_
- In Alecrast, it’s said that not a single blade of grass remains after a giant ant has passed by. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_
- Although they have almost no intellect, that makes them fearless and a troublesome opponent to deal with. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_
- In Alecrast, it’s said that not a single blade of grass remains after a giant ant has passed by. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05389))_

### **Giant Ant Queen**

### Monster Level=5

- Rarity=10 Agility=16 Movement Speed=5 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Fangs:12 (5) Strike Points=16 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=35/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=15/13 (6) Special Abilities=Entangling _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05403))_
- The giant ant queen is the queen of all giant ants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05406))_
- Therefore, her body length can reach over 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05406))_
- Her head and chest are almost the same as those of a normal giant ant, but her white abdomen is full of eggs and bloated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05406))_
- Therefore, her body length can reach over 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05406))_
- A giant ant queen is always protected by giant ant soldiers, but she also has her own means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- If the target score is 13 or more above the baseline score, the prey will be completely entangled and unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- Giant ant queens can spit out mucus from their mouths that's used to alter the food they feed to their young. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- While entangled in the mucus, attack and evasion suffer a -4 penalty, and ancient magic and spirit magic cannot be used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- If you’re hit by the mucus, you won’t suffer damage, but you will become more and more entangled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- You can escape from the mucus by succeeding on a success roll against target score 12 using _adventurer level + strength bonus_ as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- Those hit by this mucus will be deprived of their bodily freedom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- A giant ant queen is always protected by giant ant soldiers, but she also has her own means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05407))_
- With a certain scent (pheromone), she can command other giant ants, devise _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05408))_
- A giant ant queen has some intellect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05408))_
- Once a giant ant queen is defeated, the giant ants under its command will begin to attack everything around them indiscriminately (they will not attack each other). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05409))_
- 205 some strategy, and make them fight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05409))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05406))_

> The giant ant queen is the queen of all giant ants. Her head and chest are almost the same as those of a normal giant ant, but her white abdomen is full of eggs and bloated. Therefore, her body length can reach over 10 meters.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05405))_

### **[ Ape ]**

- _Forcelia_ is home to many different types of monkeys, from small apes that live in groups to giant apes that grow to abnormal sizes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05411))_

### **Small Ape**

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=5 Agility=13 Movement Speed=13 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Low Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Claws:9 (2) Strike Points=3 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=12/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=10/8 (1) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Forests and mountains near human villages Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05413))_
- They also have high intellect for an animal, so in that sense you should not let your guard down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05414))_
- They are generally docile and do not attack humans, but in rare cases when faced with severe hunger or the need to protect their group, they may display hostile behavior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05414))_
- Furthermore, once they do fight, they fight together in groups and display considerable bravery, especially while the leader is still alive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05414))_
- Small apes are omnivorous and usually live in groups of several to around ten. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05414))_
- In large groups, the number may swell to several dozen, centered around a strong male leader (boss ape). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05414))_
- There are many breeds, and although the differences in physique and body fur are too countless to mention, they generally share similar characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05415))_

### **Boss**

- Monster Level=2 Rarity=5 Agility=13 Movement Speed=13 Number=One Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Low Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:10 (3) Strike Points=5 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=14/10 (3) Mental Points/Resistance=10/9 (2) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Forests and mountains near human villages Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05417))_
- This is the boss ape that leads a group of small apes, and only males can become one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05418))_
- This is the boss ape that leads a group of small apes, and only males can become one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05418))_

- Rarity= Agility=12 Movement Speed=16 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Arm:10 (3)/Arm:10 (3) Strike Points=8/8 Attack Points=Strangling:10 (3) Strike Points=7 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=18/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=10/9 (2) Special Abilities=Strangling Habitat=Jungles Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05421))_
- Gorillas are apes larger than humans, are omnivorous, and do not form large groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05422))_
- Those in Alecrast have ferocious personalities and prefer to attack creatures smaller than themselves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05422))_

- The giant antlion is a creature about 3 meters long total, with most of the front half of its body occupied by its large jaws, a cone-shaped tail on the back half of its body, and three pairs of spatulashaped legs that bend forward at the joints, making it suitable for burrowing underground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05433))_

### **[ Worm ]**

- These creatures, worms, are known to exist in several subspecies over a fairly wide range. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05450))_
- Huge and dangerous caterpillar-like creatures can sometimes be seen in _Forcelia_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05450))_

### **Sea Worm**

- Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based, becomes ferocious when exposed to strong light Attack Points=Acid:12 (5) Strike Points=See description Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=15/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=5/11 (4) Special Abilities=Acid (Strike power 10, bonus damage 5) Water adaptation Habitat=Deep seas Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05454))_
- Although they live in the deep sea, sea worms are sensitive to light, and will appear in shallow water when attracted by light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- Additionally, there are a large number of whip-like tentacles growing around the circular feeding mouth at the tip of its body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- For this reason, they have glands in their bodies that secrete powerful digestive juices, and when in combat, they spit acidic liquid from their mouths, showering it on their opponents. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- Whether acid causes damage to armor (e.g., reducing defense by 1 point per exposure) is the game master's choice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- Usually, it'll be easier to play the game if you don't let it affect you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- The sea worm is a gigantic, disgusting, grub-like monster that’s over 3 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- It is also completely omnivorous, digesting and eating anything the tentacles can catch and fit in its mouth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- When they sense strong light, they'll become ferocious and continue to fight _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- Acid damage cannot be reduced by armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- Its long, thick body is covered with a thick rubbery membrane and has many segments lined up in a row. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05455))_
- 207 blindly until the light is completely cut off. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05456))_
- A sea worm will emerge from the water and directly attack whoever is holding the light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05457))_
- If the adventurers are quick-witted enough to turn off the light, the monster will return to the tide pool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05457))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05452))_

> Monster Level=5 Rarity=14

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05453))_

> Agility=10 Movement Speed=5/5 (water) Number=One to several

### **Rock Worm**

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=10 Agility=5 Movement Speed=12/10 (underground) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral, becomes ferocious when exposed to strong light Attack Points=Acid:13 (6) Strike Points=See description Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=28/15 (8) Mental Points/Resistance=9/13 (5) Special Abilities=Acid (Strike power 10, bonus damage 5) Habitat=Underground Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05459))_
- They feed on soil like normal earthworms, but they also eat rocks without hesitation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05460))_
- The attack is made using digestive juices from its mouth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05460))_
- Therefore, if you come across one in an underground passage and are holding a torch or lantern, they will attack you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05460))_
- To do this, they secrete strong acidic digestive juices from their mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05460))_
- Therefore, if you come across one in an underground passage and are holding a torch or lantern, they will attack you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05460))_
- They will not approach gold or silver, perhaps because they cannot digest them with their digestive juices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05461))_
- Therefore, they do not appear near veins of precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05461))_
- They will not approach gold or silver, perhaps because they cannot digest them with their digestive juices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05461))_
- Therefore, they do not appear near veins of precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05461))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05461))_

> They will not approach gold or silver, perhaps because they cannot digest them with their digestive juices. Therefore, they do not appear near veins of precious metals.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05460))_

> Armor cannot reduce it.

### **Sand Worm**

- Monster Level=6 Rarity=15 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/20 (underground) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Mouth:13 (6) Strike Points=14 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=30/17 (10) Mental Points/Resistance=5/12 (5) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Deserts Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05463))_
- Sand worms are giant carnivorous worms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05464))_
- Sand worms have no growth limit and will continue to grow indefinitely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05465))_
- The data presented here is for a typical adult around 3 years old, and about 10 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05465))_
- If it's a small larva, its scores will be low, and if it lives for more than 10 years and reaches a length of nearly 20 meters, it will become an even more formidable enemy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05465))_
- Sand worms have no growth limit and will continue to grow indefinitely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05465))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05464))_

> They usually burrow underground, but are always hungry, so when other creatures pass by on the ground, they leap out to attack them for food.

### **[ Giant Seal ]**

- They are polygamous, with one king gathering a hundred or more females to form a kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05467))_
- They dive under the ice to feed on fish, so they're usually found near large ice cracks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05467))_
- Giant Seals are creatures that live in the frozen seas of the north. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05467))_
- Giant seal hides are ideal material for making leather armor, so fishermen in the northern seas hunt them on large icesailing ships using ballistas (extra-large crane-quin crossbows). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05468))_
- Including the price of meat, fat (used for fuel, etc.) and tusks, the average income for one animal is 10,000 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05468))_
- One averagesized male seal yields enough hide for around 150 people. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05468))_
- This means that the characters must be equipped with iceproof shoes, etc., otherwise combat actions, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05469))_
- This means that the characters must be equipped with iceproof shoes, etc., otherwise combat actions, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05469))_
- If a character falls prone due to being hit by a giant seal, they will slide about 10 meters on the ice as they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05470))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05467))_

> Giant seals can also use their fins to advance over ice fields, but they do not eat land animals, so they won't attack you unless you attack them or invade their territory.

### **Female**

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=10 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/17 (water) Number=Several to over a hundred Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Ram:13 (6) Strike Points=12 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=10/12 (5) Special Abilities=Ice adaptation Water adaptation Strong to cold Habitat=Ice fields Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05472))_
- Although young females may wander alone, they usually belong to a kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05473))_
- Female giant seals are slightly smaller than males, measuring 6 to 7 meters long and do not have tusks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05473))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05473))_

> Fishermen never choose to hunt females, out of fear that seal numbers will decline.

### **Male**

- Male giant seals are 7 to 8 meters long and have large tusks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05479))_
- 208 are defeated in combat and driven from their kingdom, leaving them to wander aimlessly across the ice fields. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05480))_
- The king commands at least a hundred females, and fights bravely against any intruders in his kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05481))_
- The king has 1-2 more strike points than a regular male, and 30 more life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05481))_
- It is said that there are several of these giant seal kingdoms in the frozen seas of the north. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05481))_
- Only the strongest of the males can win their battle, and become the new king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05481))_
- Only the strongest of the males can win their battle, and become the new king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05481))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05473))_

> Female giant seals are slightly smaller than males, measuring 6 to 7 meters long and do not have tusks. Although young females may wander alone, they usually belong to a kingdom. Fishermen never choose to hunt females, out of fear that seal numbers will decline.

### **Golden Wanderer**

- Monster Level=6 Rarity=12 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/16 (water) Number=One Frequency=Very rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Ram:14 (7) Strike Points=15 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=30/17 (10) Mental Points/Resistance=10/13 (6) Special Abilities=Ice adaptation Water adaptation Strong to cold Habitat=Ice fields Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05483))_
- A fisherman who catches a golden wanderer is highly respected by their peers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05484))_
- Among giant seals, one in every thousand males may be born with a mutation that results in golden skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05484))_
- This rare seal is called the golden wanderer, and its skin can sell for tens of times more than the skin of a normal seal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05484))_
- Although these mutants are larger than normal males, they’re incapable of reproduction, so they never become kings and invariably roam the ice fields. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05484))_
- This rare seal is called the golden wanderer, and its skin can sell for tens of times more than the skin of a normal seal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05484))_

### **Hypnopython**

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=12 Agility=9 Movement Speed=12 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs: 11 (4) Strike Points=8 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=18/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=10/11 (4) Special Abilities=Hypnotism (Resist target score=11) Habitat=Meadows, underground labyrinths, caves _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05497))_
- This is a python with a body length of 8 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05499))_
- Those who see a Hypnopython's dance must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 11, or they will be hypnotized, unable to move or think. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05499))_
- This hypnotic state lasts as long as the hypnopython dances within your view, so if there’s no one around to help you, you will be swallowed by the python without resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05499))_
- This hypnotic state lasts as long as the hypnopython dances within your view, so if there’s no one around to help you, you will be swallowed by the python without resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05499))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05498))_

> Languages=None Perception=Five senses

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05499))_

> A python can attack and evade without penalty while dancing.

### Water adaptation

- You can also stop it by blindfolding the target to prevent them from seeing the dance, or by forcing the hypnopython to stop dancing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05501))_
- If the python takes damage, it'll stop dancing for one round, allowing those affected by the dance to return to their senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05501))_
- However, starting on the next round, they will begin dancing again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05501))_

- The sea serpent is a giant snake that often lives among reefs, and its whole body is covered with hard scales. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05503))_
- Their body length starts at 10 meters, but it's said that some can reach over 20 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05503))_

### **Giant Webspinner**

- They will not attack anyone who has not touched their web. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05527))_
- They usually stay in one corner of the nest, but if an intruder gets caught in their web, they will attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05527))_
- Attack Points=String:14 (7) Strike Points=Special Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=25/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=8/13 (6) Special Abilities=Capture with web (Sense and escape target score=13) Entangling with string Mental attack immunity Habitat=Deep inside dark forests, large rooms in underground labyrinths Languages=None Perception=Five senses (Vibration sense, no vision) This is a huge spider, 3 meters long with legs that are 4 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05527))_
- Attack Points=String:14 (7) Strike Points=Special Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=25/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=8/13 (6) Special Abilities=Capture with web (Sense and escape target score=13) Entangling with string Mental attack immunity Habitat=Deep inside dark forests, large rooms in underground labyrinths Languages=None Perception=Five senses (Vibration sense, no vision) This is a huge spider, 3 meters long with legs that are 4 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05527))_
- To shake free from the web, you must succeed on a success roll against target score 13 using _adventurer level + strength bonus_ (for monsters, use _monster level_ ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05528))_
- To safely pass through a giant webspinner's nest without touching the surrounding webs, you must succeed on a success roll against target score 13 using _adventurer level + agility bonus_ as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05528))_
- The web is highly sticky, so much that it entangles the body, and anyone caught in it will suffer a -4 penalty to their attack and evasion, and will be unable to use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05528))_
- If the target score is 13 or more above than the baseline value, the prey will be completely enwrapped and unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- When a giant webspinner is hungry, it’ll suddenly bite you with its fangs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- Therefore, the target score of the success roll required to shake free from the web also increases by 2 points, to 15, 17…… etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- Those hit by a giant webspinner's string will not suffer any damage, but they will become more and more entangled in the string. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- This allows a giant webspinner to hang its prey alive but deprived of freedom in its nest, then eat it whenever it wants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- When it's not, it'll emit a large amount of string from its abdomen and use its legs to try to entangle its prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- Therefore, the target score of the success roll required to shake free from the web also increases by 2 points, to 15, 17…… etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- This allows a giant webspinner to hang its prey alive but deprived of freedom in its nest, then eat it whenever it wants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05529))_
- A giant web spinner's webs are not affected by fire or acid. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05530))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05524))_

> A giant tarantula's fangs contain a poison (toxicity score 12) that affects motor nerves. Those who are dealt damage by these fangs, and fail a life force resistance roll, will begin to dance violently. While dancing, you’ll suffer a - 4 penalty on attack and evasion, and cannot use ancient magic or spirit magic. ## 13.2.8 Plants

- The killer octopus is an aggressive octopus with tentacles up to 2 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05538))_
- A killer octopus will use all of its tentacles to attack one target, constricting the opponent with its entire body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05539))_
- Creeping trees do not have roots underground, but move around on the ground using their roots like imitation toes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05551))_
- They then use their tentacle-like branches to prey on animals that approach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05551))_
- They then use their tentacle-like branches to prey on animals that approach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05551))_
- However, they do not have human-like minds, so spells that cause mental effects have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05552))_
