### **[ Ethnoa ]**

- If an adventurer is hit by an ethnoa's tentacles, they will suffer damage and also become entangled in the tentacles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- If you’re unfortunate enough to be entangled by two tentacles, you must make two resistance rolls and succeed on both. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- Each tentacle is about 4 meters long, and will wrap around anything that comes near, and throw it into the pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- If you fail, the poor adventurer is thrown into the pouch that makes up the bulk of the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- The pouch contains a strong acid, which dissolves its prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- An ethnoa is a plant about 3 meters tall, with six tentacles and a large, openmouthed pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- On the next round, you must make a resistance roll using _adventurer level + strength bonus_ as the baseline score and the ethnoa's attack points (or the final score from when the attack hits) as the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05560))_
- Those thrown into the pouch will suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 3 each round, starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05561))_
- Against this acid damage, only adventurer level helps damage reduction, and armor defense power is completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05561))_
- Against this acid damage, only adventurer level helps damage reduction, and armor defense power is completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05561))_
- However, the damage dealt is as per the normal rules. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05562))_
- The victim cannot escape from inside unless the ethnoa dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05562))_
- The victim cannot escape from inside unless the ethnoa dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05562))_
- There may be cases where the property of former victims remains undigested inside the ethnoa’s pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05563))_
- It's a low probability for these treasures to remain, but their value is usually around 100 to 1000 gamels per creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05563))_
- There may be cases where the property of former victims remains undigested inside the ethnoa’s pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05563))_

- A single vine may grow over a radius of several tens of meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05572))_
- A killer creeper is a vine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05572))_
- it can attach itself to them and grow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05572))_
- This vine can crawl on the ground and if there are trees, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05572))_
- steps into a killer creeper thicket, the killer creeper will attack them by entangling its vines around them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05573))_
- The corpse is eventually returned to the soil to provide nourishment for the killer creeper. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05573))_
- The adventurer's evasion will suffer a -4 penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05574))_
- If a ranger or sage succeeds on a success roll against target score 12 using _ranger/sage skill level + intelligence bonus_ as the baseline score, they will be able to see the killer creeper's true identity before it approaches, and thus avoid the encounter (this is considered a use of _plant and animal check_ and _monster check_ ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05574))_
- If they fail, the adventurer will have stepped into the killer creeper without realizing it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05574))_
- This is always a surprise attack, so for one round, only the killer creeper can attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05574))_
- This is always a surprise attack, so for one round, only the killer creeper can attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05574))_

- If the killer creeper's attack hits, the vines will entangle the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05575))_

- If you’re entangled in one, this is -2, and if you’re entangled in two or more, it’s -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05575))_

- If entangled in multiple vines, you must make separate checks for each. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05577))_
- When you pull the vines off, 1 point of damage per vine is dealt to the killer creeper's life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05577))_
- A character entangled in vines can also attempt to pull the entangled vines off instead of making a normal attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05577))_

## 13.2.9 Undead

- Since alraune are an artificial variety, they have no fertility. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05592))_
- If raised with the blood of a ruthless criminal, a ruthless alraune will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05592))_
- Also, they do not have a weakness to fire, which is the weakness of plant-type monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05592))_
- A dullahan carries a one-handed sword and no shield, but it's no wonder, as it carries its own head in its spare hand! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05720))_
- A dullahan is a ghost that appears as a headless knight wearing armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05720))_
- A Dullahan rides a chariot pulled by a headless horse (the horse is called a headless horse and the chariot is called a chariot of dullahan) and appears late at night at the door of the house it's aiming for. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05721))_
- A Dullahan rides a chariot pulled by a headless horse (the horse is called a headless horse and the chariot is called a chariot of dullahan) and appears late at night at the door of the house it's aiming for. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05721))_
- However, one (?) dullahan has only one chariot and two headless horses, and if these are defeated, they cannot be summoned again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05722))_
- A dullahan can summon its chariot and headless horse at any time and in any place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05722))_
- However, one (?) dullahan has only one chariot and two headless horses, and if these are defeated, they cannot be summoned again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05722))_
- You can avoid a death prophesied by a dullahan by killing it the first or second time it appears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05723))_
- It’s no use for those who have received the prophecy of death to move away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05723))_
- A dullahan can only be wounded by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05724))_
- A dullahan can only be wounded by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05724))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05723))_

> The dullahan will always appear at the place you moved to (or to one of the places moved to, if the residents have split up and moved to different places), even if it's on the sea, or in a room that's been walled off on all sides.......

### **[ Bloody Petal ]**

- This plant, which has huge red flowers that resemble the color of human blood, is called _blood flower_ , but is sometimes also called _man-eating flower_ , which more clearly describes its characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05594))_
- This plant, which has huge red flowers that resemble the color of human blood, is called _blood flower_ , but is sometimes also called _man-eating flower_ , which more clearly describes its characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05594))_
- The stem has 2 to 5 bud-shaped flowers about 1 meter in diameter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05595))_
- approaches, the folded flower stalks extend out and the buds open to envelop their prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05595))_
- This plant can grow up to about 10 meters in height. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05595))_

### **Flower**

- If the prey escapes with all their might, the flower becomes torn and unusable, and will eventually wither. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05602))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05595))_

> This plant can grow up to about 10 meters in height. The stem has 2 to 5 bud-shaped flowers about 1 meter in diameter. When a creature such as a human, etc. approaches, the folded flower stalks extend out and the buds open to envelop their prey. The flower stalks grow to about 10 meters long.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05597))_

### **[ Fungus ]**

- They cannot survive for long in dry or sunny areas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05611))_
- To cure this, use the holy magic _Cure Poison_ or the spirit magic _Restore Health_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- Fungus release toxic spores (toxicity score 16) when injured. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- When the spell is cast, if the caster's final score is 16 or greater, it will be healed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- No matter how many you cut off, there will be no end. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- While fighting a fungus, anyone within a 5 meter radius may inhale the spores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- Gradually, your sense of humanity will fade and you’ll begin to suffer from hallucinations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- While fighting a fungus, anyone within a 5 meter radius may inhale the spores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05612))_
- They can only be restored to their original state by using the holy magic _Refresh_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05613))_
- Those who have completely become a fungus cannot be cured with the holy magic _Cure Poison_ nor the spirit magic _Restore Health_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05613))_
- If one week elapses without treatment, the character will turn into a fungus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05613))_
- They can only be restored to their original state by using the holy magic _Refresh_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05613))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05609))_

### **[ Buau Zombie ]**

- Attack Points=/Strike Points/Evasion Points/ Defense Points=Based on previous Life Points/Resistance=Based on previous/Based on previous Mental Points/Resistance=-/Based on previous Special Abilities=Retains previous abilities Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Damage from healing magic Habitat=Various Languages=Based on previous Perception=Pseudo _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05618))_
- These are undead created by the lost spell _Create Buau Zombie_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05619))_
- Unlike normal zombies, they possess intellect, albeit low, and can make independent decisions and follow the commands of their creator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05619))_
- Unlike normal zombies, they possess intellect, albeit low, and can make independent decisions and follow the commands of their creator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05619))_
- Unlike zombies, they decay slowly and can work for decades to centuries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05621))_
- All magic and bard skill spellsong abilities cannot be used once you become a buau zombie. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05621))_
- Strength and life force are kept at their original scores, but dexterity, agility, and intelligence are reduced to half of what their scores were before death, and mental power is completely lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05621))_
- Unlike zombies, they decay slowly and can work for decades to centuries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05621))_

- Monster level is the same as their previous adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05622))_
- Game masters should be aware of changes due to ability scores (reduced dexterity and agility). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05622))_
- 214 performed at their previous level (fighter, thief, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05622))_
- Buau zombies are mindless beings, so spells that cause mental effects on them are ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05623))_

### **[ Ash ]**

- Also, since it's already been burned once, fire has no effect on it at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05650))_
- An ash is an undead created from the ashes of a burned corpse using ancient magic and dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05650))_
- Also, since it does not have a mind, attacks that affect the mind are also ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05650))_

- Every round thereafter, they must make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05651))_
- An ash's attacks also do not deal direct damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05651))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05651))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05651))_

### **[ Sin ]**

### Monster Level=4

- Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=16/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=20/13 (6) Special Abilities=Life point regenerate (3 points per round) Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Damage from healing magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05663))_
- Sin are a very special type of undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05666))_
- Their appearance remains the same as when they were alive, and other than their abnormally pale skin and cloudy eyes, they are no different from a normal human (however, their clothes may be tattered depending on the number of years since their death). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05666))_
- They remain in this world, trying to monopolize what they were attached to even after death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05666))_
- A soul of someone who was greatly possessive in life will become undead as a sin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05666))_
- They remain in this world, trying to monopolize what they were attached to even after death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05666))_
- They are driven only by an insatiable desire for possession, and are, so to speak, the dead who have fallen into madness and cannot be saved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05667))_
- A sin usually refuses to leave the side of whatever it's attached to, and will attack anything that tries to take it away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05667))_
- They are driven only by an insatiable desire for possession, and are, so to speak, the dead who have fallen into madness and cannot be saved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05667))_

### **[ Wight ]**

### Monster Level=4

- If a wight's attack hits, your life force will suffer damage as well as your mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- To wound a wight, you need a silver or magical weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- Normal weapons have no effect against this monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- The damage dealt to mental power is merely the result of a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus damage 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- A wight's weapon is its sharp claws, and those who are dealt damage will have their life energy drained at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 by this attack will die immediately and will then be _revived_ as a new wight 24 hours later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- Wights are undead that possess people and feed on the energy of others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 by this attack will die immediately and will then be _revived_ as a new wight 24 hours later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_

### **[ Haunt ]**

- These are broadly classified into three types: ghosts, specters, and phantoms, but they are collectively called haunts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05676))_
- A haunt is a being such a ghost or a vengeful spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05676))_
- Such haunts are always hostile and attack all creatures they encounter, with intent to kill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05677))_
- Haunts are souls that have remained in this world because they have unfinished business, or held a strong grudge against others in life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05677))_
- A special case, however, is when one resents its own death itself and harbors hatred toward all living things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05677))_
- Haunts are souls that have remained in this world because they have unfinished business, or held a strong grudge against others in life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05677))_
- Haunts have a minimum monster level of 5, but if they had a higher adventurer level in life, or if they died harboring a particularly strong grudge, their level will be higher. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05678))_
- If you cast this magic, you will be freed from the haunt’s possession. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- A special ability common to all haunts is _possess_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- When a haunt takes over your body, it can use your character's abilities in addition to its own previous skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- Once you successfully resist, there is no danger of being possessed by the same haunt again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- This is the act of taking over the body of a living being and using it for one's own purposes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- If a body is destroyed after being possessed, the haunt will become a phantom and be bound in place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- The target of the possession must attempt a mental power resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- If you fail, your body will be taken over. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- There’s also 6th level holy magic called _Exorcism_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_
- If a body is destroyed after being possessed, the haunt will become a phantom and be bound in place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05674))_

> Wights are undead that possess people and feed on the energy of others. Normal weapons have no effect against this monster. To wound a wight, you need a silver or magical weapon. A wight's weapon is its sharp claws, and those who are dealt damage will have their life energy drained at the same time. If a wight's attack hits, your life force will suffer damage as well as your mental power. The damage dealt to mental power is merely the result of a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus damage 4. 

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05677))_

> If you can clear up those lingering regrets and grudges, they will cease to exist.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05679))_

> If a haunt finds that a creature it comes into contact with does not sympathize with its feelings, it may attempt to possess them.

### **Ghost**

> A special ability common to all haunts is _possess_ . This is the act of taking over the body of a living being and using it for one's own purposes. If a haunt finds that a creature it comes into contact with does not sympathize with its feelings, it may attempt to possess them. The target of the possession must attempt a mental power resistance roll. If you fail, your body will be taken over. When a haunt takes over your body, it can use your character's abilities in addition to its own previou

> A ghost is a moving being whose corpse still holds a lingering grudge. Depending on how long ago they died, they can look like zombies (rotting corpses) or skeletons (moving skeletons). Their strength varies considerably depending on which abilities they had in life. The scores listed here are averages. All ability scores will be the same as previous, except for mental power.

### **Chariot of Dullahan**

- Rarity=14 Agility=16 Movement Speed=30/30 (air) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=None Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Ram:14 (7) Strike Points=15 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=30/15 (8) Mental Points/Resistance=-/12 (5) Special Abilities=Normal weapon immunity _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05727))_
- Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Unknown, appears with (or summoned by) dullahan Languages=None Perception=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05729))_
- Also, it can _hit-and-run_ different opposing characters again and again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05730))_
- Headless horses also cannot attack while pulling a chariot. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05730))_
- A dullahan riding and controlling a chariot cannot attack on its own at the same time (because it’s pulling the reins with one hand and holding its head in the other). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05730))_
- A chariot ridden by a dullahan, which has the ability to fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05730))_
- A dullahan riding and controlling a chariot cannot attack on its own at the same time (because it’s pulling the reins with one hand and holding its head in the other). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05730))_
- Furthermore, additional critical damage cannot be dealt by _swords_ , _spears_ , _clubs_ , _bows_ , _crossbows_ , or _barehanded (with magic cast)_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05731))_
- A chariot can only be dealt damage by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05731))_
- Criticals can occur as usual with _axes_ , _maces_ , _flails_ , _slings_ , _rocks_ , and _warhammers_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05731))_
- A chariot can only be dealt damage by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05731))_
- In the case of magic, _cold-type_ and _poison gas-type_ magic is completely ineffective, but other damage magic are effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05732))_
- _Turn Undead_ has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05732))_
- To attack a dullahan aboard a chariot, you must suffer a -2 penalty to attack power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05733))_
- When its master dullahan is defeated, or when any one of the headless horses pulling it are defeated, the chariot loses the ability to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05734))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05723))_

> You can avoid a death prophesied by a dullahan by killing it the first or second time it appears. It’s no use for those who have received the prophecy of death to move away. ### **[ Undead Knight ]**

- Agility=14 Movement Speed=14 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon:15 (8) Strike Points=17+mental damage Evasion Points=16 (9) Defense Points=13 Life Points/Resistance=21/17 (10) Mental Points/Resistance=24/18 (11) Special Abilities=Steal mental power (Strike power 10, bonus damage 8) Gaze (Resist target score=15, mental damage, strike power 10, bonus damage 8) Normal weapon immunity Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05743))_
- After defeating an undead knight, all that remains is an empty, rusty suit of armor and a sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05745))_
- You can touch the armor, but apart from the glowing red eyes behind the helmet, there's nothing to be found inside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05745))_
- An undead knight is a ghost that appears in the form of a knight wearing armor, holding a large two-handed sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05745))_
- Both the sword and armor have red rust and no sheen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05745))_
- You can touch the armor, but apart from the glowing red eyes behind the helmet, there's nothing to be found inside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05745))_
- After defeating an undead knight, all that remains is an empty, rusty suit of armor and a sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05745))_
- It is said that they fell on their journey to defeat evil, but their will to fight remained and they turned into ghosts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05747))_
- Naturally, the priests of Pharis deny this, while agreeing with a different claim, which is that they're sentinels created by necromancy during the ancient kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05747))_
- You will need a silver or magical weapon to defeat them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05748))_
- Undead knights cannot be wounded by ordinary weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05748))_
- This damage is calculated as strike power 10 plus bonus damage 8, and armor defense power is useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05748))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense effects will work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05748))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense effects will work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05748))_
- An undead knight can similarly drain the mental power of its enemies with its gaze. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05749))_
- As a result, anyone struck by an undead knight's gaze (even from behind) will suffer damage to their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05749))_
- For this reason, an undead knight may be accompanied by multiple wights. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05749))_
- These wights are sometimes specifically called _squire wights_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05749))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 due to damage from an undead knight's weapons or gaze will die instantly and will be resurrected as a wight 24 hours later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05749))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05741))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05749))_

> An undead knight can similarly drain the mental power of its enemies with its gaze. As a result, anyone struck by an undead knight's gaze (even from behind) will suffer damage to their mental power. Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 due to damage from an undead knight's weapons or gaze will die instantly and will be resurrected as a wight 24 hours later. For this reason, an undead knight may be accompanied by multiple wights. These wights are sometimes specifically called _squire wights_ 

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05748))_

> Also, if an undead knight's attack hits, the character will suffer damage to their mental power in addition to normal damage.

### Habitat=Ruins

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05760))_

> A wraith is a being whose ethereal body was separated from its physical body by the ancient magic spell _Wraith Form_ and became undead because it did not return within the spell's duration. It resembles a specter, with a vaguely transparent image of when it was alive. The scores given here are for an average wraith, and can vary considerably depending on its previous knowledge, mental power, sorcerer skill level, etc.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05758))_

> Languages=Those previous (always includes low ancient)

### Perception=Pseudo

- It resembles a specter, with a vaguely transparent image of when it was alive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05760))_
- A wraith is a being whose ethereal body was separated from its physical body by the ancient magic spell _Wraith Form_ and became undead because it did not return within the spell's duration. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05760))_
- The scores given here are for an average wraith, and can vary considerably depending on its previous knowledge, mental power, sorcerer skill level, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05760))_
- A wraith is a being whose ethereal body was separated from its physical body by the ancient magic spell _Wraith Form_ and became undead because it did not return within the spell's duration. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05760))_
- Attacks using weapons or damaging spells have no effect at all on wraiths, which do not have a physical body, so the only effective countermeasure is magic that has a mental effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_
- If it’s directly exposed to sunlight, it will also disappear without even attempting to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_
- Although a wraith has lost all of its physical abilities, its knowledge-related abilities and rune master skills are still effective, and it can use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_
- If its mental points become 0 due to a _Mental Attack_ , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_
- However, holy magic cannot be used (dark magic is allowed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_
- the wraith will vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_
- Unlike specters, wraiths do not have the ability to _possess_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05761))_

- 219 coffin, the master mummy rises and begins to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05776))_

- This _regeneration_ or _summoning_ can only be done once per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05778))_

- Since a master mummy is dry, it's weak to fire, so fire attack checks are made at plus 10 to strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05779))_

### **[ Vampire ]**

- Also, even if their blood is sucked by a lesser vampire, a lesser vampire will still be created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05781))_
- A human whose blood is sucked by these vampires will also be turned into a lesser vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05781))_
- There are three types of vampires: undead king, vampire, and lesser vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05781))_
- Those who have their blood sucked or their mental power taken by these vampires become lesser vampires. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05781))_
- An undead king is a supreme spirit-user of the ancient kingdom, who has turned itself into an undead being, and holds great magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05781))_
- The target score varies depending on the type of vampire, but in any case, if you fail to resist, you will be paralyzed with fear and unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05782))_
- First, vampires have pale skin and a red glow in their eyes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05782))_
- These red eyes cause intense fear in those who see them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05782))_
- Anyone who makes eye contact with a vampire must first make a mental power resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05782))_
- To defeat them, you will need a silver or magical weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 by this attack will die and will be resurrected 24 hours later as a lesser vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_
- Vampires cannot be wounded by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_
- Armor defense power is useless against this damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense power are effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense power are effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_
- Vampires can also steal mental power even with normal attacks, which are directly added to the vampire's mental points (but never exceed the upper limit). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05784))_
- Vampires who temporarily lose their mental points due to magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05784))_
- A vampire can suck the lifeblood of one human who cannot resist in 10 minutes, allowing them to fully recover their mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05784))_
- Those who've had their blood sucked will lose their mental points and will be resurrected as a lesser vampire in 24 hours. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05784))_
- Vampires can also steal mental power even with normal attacks, which are directly added to the vampire's mental points (but never exceed the upper limit). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05784))_
- Life points do not regenerate under the sun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05786))_
- When exposed to sunlight, a vampire suffers 1 point of damage to both their life points and mental points each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05786))_
- A vampire's negative life force has strong regenerative power, and unless it becomes 0, it will automatically regenerate at a rate of 3 points per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05786))_
- A vampire's negative life force has strong regenerative power, and unless it becomes 0, it will automatically regenerate at a rate of 3 points per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05786))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05782))_

> Vampires share several common characteristics. First, vampires have pale skin and a red glow in their eyes. These red eyes cause intense fear in those who see them. Anyone who makes eye contact with a vampire must first make a mental power resistance roll. The target score varies depending on the type of vampire, but in any case, if you fail to resist, you will be paralyzed with fear and unable to act. Even if the vampire removes its gaze, this paralysis continues until it disappears.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05783))_

> Also, if a vampire's attack hits a character, in addition to normal damage, mental power will also be damaged.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05782))_

### **[ Simulacra ]**

- Monster Level=Based on original Rarity=14 Agility=Based on original Movement Speed=Based on original Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=None Reaction=Violent Attack Points/Strike Points/Evasion Points/ Defense Points=Based on original Life Points/Resistance=Based on original/based on original Mental Points/Resistance=-/Based on original Special Abilities=Duplication Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Ruins _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05820))_
- A simulacra duplicates the appearance and abilities of an enemy human creature and makes them its own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05822))_
- A simulacra is a kind of golem built during the ancient kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05822))_
- They were often used to watch over people who did not use magic, such as slaves and savages, and to guard the places where they worked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05823))_
- Although they look the same, they don't even have magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05823))_
- If it duplicates someone who is holding a broadsword +1, it will attack with a broadsword with the same strike power, but will _not_ receive any bonuses to attack power or bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05823))_
- However, magical weapons and armor cannot be duplicated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05823))_
- They were often used to watch over people who did not use magic, such as slaves and savages, and to guard the places where they worked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05823))_
- As far as is currently known, simulacra seem to be unable to speak or use any magic at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05824))_
- It cannot duplicate someone's personality or even their memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05824))_
- A simulacra's replication is only superficial, and is limited to weapon combat capability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05824))_
- A simulacra's replication is only superficial, and is limited to weapon combat capability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05824))_
- The only way to attack a simulacra is to attack directly with a weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05825))_

### **[ Homunculus ]**

- Among the pseudo-life forms created by ancient magic, the homunculus is the closest to human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05827))_
- Although they’re about one-tenth the size of a human, they have human-like intelligence and can speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05827))_
- In addition, creating a homunculus with new characteristics will inevitably be a process of trial and error. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05828))_
- The same held true for the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom period, who produced countless failures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05828))_
- The monsters called blobs are these failures, which were carelessly dumped into sewers and rivers, which turned feral and have survived to the present day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05828))_
- Production of a homunculus is not always successful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05828))_

### **Homunculus**

### Monster Level=1

- Homunculus are often created as distractions or scouts for rune masters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05834))_
- Most resemble humans, but some are ugly, resembling gargoyles, and some have wings and can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05834))_
- homunculus have their own will, and in some cases they may rebel against their creators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05835))_
- Their life span is only a few years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05835))_

The blob is said to be the result of such failed artificial life turning feral. It's a black, slimy, amorphous creature with no intellect, which attacks all living things.

### **[ Puppet Golem ]**

- Depending on the material, there are four different types of puppet golems that can be created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05845))_
- They are oak, stone servant, bone servant, and skeleton warrior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05845))_
- A puppet golem is a small, simple version of a golem that is created by giving temporary life to a tree branch, stone, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05845))_

### **[ Imitator ]**

- Since they can live for thousands of years in a state of suspended animation, many imitators are even now still awaiting intruders in old labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05871))_
- Normally, they’re in a state of suspended animation and do not move at all, and they look like stone or metal, but as soon as they are touched by a living creature, they activate immediately and attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05871))_
- An Imitator will not stop attacking until the intruders are repelled or wiped out, but since they're ordered to remain in a specific location, they will not pursue any enemies that run away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05872))_
- When it finishes absorbing, the imitator will return to its original state of suspended animation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- An imitator can also absorb iron, but cannot dissolve gold, silver, or jewelry, so it spits those out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- Once combat is over, an imitator dissolves the bodies of the victims it killed in acid, completely absorbing them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- The time required for absorption is several hours for a small imitator, but only a few dozen seconds for a large one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- Therefore, there will often be treasures that belonged to the victims scattered around the imitator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- Therefore, there will often be treasures that belonged to the victims scattered around the imitator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- The time required for absorption is several hours for a small imitator, but only a few dozen seconds for a large one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05873))_
- If you say the keyword, the imitator will not attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05874))_
- The only words an imitator can understand are the keywords given to it by the sorcerer at the time it was created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05874))_
- Even in the middle of combat, hearing the keyword will instantly return it to suspended animation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05874))_
- The only words an imitator can understand are the keywords given to it by the sorcerer at the time it was created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05874))_
- There are also monsters called things, which are imitators that escaped after being created, and turned feral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05875))_
- Imitators come in a variety of shapes and sizes, but the three most common ones are chest imitators, door imitators, and floor imitators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05875))_
- There are also monsters called things, which are imitators that escaped after being created, and turned feral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05875))_
- Imitators and things will disguise themselves as other objects, then 223 perform a _surprise attack_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05876))_
- Imitators and things will disguise themselves as other objects, then 223 perform a _surprise attack_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05876))_
- Normal combat is possible from the 2nd round onwards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05877))_
- If you’re caught by surprise, the imitator or thing will be given the first attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05877))_
- At this time, a -4 penalty will be imposed on the character's evasion speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05877))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05876))_

Anyone hit by a door imitator's attack on the first round will have one arm grabbed and will suffer a -4 penalty to evasion on subsequent rounds. You can only use your other arm in combat, and your movement is restricted, so you cannot use ancient magic. ### **Thing**

- Although it is nearly impossible to see through its clever transformation, in contrast to an imitator, it's not very good at transforming into inanimate objects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05899))_
- The difference is that they have intellect and can transform into any creature so long as it's close to human size. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05899))_
- Although it is nearly impossible to see through its clever transformation, in contrast to an imitator, it's not very good at transforming into inanimate objects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05899))_
- They approach their prey in the form of a human or elf, catch their opponent off guard, then aim to attack when they're alone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05900))_
- Animals have a keen sense of smell, so no matter how closely a thing resembles the real deal, they’ll be able to tell by the difference in smell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05900))_
- They approach their prey in the form of a human or elf, catch their opponent off guard, then aim to attack when they're alone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05900))_
- The game master must roll the dice to randomly determine how many attacks are made in a round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05901))_

> Things often eat humans. They approach their prey in the form of a human or elf, catch their opponent off guard, then aim to attack when they're alone. They target humans because they’re easier to deceive than animals. Animals have a keen sense of smell, so no matter how closely a thing resembles the real deal, they’ll be able to tell by the difference in smell.

### Habitat=Ruins

- A gargoyle is a species of golem, a statue brought to life through magic, but its flexible movements resemble those of a normal living creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05913))_
- Its appearance resembles a stone statue, and if you close your eyes, you won't be able to tell it apart unless you look very closely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05913))_
- Its appearance resembles a stone statue, and if you close your eyes, you won't be able to tell it apart unless you look very closely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05913))_
- These monsters still exist in the ruins of the ancient kingdom without ceasing activity, but the means to control them and the technology to create them have already been lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05913))_
- These monsters still exist in the ruins of the ancient kingdom without ceasing activity, but the means to control them and the technology to create them have already been lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05913))_
- A gargoyle has wings on its back and can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05914))_
- Its grotesque appearance is said to be because it was modeled after the lesser daemon zalbard (described later). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05914))_
- The size of a gargoyle is nearly 2 meters when standing upright. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05914))_
- Their personality is very insidious, and they’re willing to resort to dirty measures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05914))_
- Its grotesque appearance is said to be because it was modeled after the lesser daemon zalbard (described later). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05914))_

> A gargoyle has wings on its back and can fly. It also has a tail. Its grotesque appearance is said to be because it was modeled after the lesser daemon zalbard (described later). The size of a gargoyle is nearly 2 meters when standing upright. Unlike golems, etc. they act according to their own judgment without receiving commands. In other words, they may run away if they think they're at a disadvantage, or they may take advantageous tactics depending on the situation. Their personality is very

### **[ Sí ]**

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=14 Agility=17 Movement Speed=17 Number=One to several Frequency=Very rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon:11 (4) Strike Points=4 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=4/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=14/11 (4) Special Abilities=3rd level ancient magic (Magic intensity/magic power=12/5) Habitat=Ruins Languages=Low ancient Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05916))_
- They mainly live in ancient ruins and have their own villages and small homes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05917))_
- They are highly intelligent and can handle magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05917))_
- The sí is said to be an artificial lifeform created by the wizards of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05917))_
- They do not willingly go outside their home (ruins). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05918))_
- A sí's weapon is a thin sword that resembles a needle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05918))_
- This often includes lost spells among them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05918))_
- They also use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05918))_

### **[ Stalker ]**

- if they attempt to carry out their original purpose, which is to kill, they must materialize _before_ they attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- Stalkers are beings created through ancient magic rituals, using gas and many human souls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- A materialized stalker can be wounded by damage magic, silver, and magical weapons, but cannot be wounded by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- However, since they cannot use magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- When either its life or mental points reach 0, a stalker's spiritual bond will break and it'll disappear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- Physical attacks are completely ineffective against a stalker in ghostly form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- Thus they can freely pass through small gaps in doors or holes in walls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- Thus they can freely pass through small gaps in doors or holes in walls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_
- Therefore, all stalkers adventurers will meet are survivors from the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05921))_
- In present day Forcelia, the technique used to create stalkers has been lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05921))_
- Therefore, all stalkers adventurers will meet are survivors from the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05921))_
- Stalkers that were created but abandoned without being given any commands will act according to their violent tendencies, indiscriminately attacking anyone they come across. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05922))_
- Stalkers naturally follow the commands of their casters, but now that all the casters are dead, they remember the last command they were given and faithfully try to carry it out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05922))_
- However, these failed creations became gaseous creatures called gizmos, which continue to live in present day Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05923))_
- Failures were also an inevitable part of stalker production. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05923))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05918, source-range-870a16bc-05921))_

> They do not willingly go outside their home (ruins). A sí's weapon is a thin sword that resembles a needle. They also use ancient magic. This often includes lost spells among them. In present day Forcelia, the technique used to create stalkers has been lost. Therefore, all stalkers adventurers will meet are survivors from the ancient kingdom.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05920))_

> Stalkers are usually ghostly beings, who can move without being blocked by physical obstacles.

### **Gizmo**

- Rarity=15 Agility=10 Movement Speed=13 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=None Reaction=Violent Attack Points=- Strike Points=Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=14/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=-/11 (4) Special Abilities=Noxious gas (Toxicity score 10, strike power 10, bonus damage 3) Mental attack immunity Weapon immunity Certain magic immunity Weak to fire _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05926))_
- Gizmos are amorphous black gasses around 2 meters in diameter, which were failed attempts at stalkers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05928))_
- If there are no animal carcasses nearby, they will also try to kill living creatures and turn them into corpses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05928))_
- They live by inhaling the stench of decay emitted by dead animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05928))_

> Stalkers naturally follow the commands of their casters, but now that all the casters are dead, they remember the last command they were given and faithfully try to carry it out. > Gizmos are amorphous black gasses around 2 meters in diameter, which were failed attempts at stalkers. They live by inhaling the stench of decay emitted by dead animals. If there are no animal carcasses nearby, they will also try to kill living creatures and turn them into corpses.

### **Gas Stalker**

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05932))_

> body of a gizmo is poisonous gas, so those hit by it will inhale it and suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus 3 points of bonus damage. However, if their resistance roll is successful, the strike power becomes 0. Armor cannot protect against gas, only adventurer level or magical protection can reduce the damage.

### **Shadow Stalker**

- Rarity=14 Agility=15 Movement Speed=15 Number=One, rarely multiple Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Garrote:10 (3) Strike Points=Special Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=16/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Special Abilities=Choke (Strike power 10, bonus damage 5) Surprise attack (Sense target score=16) Normal attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Physical attack immunity while in ghostly form Habitat=Ruins _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05946))_
- A shadow stalker will materialize behind its opponent, holding a garrote in its hand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05949))_
- A shadow stalker is a stalker made using an extremely heavy black gas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05949))_
- Even when it's not materialized, the color of the black gas is clearly visible in a well-lit area, but when it's lost in darkness, it's barely recognizable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05949))_
- It also excels at moving around while pretending to be its opponent's shadow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05949))_
- If you can detect it, you can evade and attack as normal, but if you cannot, it will be a complete _surprise attack_ , so you will _not_ be able to attack, and will _be_ attacked with no chance to respond. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05950))_
- If an adventurer is wearing metal armor other than ring mail, they will not suffer any damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05951))_
- Regardless of damage or armor, once _character's life force_ rounds have passed, the character will suffocate and fall unconscious (life force 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05951))_
- The damage is strike power 10, plus 5 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05951))_
- Every round from then on, you’ll need to make a _death check_ when applying damage (even if it’s 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05951))_
- Every round from then on, you’ll need to make a _death check_ when applying damage (even if it’s 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05951))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05943))_

> A gas stalker is a Stalker created using a heavy, foul-smelling gas. Although it's usually invisible and doesn't make a sound, you can tell when it’s approaching because the gas that makes up its body gives off a terrible odor. When it materializes, it appears as a naked devil with green skin and crazy bloodshot eyes.

> A shadow stalker is a stalker made using an extremely heavy black gas. Even when it's not materialized, the color of the black gas is clearly visible in a well-lit area, but when it's lost in darkness, it's barely recognizable. It also excels at moving around while pretending to be its opponent's shadow. A shadow stalker will materialize behind its opponent, holding a garrote in its hand. It'll then try to strangle the opponent to death with that garrote.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05950))_

### **Air Stalker**

- For this reason, attacks on an air stalker and evasion against an air stalker's attacks are always -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05958))_
- An air stalker is a stalker created from transparent gas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05958))_
- Therefore, even when it materializes, it is completely invisible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05958))_
- Therefore, even when it materializes, it is completely invisible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05958))_

> Those with the ranger skill can detect this attack using their _sense danger_ ability if they succeed on a success roll against target score 16 using _ranger skill level + intelligence bonus_ as the baseline score. If you can detect it, you can evade and attack as normal, but if you cannot, it will be a complete _surprise attack_ , so you will _not_ be able to attack, and will _be_ attacked with no chance to respond. At this time, you’ll suffer a -4 penalty to evasion.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05953))_

### **[ Mutant Monster ]**

- Rarity=18 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10 Number=One Frequency=Very rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Arms:13 (6) Strike Points=11 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=18/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=18/13 (6) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Various Languages=Regional Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05962))_
- They vary in appearance; some have four arms, some have a tail instead of legs, some have small wings, and some have scales all over their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05964))_
- Evasion points, defense points, and life points in the round during transformation use the _monster's_ scores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05965))_
- Even if struck by the poison, it does not _completely_ turn them into a monster, and some memories of being human may remain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05966))_
- If you cast the holy magic _Cure Poison_ on them, you can return them to their human form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05966))_
- In addition to _Living Doll_ , it’s said that there are several other poisons that can create mutant monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05967))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05961))_

> Monster Level=5

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05964))_

> This is a human who has mutated and gone berserk due to a special poison called _Living Doll_ (see Poison List, p. 161). They vary in appearance; some have four arms, some have a tail instead of legs, some have small wings, and some have scales all over their bodies.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05965))_

> Transformation from human to monster takes one round, during which they cannot attack, but they can still evade.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05965))_

> Transformation from human to monster takes one round, during which they cannot attack, but they can still evade. Evasion points, defense points, and life points in the round during transformation use the _monster's_ scores.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05966))_

> If you call out to them with all your heart, they may respond.

### **[ Golem ]**

- All they can do is blindly follow the commands of their sorcerer master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05969))_
- In the present day, the method of creating golems has been lost, and there are no sorcerers who can create golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05969))_
- Golems are statues created by enchanters during the ancient kingdom period, and given pseudo-life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05969))_
- Some of them were left as they were created, without any commands given. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05970))_
- Since golems have eternal life, some of them are still left in ruins, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05970))_
- Such golems can be given commands using the ancient magic _Command Golem_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05970))_
- Typically, animal (or human) flesh, stone, wood, steel, and ceramics were commonly used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05971))_
- A variety of materials were used to create golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05971))_
- Golems are generally humanoid, but there are many exceptions to this, and some come in special shapes that resemble animals, magical beasts, or mythical beasts such as dragons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05972))_
- Golems are generally humanoid, but there are many exceptions to this, and some come in special shapes that resemble animals, magical beasts, or mythical beasts such as dragons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05972))_
- This data has been created with the assumption that their shape is humanoid. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-05973))_

Also, damage spells such as _cold-type_ , _electric-type_ , _stone-type_ , _poison gas-type_ , and _wind cutter-type_ are completely useless. _Fire-type_ damage magic is effective, but a critical cannot occur. _Earthquake-type_ , _explosion-type_ , and _pure energy-type_ damage magic is effective, and a critical _can_ occur.

### Monster Level=5

- Armor cannot protect against this fire; only adventurer level and magical defense can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06008))_

- Those attacked by the fire will suffer damage equal to a strike power 10 strike roll plus 5 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_

- The zalbard is a lesser daemon that's said to be the model for the gargoyle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_
- The fire breathed by a zalbard extends in a straight line, making one target within 5 meters its victim. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_
- Its appearance is almost identical to that of a gargoyle, but its skin is fiery red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_
- In addition, fire and heat attacks cannot wound a zalbard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_
- They have the ability to use dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_
- The fire breathed by a zalbard extends in a straight line, making one target within 5 meters its victim. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06030))_

## 13.2.12 Humans

- who fail to resist will immediately suffer damage equal to a strike power 20 strike roll plus 6 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06046))_

### **Maligdorai**

### Monster Level=7

- Rarity=15 Agility=14 Movement Speed=15/20 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very rare Intellect=High Reaction=Adversarial, or command-based Attack Points=Needle x 2: 14 (7) Strike Points=16x2 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=20/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=25/17 (10) Special Abilities=Illusion (Resist target score=17, mental damage=strike power 10, bonus damage 7) Habitat=Underground labyrinths, secluded ruins _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06049))_
- As well as wings on its back, it has jointless tentacle-like viscera sprouting from the base of each wing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06050))_
- Languages=Low ancient Perception=Five senses (Darkvision) The Maligdorai is a daemon whose upper body resembles an owl and lower body the hind legs of a goat, and its entire body is covered in feathers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06050))_
- Its arms come to sharp gimlet-shaped points, and it performs physical attacks by stabbing with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06050))_
- If the target succeeds, they will escape the effect and can act freely, but if the target fails to resist, they will see an illusion of what they fear as an enemy deep within their heart attacking them, and as a result will suffer _strike power 10 + bonus damage 7_ damage to their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06051))_
- They will also be unable to take any actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06051))_
- The maligdorai can show illusions to surrounding creatures, dealing damage to their minds (these illusions have no effect on monsters that don't have mental points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06051))_
- A maligdorai’s most frightening ability is _illusion_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06051))_
- If the target succeeds, they will escape the effect and can act freely, but if the target fails to resist, they will see an illusion of what they fear as an enemy deep within their heart attacking them, and as a result will suffer _strike power 10 + bonus damage 7_ damage to their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06051))_
- To recover from this, you must defeat their master, the maligdorai. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06052))_
- Also, spells that affect the mind have no effect on those in this state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06052))_
- Those being manipulated cannot recover their mental power through sleep or through magic such as _Transfer Mental Power_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06052))_
- Those who lose all their mental power due to an illusory attack will from then on be turned into a being that can be freely manipulated by the maligdorai. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06052))_
- Those being manipulated cannot recover their mental power through sleep or through magic such as _Transfer Mental Power_ . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06052))_
- Those who lose all their mental power due to an illusory attack will from then on be turned into a being that can be freely manipulated by the maligdorai. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06052))_
- A maligdorai can also show illusions to multiple creatures within its vision at the same time, but it must focus in order to perform the illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_
- If its focus is interrupted or it’s unable to focus due to making physical attacks, suffering damage, etc., then it cannot maintain its illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_
- Illusions cannot be used in the round immediately after suffering damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_
- Illusions cannot be used in the round immediately after suffering damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_
- A maligdorai can also show illusions to multiple creatures within its vision at the same time, but it must focus in order to perform the illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_
- If its focus is interrupted or it’s unable to focus due to making physical attacks, suffering damage, etc., then it cannot maintain its illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06051))_

> When a maligdorai uses this illusion ability, those being targeted must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17 at the beginning of the round.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06053))_

> A maligdorai can also show illusions to multiple creatures within its vision at the same time, but it must focus in order to perform the illusions. If its focus is interrupted or it’s unable to focus due to making physical attacks, suffering damage, etc., then it cannot maintain its illusions. Illusions cannot be used in the round immediately after suffering damage.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06054))_

> Conversely, while the maligdorai is performing an illusion, the target must make a resistance roll against the illusion each round.

### **[ Greater Daemons ] Doppelganger**

- Its has a bright red straight open mouth, but no other features besides that. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- To shapeshift or shapeshift back requires one full round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- A doppelganger can copy the appearance, abilities, memories, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- Then, if they observe them for over one hour, they will be able to completely copy their abilities and memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- Languages=Low ancient, languages of the person it shapeshifts into Perception=Five senses (Darkvision) The doppleganger, which is in the same family as the doubleburg, albeit a greater species, has the appearance of a 3 meter tall giant with an entirely black body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- At a glance, all they can capture is their appearance (including their belongings). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- Then, if they observe them for over one hour, they will be able to completely copy their abilities and memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06060))_
- In addition, a doppelganger can use its own ability, ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06061))_
- However, they cannot use holy magic or dragon roar magic (they _can_ use other magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06061))_
- If they transform into a dragon, they can breathe fire, and if they transform into a 10th level fighter, they can fight with their attack power, strike power, and bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06061))_
- If combat occurs without them shapeshifting, a doppelganger will fight primarily using ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06062))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-870a16bc-06054))_

> Conversely, while the maligdorai is performing an illusion, the target must make a resistance roll against the illusion each round.
